I'm going to fix our Southern Border that's allowing fentanyl to flood into our country and destroy families, stand up to Communist China so we can bring back OUR JOBS , and lower the inflation that's leaving your wallet all but empty under Joe Biden's horrible policies. I need your help, though, to have the resources to keep fighting back. | MY FINAL FUNDRAISING GOAL OF 2022 is right around the corner, and I need you to have my back again. name: Adam Schiff
subject: Final 2022 FEC deadline
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
| I know you are tired of hearing about fundraising deadlines — believe me, I’m tired of thinking about them — but we are so close to the final FEC deadline of the year. We can’t let up now.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=1507%2E5257348%2Em441m9)
Derek,
I know you are tired of hearing about fundraising deadlines — believe me, I’m tired of _thinking_ about them — but we are so close to the final FEC deadline of the year. We can’t let up now.
Saturday is the cutoff for receiving all campaign contributions included in our Q4 Federal Election Commission report.
Republican donors and campaign strategists will funnel resources to wherever they see Democrats’ grassroots energy lagging in order to shore up their gerrymandered House majority.
This team was responsible for defending virtually every Democratic House incumbent, and Republicans are scared their majority isn’t going to last. Kevin McCarthy is contorting himself to meet every twisted demand of the GOP’s unhinged far-right fringe. We gave him no margin for error, and he is already caving in to the forces of conspiracy, bigotry, and demagoguery from within his own caucus and at Mar-a-Lago.
Derek, you turned back the so-called “red wave,” and now we need to close the final FEC deadline of the year with momentum — so we can build up our campaign infrastructure, hold the White House for four more years, and make the GOP House majority the shortest in history.
Republicans have billionaires and corporate special interests on their side. We have the people. And when we come together, we are more powerful than they could ever imagine.
**[Derek, please help us post a strong final 2022 FEC report by adding $10 of support or whatever you can spare before our FEC deadline. Our midterm success came thanks to this grassroots team, and the outcome of the next election depends on your support once again.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=dec2022_abs_em.XWEzUA&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20221227_PM2_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=4&akid=1507%2E5257348%2Em441m9)**

clean_body: | I know you are tired of hearing about fundraising deadlines — believe me, I’m tired of thinking about them — but we are so close to the final FEC deadline of the year. We can’t let up now. Derek, I know you are tired of hearing about fundraising deadlines — believe me, I’m tired of thinking about them — but we are so close to the final FEC deadline of the year. We can’t let up now. Saturday is the cutoff for receiving all campaign contributions included in our Q4 Federal Election Commission report. Republican donors and campaign strategists will funnel resources to wherever they see Democrats’ grassroots energy lagging in order to shore up their gerrymandered House majority. This team was responsible for defending virtually every Democratic House incumbent, and Republicans are scared their majority isn’t going to last. Kevin McCarthy is contorting himself to meet every twisted demand of the GOP’s unhinged far-right fringe. We gave him no margin for error, and he is already caving in to the forces of conspiracy, bigotry, and demagoguery from within his own caucus and at Mar-a-Lago. Derek, you turned back the so-called “red wave,” and now we need to close the final FEC deadline of the year with momentum — so we can build up our campaign infrastructure, hold the White House for four more years, and make the GOP House majority the shortest in history. Republicans have billionaires and corporate special interests on their side. We have the people. And when we come together, we are more powerful than they could ever imagine. name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: If Republicans actually cherished these things, they wouldn’t vote the way they do
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
The only party that is actually delivering on the values of freedom, family, and faith is the Democrats.
#
Peter,
Yesterday, Republicans tweeted about the things they supposedly ‘cherish’ during the holiday season:
[](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/25395?refcode=em20221227-1993&t=1&akid=1993%2E420207%2EBMOhNu)
Don’t be fooled, Peter — no matter what they say, Republicans are actively working against these things they supposedly cherish. The GOP spent “this time of year”:
❌ Robbing working families of relief by blocking the expanded Child Tax Credit
❌ Voting against marriage equality
❌ Stripping reproductive freedom
If they’re looking for three words that would suit their agenda better, I have a few:**fear, fraud, and fanaticism.**
**When the GOP takes control of the House of Representatives in a week, they’re going to do everything they can to push legislation that actively works against freedom, faith, and families.** [**Can you help us build the party that will fight back against GOP attacks on our rights by donating $3 today?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/25395?refcode=em20221227-1993&t=2&akid=1993%2E420207%2EBMOhNu)
**[Contribute](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/25395?refcode=em20221227-1993&t=21&akid=1993%2E420207%2EBMOhNu)**
Peter, no matter what the GOP claims, the _only_ party that is actually delivering on the values of freedom, family, and faith is **the Democrats.**
**Democrats are fighting for _freedom_ :** the freedom to vote, the freedom to make choices about our own bodies, the freedom that economic security through good jobs and good health care gives people.
**Democrats are working on legislation that protects _families_ :** from fighting to keep families together at the border, to making sure that interracial and LGBTQIA+ couples can thrive with their families, and investing in families through policies like the Child Tax Credit and paid leave.
**And Democrats are keeping the _faith_ :** faith in this country and our democracy, the faith in each of us having opportunity regardless of where we were born, what our zip code is, and more.
[**With Republicans taking the House, it’s so important that Democrats go on the offensive so we can continue to fight for faith, freedom, and families. Can you donate $3 today to help build our progressive movement so we can fight back against whatever the Republicans throw at us?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/25395?refcode=em20221227-1993&t=22&akid=1993%2E420207%2EBMOhNu)
In solidarity,
Pramila Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20221227-1993-footer&t=23&refcode2=1993_420207_BMOhNu&akid=1993%2E420207%2EBMOhNu)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

body:

---

clean_body: Saturday’s fundraising deadline is no joke. Hitting this goal will help Democrats make the investments we need to win in 2023 and beyond. I’m calling on you: | | Derek, I’ve been in politics for a long time, and I’ll tell you one thing: Democrats defied the odds in 2022. Grassroots donors dug deep to support Democrats nationwide, and it paid off. Now, my friends at the DNC have just four days to hit their goal, and -- dangit! -- they’re falling behind on their fundraising. Grassroots donations had tremendous power in this year’s elections, and it’d mean a lot if you made your first contribution of 2022. So, I’m humbly asking: Will you rush $7 to the DNC before their fundraising deadline on Saturday? Saturday’s fundraising deadline is no joke, Derek. Hitting this goal will help Democrats make the investments we need to win in 2023 and beyond. Donald Trump has already announced he’s running for president again -- and we can expect a whole slew of extreme MAGA Republicans to jump into the race to take back the White House. We need to fight back as early as possible, and that starts with closing this December fundraising gap. I’ve seen this team do the impossible before, so I know what you’re capable of accomplishing when we stick together. Let’s get to it, James James Carville Manage how often you receive DNC emails, . | | You won’t believe who teamed up in the fight against GOP-led voter suppression: **Michelle Obama and Stacey Abrams!** They’re doubling their power to _urge_ – together – that every single person who cares about our right to vote should join this fight. body:

| | There’s no such thing as an off-year when it comes to winning statehouses. Our work today creates a huge impact on future elections, so here’s what I’m writing to remind you: We’ve got our work cut out for us, but I know the power of this team. Once I am inaugurated as the 47th President of the United States, I will sign an executive order banning any federal department or agency from colluding with any organization, business, or person to censor, limit, categorize, or impede the lawful speech of American citizens. I will then ban federal money from being used to label domestic speech as ‘mis-‘ or ‘dis-information.’ And I will begin the process of identifying and firing every federal bureaucrat who has engaged in domestic censorship — directly or indirectly — whether they are the Department of Homeland Security, the Department of Health and Human Services, the FBI, or the DOJ, no matter who they are. I promise to ALWAYS do whatever it takes to PROTECT YOUR FREEDOM OF SPEECH, Friend. Unlike the Democrats, who only want to SILENCE YOU. With your help, we will WIN in 2024 and take back the White House. I urgently need YOU to stop whatever you’re doing and watch my video. HURRY. My team will send me a list of Patriots who took action and watched my video. Will YOUR name be on it? Thank you, Donald J. name: Your America
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7690%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=Mlod2WkUzPc07FGxcoyyPg&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c99767%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cy292r%2bIEWVUOEoFq0c%2bWA&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c99768%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=w%2f%2bb6bC7toow641%2baxo4QA&sysid=1)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c99768%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=w%2f%2bb6bC7toow641%2baxo4QA&sysid=1)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7690%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=Mlod2WkUzPc07FGxcoyyPg&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7690%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=Mlod2WkUzPc07FGxcoyyPg&sysid=1)

name: Pro Life Update
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:

name: Liz Wester
subject: What to expect in 2023
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
President Obama said we can’t wait until the next census to pay attention to redistricting again.
|
---

[**MAKE A DONATION TO ALL ON THE LINE >>**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/56495203/385183196/1275189963?refcode=20221228_AOTL_F_eoy1_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRlN2RjYTJiLWE3ODYtZWQxMS05ZDdhLTAwMGQzYTllYjkxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=oNYfM86V_Wh0VDyZJ1m5_hQfJ97P2j1eADrVYMP_nQ8=)
Team -- President Obama reached out to ask for your support in this next phase of redistricting. I wanted to give you some context on what to expect in 2023.

>> AOTL movement advocating for redistricting reforms
>> SCOTUS decisions on redistricting cases like _Moore v. Harper_
>> TBD number of states redrawing maps (we know North Carolina will!)

President Obama was right -- a majority of Americans cast ballots with fair maps this year and that’s reason to celebrate. But the states where the maps have been challenged as race-based or partisan gerrymanders account for a quarter of congressional districts.

**[We set an end-of-year goal to raise $23,000. name: American Update
subject: Before they’re gone
body:
World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0243%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=KzAAQWKO24FtVvBfVOngqw&sysid=1)
| | | This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c44863%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fGK1yDG5xvJ3zg5f67568A&sysid=1)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. But today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive. As we lose more and more of these courageous soldiers, we also lose the living memories they carry. But we must preserve the lessons learned from this world war.
---
| | That’s why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled [“](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c44864%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2qphhbOkO6mRJGLk2C5C1A&sysid=1)**[The Second World Wars.”](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c44875%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=UT2OaDpHT4uCHjArovfmMw&sysid=1) **And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian **Victor Davis Hanson** of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies’ victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c44876%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=UWMhlzqKqFNu%2bnonGHYUjw&sysid=1)
---
| | Simply use this secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD today: _[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c44877%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Y9uAhtQQlD%2fJpzDD2ejjBg&sysid=1)_ Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

name: American Defense News
subject: Shepherd - Father - King
body:
While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story—espe
| | | This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zg315m3v4n9lh6iab03969flhgp1ve2l9009qkr8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9j60or2cjh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend, While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story—especially the tragedies that befall his family and his beautiful turn to repentance. In fact, at its heart, the story of David is about fathers and sons.

King David’s momentous story provides profound insights into many of life’s most important questions, including: What are my responsibilities to God? What do I owe my fellow man? How do I lead my family? How do I turn away from sin? What is the best way to lead others?

Taught by Hillsdale College Professor of English Justin Jackson, **“The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King”** examines the Old Testament books of First and Second Samuel. This eight-lesson course explores David’s character and the consequences of his choices on his family and the people of Israel.
---
| | **This is why we’ve produced our online course, “The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King,” which is now available on DVD. And you can reserve your copy using this secure link:**

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zp564pg7kj1ireo5f2j3l8thfu8hg67s3rddgue0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9j60or2cjh2bs)** By viewing the course, you’ll learn more about the nature of God, family, leadership, sin, and repentance; in short, you’ll learn more about what truly matters in life. **I hope you’ll reserve your DVD today and share its abiding lessons with your family and friends. The DVD is perfect for a Bible study or homeschool curriculum.**
---
| [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2znl3p3vv583qqcm7a66akhef1h0050gpi3ssr7bo_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9j60or2cjh2bs)
---
| | Let’s learn what truly matters in life by studying **“The David Story.”**

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

**P.S.** If you’d like to secure a DVD box set of **“The David Story”** while they’re available, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more in support of reaching and teaching millions on behalf of liberty.

Reserve your DVD box set using the secure link below:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zhp35f9j4r40f16at60po41e71021sikfbcj0ajg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9j60or2cjh2bs)**
---

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Will you help defend President Trump?
body:
Dear Peter,

President Trump spent four years fighting to drain the swamp, build the wall, and put America First.

**President Trump was really fighting for you and me.**

And because President Trump opposed the D.C. swamp and globalist establishment, the regime that looted our country, drove the nation $31 trillion in debt and dissolved our borders set about trying to destroy him.

For years, Donald Trump faced illegal, unconstitutional, and criminal witch hunts.

Trump withstood the daily onslaught from Russia, Russia, Russia hoax, two phony impeachments, and fake news media lies.

**Now Joe Biden and the Democrats are scheming to jail Donald Trump on the same charges James Comey gave Hillary Clinton a pass on.**

**President Trump needs America First fighters to rally in his corner.**

**[Will you help defend President Trump by chipping in a contribution so I can reach my $75,000 goal before the December 31 deadline](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61318319:sMR2fuD-N:m:1:2365227053:DA4FA139736E862944C81C7599C9BB54:r)?**

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61318319:sMR2fuD-N:m:1:2365227053:DA4FA139736E862944C81C7599C9BB54:r)
# _[SUPPORTER RECORD EMERGENCY DEADLINE: DEFEND TRUMP]()_
SUPPORTER: **[Peter]()**
DONATION STATUS: **PENDING**
DEADLINE: **[MIDNIGHT DECEMBER 31]()**
SUGGESTED CONTRIBUTION: **$20.24**
**[CONTRIBUTE NOW >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61318319:sMR2fuD-N:m:1:2365227053:DA4FA139736E862944C81C7599C9BB54:r)**
**This is about RIGGING the 2024 election and RIPPING Donald Trump 's name off the ballot.**

_The previous coup attempts against Trump failed._

But now the left is getting desperate and throwing everything, including the kitchen sink, at Trump.

Attorney General Merrick Garland ordered a Stasi-style raid and ransacking Donald Trump's home at Mar-a-Lago.

Democrats illegally obtained Donald Trump's tax returns and released them publicly.

**And now Democrats introduced legislation inspired by a George Soros-funded lawsuit to ban Donald Trump from holding elected office again.**

Donald Trump stood up for the forgotten men and women of America.

And now the America First movement needs to defend President Trump.

To do that, I must raise $75,000 by the December 31 deadline.

**[If you want to help me defend President Trump, please chip in a contribution before the deadline expires](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61318319:sMR2fuD-N:m:1:2365227053:DA4FA139736E862944C81C7599C9BB54:r).** [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61318319:sMR2fuD-N:m:1:2365227053:DA4FA139736E862944C81C7599C9BB54:r) **[DEFEND TRUMP - DONATE $20.24 TODAY](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61318319:sMR2fuD-N:m:1:2365227053:DA4FA139736E862944C81C7599C9BB54:r)** It's not really Donald Trump the regime hates.

**_It 's you._**

Donald Trump is just in the way.

That's why it's critical America First fighters defend President Trump.

Come January, I plan to go on offense.

**Defund the witch hunt. Impeach Merrick Garland. Impeach Joe Biden.**

name: American Action News
subject: You may not know the full story
body:
While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story
| | This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2c0hu34uvpqoge5vikfjon5f3euk4mhlepqvq10_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9j64ob6cdh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend, While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story—especially the tragedies that befall his family and his beautiful turn to repentance. In fact, at its heart, the story of David is about fathers and sons.

King David’s momentous story provides profound insights into many of life’s most important questions, including: What are my responsibilities to God? What do I owe my fellow man? How do I lead my family? How do I turn away from sin? What is the best way to lead others?

Taught by Hillsdale College Professor of English Justin Jackson, **“The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King”** examines the Old Testament books of First and Second Samuel. This eight-lesson course explores David’s character and the consequences of his choices on his family and the people of Israel.
---
| | **This is why we’ve produced our online course, “The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King,” which is now available on DVD. And you can reserve your copy using this secure link:**

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2o46f9i4j7ip5h8812qk97m86kcnksivv35v2ho_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9j64ob6cdh2bs)** By viewing the course, you’ll learn more about the nature of God, family, leadership, sin, and repentance; in short, you’ll learn more about what truly matters in life. **I hope you’ll reserve your DVD today and share its abiding lessons with your family and friends. The DVD is perfect for a Bible study or homeschool curriculum.**
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zaanr7uicviuvnq624g33ilj00hk9lqhcvrrhfqg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9j64ob6cdh2bs)
---
| | Let’s learn what truly matters in life by studying **“The David Story.”**

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

**P.S.** If you’d like to secure a DVD box set of **“The David Story”** while they’re available, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more in support of reaching and teaching millions on behalf of liberty.

Reserve your DVD box set using the secure link below:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcht0vpft2j0n6pgoc77ui58ulc59iu5buitopag_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9j64ob6cdh2bs)**
---

subject: I have an urgent message for you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY AUGUST PFLUGER FOR CONGRESS
body:
Peter, this is former F-22 Raptor fighter pilot and combat Veteran, August Pfluger. **I have an urgent message that I need you to see.**
Democrats and the D.C. elites think that people like you and me don't amount to anything. They use all of their time in Washington to make themselves rich, while the average American is stuck footing the bill.
I've spent multiple combat tours in Iraq and Syria, fighting radical jihadists.
When I joined the U.S. Air Force, I took an oath to defend America.
Now, I plan on keeping my promise to defend our country in Congress.
I'll get right to the point: [**I'm humbly asking if you could give just $25 to help me keep the radical left from taking back the House for good!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62130857:6cREqIGNI:m:1:3331421248:3A1D640339A9010ACECDDE182827CEFF:r)

[**CHIP IN $25 >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62130857:6cREqIGNI:m:1:3331421248:3A1D640339A9010ACECDDE182827CEFF:r)
---

I'm not the kind of person who usually asks like this, but we can't afford to give up any ground. [**Can I count on you to join me in this critical mission?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62130857:6cREqIGNI:m:1:3331421248:3A1D640339A9010ACECDDE182827CEFF:r)
[**YES, COUNT ME IN **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62130857:6cREqIGNI:m:1:3331421248:3A1D640339A9010ACECDDE182827CEFF:r)

Thank you,

Col. August Pfluger, USAF

name: ICYMI News
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
But today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive.
| | | This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zrmqvha14tvc34h7idgau5e2c4sg6j3rpau4stuo_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9j66o36cth2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. But today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive. As we lose more and more of these courageous soldiers, we also lose the living memories they carry. But we must preserve the lessons learned from this world war.
---
| | That’s why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled [“](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zl4449lqu8qv5c4sr4cieagcpkqfmklfnflhf0j0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9j66o36cth2bs)**[The Second World Wars.”](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zn7d6oqjb3pke2hiig7ph1ff8j1coobmpkl4r1ao_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9j66o36cth2bs) **And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian **Victor Davis Hanson** of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies’ victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zjj5csjun0nn70jkq5mht53rvseum60lbdrdd6q8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9j66o36cth2bs)
---
| | Simply use this secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD today: _[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zal8vjqc5vhe89cm9b2886fl8q34d9laon5gd1eg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9j66o36cth2bs)_ Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

name: ConservativeFWD on behalf of Hillsdale College
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
That’s why I hope you’ll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis
[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zt8c93rkdod5pdb62rou90pnc69cklq40q0fe470_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t56ej3fctmekp76t1heipnacpne4pqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65sjmc5r65d3562p71d5m63jrdc73mtineoj4c6q66p34shrj5dj5ehgb6cj6c5jjfkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1p74phksapm6ptmcdj33c5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash1k8gn48n24hhmeoj2cphm0pj5c8iv0)

*Sponsored Message*
| | | [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zgmbevpku8u339m2abee9gov8r6750fqkpa9v3fo_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9j66o36clh2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z93vf8gd21f8rvo2v68k941v5d25gkc6qua46q9o_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9j66o36clh2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zgto6j8m20eaq6vv22047mb0kqhpigf4fh11gf78_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9j66o36clh2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zutjtuor6l0ckdldga6onbbu6hhlje6useepe4c0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9j66o36clh2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

name: American Briefing
subject: Shepherd - Father - King
body:
While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story—espe
| | This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z81v8qgn3918858r4ldpva3osirdm6mqoki0d0oo_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9j6eo74c3h2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend, While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story—especially the tragedies that befall his family and his beautiful turn to repentance. In fact, at its heart, the story of David is about fathers and sons.

King David’s momentous story provides profound insights into many of life’s most important questions, including: What are my responsibilities to God? What do I owe my fellow man? How do I lead my family? How do I turn away from sin? What is the best way to lead others?

Taught by Hillsdale College Professor of English Justin Jackson, **“The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King”** examines the Old Testament books of First and Second Samuel. This eight-lesson course explores David’s character and the consequences of his choices on his family and the people of Israel.
---
| | **This is why we’ve produced our online course, “The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King,” which is now available on DVD. And you can reserve your copy using this secure link:**

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2za8s8bvqhrtedih5h2nrf7bn2qulu0tifo3nh5kg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9j6eo74c3h2bs)** By viewing the course, you’ll learn more about the nature of God, family, leadership, sin, and repentance; in short, you’ll learn more about what truly matters in life. **I hope you’ll reserve your DVD today and share its abiding lessons with your family and friends. The DVD is perfect for a Bible study or homeschool curriculum.**
---
| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zt9b20n11trbflt8u0kuf9rofq9k3a5pe15d1fo8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9j6eo74c3h2bs)
---
| | Let’s learn what truly matters in life by studying **“The David Story.”**

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

**P.S.** If you’d like to secure a DVD box set of **“The David Story”** while they’re available, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more in support of reaching and teaching millions on behalf of liberty.

Reserve your DVD box set using the secure link below:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zdmljqphhub6922vbf8rujerhq17vbnbb6fual98_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9j6eo74c3h2bs)**
---

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: I Owe This Media Outlet A VERY Big Thank you!
body:
Thank You Charisma Magazine! Yesterday, the Rolling Stone (who should stick to reporting on music rather than politics & religion) released an extrem
| | |
---
## Thank You Charisma Magazine!
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16515298.9544.1.7dcfeb0b8f30fe47ac7ed83290cba112)
---
Yesterday, the [Rolling Stone](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16515298.9545.1.d1b1c7ac6a9bceb19a855e6ff9b15339) (**who should stick to reporting on music rather than politics & religion**) released an _extremely biased_ featured story on me and the newly formed [Pastors For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16515298.9546.1.6749ca485697ffc3e79ad2a03c8f58e4) organization.
Shortly after, [Charisma Magazine](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16515298.9547.1.4b89dd44138c124f8d4d7634fe73c8cf) released an article that was much more friendly and way less biased.
I want to thank **Steve Strang** and [Charisma Magazine](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16515298.9548.1.dbe7c6d98bf625de09dcd1b85b0f2ec7) for their professionalism in the midst of such a corrupt media system that is currently plaguing our nation.
You can read the Charisma story by clicking here: [www.charismanews.com/us/91073-new-pastors-for-trump-group-hopes-to-reignite-2016-fire](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16515298.9549.1.920b980553bb8267121a4852030e749f)
Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer
Follow me on [TruthSocial](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16515298.9550.1.ee00c61e6be0dd2d966cd8b4d0571080), [Facebook](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16515298.9551.1.8ab3533ac635c0196e5a97fcf358d4a1), [Instagram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16515298.9552.1.f5842c7ae5f194491bcd8a37e9c114e2), [Twitter](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16515298.9553.1.ce396317041d7af1c09c17639f8ca477), [Telegram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16515298.9554.1.e12a1912f4c03b8884037ace3e258560) & [YouTube](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16515298.9555.1.8369b5bbc29f77e39af1b61149b812d7)).
[www.jacksonlahmeyer.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16515298.9556.1.85f0af76bb6cd7c4772061fff76b8a6e)
| | [ Charisma Article On Pastors For Trump ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16515298.9557.1.aa3cbf491102158e3128765cf3fdd618)
---
---
## Rolling Stone Just Came After Me
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16515298.9558.1.06d5c4495ad5561986652fb7c445d333)
---
The [Rolling Stone](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16515298.9559.1.49380a22a411108b016320c1c428c00d) released a VERY _vicious_ and _unfair_ hit piece on me and the newly formed [Pastors For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16515298.9560.1.68c5acadd1b8b4d96017332348c9f897) organization.
Why did the [Rolling Stone](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16515298.9561.1.618ed4652972227ad2c2fa54feb3a3fc) do a feature story on me and [Pastors For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16515298.9562.1.6871f0c0e69ac04157887af03c98789e)?
They know what we know. **If Pastors rally for President Trump then the largest voting bloc in America** (the Christian vote) **will rally behind President Trump and he will defeat the Democrat nominee in 2024 for the Presidency of the United States.**
Therefore, _radical left-wing pseudo-news outlets_ like the [Rolling Stone](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16515298.9563.1.4579275075a10d7512b55189b10e2880) will continue coming after me and [Pastors for Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16515298.9564.1.ad6a1e54a7a08c8c6b50e80d21d84f73) to try and stop the incredible momentum we have right now.
Here is what I know: **it will backfire on them**.
In 2021, the [Washington Post](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16515298.9565.1.db81f93fbc7ff3410c008941c6a9b8f8) (which is TOTAL trash) did a hit piece on me for signing [COVID19 religious exemptions](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16515298.9566.1.15f517f32f8de99891122236802503a4) as the Pastor of [Sheridan.Church](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16515298.9567.1.625979881da68ec3d044148660cb1a4e) in Tulsa, OK.
That hit piece actually caused HUGE traffic to flood my website, [www.jacksonlahmeyer.com/nomandate](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16515298.9568.1.ea4492744908fafaa1977ebe011a76d6), and propelled me to signing now over 60,000 [COVID19 religious exemption forms](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16515298.9569.1.4bb2c88c928fa4ea3e9963d501fc1f5e) for Americans all across the country saving thousands of jobs.
If the [Washington Post](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16515298.9570.1.a9743ea195fa705295b61d80d0b5dc4e) (which is TOTAL trash once again) would not have written a hit piece on me then I would have never been in a position to help over 60,000 Americans.
It reminds me of what Joseph said to his brothers in _Genesis 50:20_ , **"You intended to harm me, but God intended it for good to accomplish what is now being done, the saving of many lives."**
| | [ Rolling Stone Hit Piece On Lahmeyer ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16515298.9571.1.cca4c59d47d4a0f1e27d86c7759aba3b)
---
---
## This Will Cause Some Controversy...
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16515298.9572.1.0ed0faab1bc90ae1248fa27b017c6634)
---
Today, the [Gateway Pundit](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16515298.9573.1.407955f9af1a067b66610368112defaf) published my Op-Ed on why I refuse to abandon **President Trump** as a Christian leader even though other Christian leaders are doing so.
In this Op-Ed, I make the case of _why_ Christians in America should support **Donald Trump** for the Presidency in 2024.
You can read the Op-Ed by visiting: [https://www.thegatewaypundit.com/2022/12/christian-leaders-abandoned-trump-refuse/](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16515298.9574.1.829611244f764ce019e8d293b688b105)
| | [ Jackson Lahmeyer's Op-Ed ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16515298.9575.1.22ad21cdecd79b37d652a3cb5c0a291c)
---
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16515298.9576.1.1715c3c6ca3c198ee02b6a2f4430f763)
---
Last week, **President Donald Trump** sent me a message of thanks over the newly formed [Pastors For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16515298.9577.1.118388641f5099e746bae5696925d23e) organization that he also recently shared about on **TruthSocial**. You can read the Pastors For Trump full **[PRESS RELEASE](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16515298.9578.1.a6e60056b82aa5fc7634b46618189da8)** here: [Pastors For Trump Press Release](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16515298.9579.1.2996d0d9da061971e3df5c9735e31f80) We are off to a TREMENDOUS start and with **President Trump's** share, our numbers are highly increasing. Many media outlets have reported on the formation of the Coalition such as **Newsweek** , **Rolling Stone** , **One America News Network** , **Real America's Voice** , **Gateway Pundit** , **Right Wing Watch** , **Baptist News Global** and others. This coalition is made up of **Pastors & Ministry Leaders** from different denominations across all 50 states having the common ground of wanting to **Make America Great Again by Making America Godly Again**. [Pastors For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16515298.9580.1.b854c180827f459876eaf4a6260a748b) is NOT just limited to **Pastors/Ministry Leaders** but is for _every_ believer in America. There will be _monthly Prayer Calls_ starting in January that will host _prominent_ leaders within the America First movement who will give updates of what is taking place within our nation from their unique vantage point. I want to encourage you to visit [www.pastors4trump.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16515298.9581.1.6af79c762aba8c7f3472e889300b1b22) today and register to join in on the Prayer Calls so you can be informed as well as a participant in praying for our country. **Dr. Billy Graham** once said, _"For America to get back on its' feet, the people of God must first get down on their knees and pray."_ Not only should you register to join the monthly Prayer Calls and receive updates from prominent America First leaders, but you should also send the [www.pastors4trump.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16515298.9582.1.9b81850a82c90d39f654fee0aa2d3091) link to your Pastor/Ministry Leader and encourage him/her to join the coalition with many other Pastor/Ministry Leaders throughout the country. Every Pastor/Ministry Leader will remain confidential, and their identity will not be released to the public unless they are in the role of a State/Regional Director. Pastors/Ministry Leaders that join the coalition will receive opportunities to meet (in-person) many of the America First leaders through upcoming rallies and events as well as have their voice heard by giving input on what issues should be presented to **President Trump** by the [Pastors For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16515298.9583.1.9507cda1ee90fb52aaeec23893f9edf5) coalition. Please go visit [www.Pastors4Trump.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16515298.9584.1.7d7fc264c1259d9e3057478b24e41a08) today and be a part of the effort to **Make America Great Again by Making America Godly Again**.
---
---
## Don't Miss Out!
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16515298.9585.1.197e88b23c4046d8ec3f707c12be6cb7)
---
Right now, **Biblical ILLITERACY** is at an _all-time high_ in America. Fewer than half of all adults can name the four Gospel writers, while 82% of Americans believe that _"God helps those who help themselves"_ is a Bible verse.
In a recent **LifeWay Research** study, the Bible reading habits among church attendees was shocking:
\- 19% read the Bible everyday
\- 26% read the Bible a few times per week
\- 14% read the Bible once a week
\- 22% read the Bible once a month
\- 18% read the Bible rarely or never
In general, American Christians have a poor foundation in the Word of God. This is a major problem and is the reason why I decided to launch [Sheridan Bible College](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16515298.9586.1.352c1e77d88f43a1468d7b954002a77a).
I want to encourage you to consider [Sheridan Bible College](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16515298.9587.1.da81bf009e413d78262c0c7f4071f764) as a means for you to grow in your faith and go from a convert to a true disciple.
[Sheridan Bible College](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16515298.9588.1.41d3bf9a93365274ee6871e392e53374) is a 1 year intensive program consisting of 12 courses divided between 2 semesters. Classes are offered in-person & online.
_"Study to show yourself approved to God, a worker who does not need to be ashamed, rightly dividing the word of truth"_ \- **2 Timothy 2:15**
Enrolling in [Sheridan Bible College](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16515298.9589.1.b4b993a5b0c7c2da251884a5e19dd3be) is not something you will regret. We have intentionally made tuition VERY inexpensive: $300 per semester.
**Fall Semester** :
\- Old Testament Introduction
\- New Testament Introduction
\- Theology of Worship
\- Church History 1
\- Faith & Prayer
\- Spiritual Growth
**Spring Semester** :
\- Christian Theology
\- Pauline Epistles
\- Apologetics
\- Church History 2
\- Leadership & Ethics
\- Evangelism & Outreach
Classes for the Spring 2023 Semester begin January 17. Enroll today at [www.sheridan.church/biblecollege](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16515298.9590.1.6b7b4fc358b292bcec980208721aa5e7)
| | [ Sheridan Bible College ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16515298.9591.1.d62a0d7f71eb44c5ae954f45206aed23)

## Mike Lindell Needs Our Help!
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16515298.9592.1.387f6cb8cf99c454f788f8926716a037)
---
I have been fortunate to develop many great relationships with great America First leaders such as **Mike Lindell**.
It is very important that we continue to support **Mike Lindell** in this battle. name: Deroy Murdock
subject: Learn from Victor Davis Hanson
body:
World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways.
| | This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z30pie27vgjr7hctl7vp8jtj9opqq7jivltro1do_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9j69or4c5h2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. But today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive. As we lose more and more of these courageous soldiers, we also lose the living memories they carry. But we must preserve the lessons learned from this world war.
---
| | That’s why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled [“](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z4pkl9tb0as7hrhft9kg8rmguv0gusbnvc59r5q8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9j69or4c5h2bs)**[The Second World Wars.”](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zv57fuh0jkbgs1sv8kqo0fp7aduol9f71f3voe00_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9j69or4c5h2bs) **And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian **Victor Davis Hanson** of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies’ victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
---
| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z8tmvl32t1u63vd1po0s7uqsj8raap23u4rd83s8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9j69or4c5h2bs)
---

clean_body: World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. | | This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. But today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive. As we lose more and more of these courageous soldiers, we also lose the living memories they carry. But we must preserve the lessons learned from this world war. | | That’s why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian Victor Davis Hanson of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies’ victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. | | | Simply use this secure link to reserve your copy of “The Second World Wars” on DVD today: Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Deroy Murdock, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

body:
In 2020, members of the world’s elite met at the World Economic Forum and launched the Great Reset initiative to transform the world economy. | This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6a2ea43102d2477fa2920be3b03aa654&_e=QdYEDxYk6DrJfsDoqQMc3GHBZT-_HKaubPyYw4AY17mLveTrJm2s2Paw9AWKg15DJ4LXmxYbKqWaSMd8z1u2vLtcTCwXb19Yae4rbmjfQL3wLwtGl9XmAu4aWtxlVkDzNyR6ioKr1Xfi636R39tYMuqos9ke3ZjPSLOWI1FGgQDSyLKLSKhUVzPjloZZE_422IUky1e5kjt02mnJodKIDbk-iyssM4uPfzXL21Yql7BnTE434mOgrhKd9BwuBBsDtQZnLi7-ohzDVaFUPNpdwdjyXI3cbJ7ZJgg7ljX3MyWoXnEGryeWk2tM9gFlisqFaxIFZlvxFY5yvsoAcAX4X_K6YeU75yVuz8QrHxYv5YywGRo1GEycqEgAjUTK3S0b)

| | Dear Fellow American,
Does America need a "Great Reset?"
In 2020, members of the world's elite met at the World Economic Forum and launched the Great Reset initiative to transform the world economy.
As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "we need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, this would have the effect of canceling our American way of life.
A recent Hillsdale College seminar considered the idea of the Great Reset, its ramifications for America, and pro-freedom alternatives.
**This seminar --titled ["The Great Reset?](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6a2ea43102d2477fa2920be3b03aa654&_e=QdYEDxYk6DrJfsDoqQMc3GHBZT-_HKaubPyYw4AY17mLveTrJm2s2Paw9AWKg15DJ4LXmxYbKqWaSMd8z1u2vLtcTCwXb19Yae4rbmjfQL3wLwtGl9XmAu4aWtxlVkDzNyR6ioKr1Xfi636R39tYMuqos9ke3ZjPSLOWI1FGgQDSyLKLSKhUVzPjloZZE_422IUky1e5kjt02mnJodKIDbk-iyssM4uPfzXL21Yql7A9VJMc20uW-OWZC-ulUl4HkI86k1pq5aK6La5-nIfWx-rHT0gcGPohN7h7K-PDHep1wGMUji_KR8rwq-1dGd4ttJsp8pUJUNIjwxzT9ncGtXVrvPGkLszD1SEfHJR4eW-wgtXFmBf5oJuzTYP0HY42)****["](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6a2ea43102d2477fa2920be3b03aa654&_e=QdYEDxYk6DrJfsDoqQMc3GHBZT-_HKaubPyYw4AY17mLveTrJm2s2Paw9AWKg15DJ4LXmxYbKqWaSMd8z1u2vLtcTCwXb19Yae4rbmjfQL3wLwtGl9XmAu4aWtxlVkDzNyR6ioKr1Xfi636R39tYMuqos9ke3ZjPSLOWI1FGgQDSyLKLSKhUVzPjloZZE_422IUky1e5kjt02mnJodKIDbk-iyssM4uPfzXL21Yql7Cch8HSjfy2ysBUI2MDw6qAIt7TcfjFXmFidiC2Pnrmc__ld6BZV-0Vi-BQFXLjac7RFJWovu1nI70JcXLaZk8XVnxjPZPKCsD0ZxiCmnpB1rE42oCWqu_CDnAGrF6MkpYDtR991vzcIaqKwRk5X8mW) --is now available as a free online video series.**

* The origins and leaders of the Great Reset
* How the ideology of "woke capitalism" is infiltrating large corporations
* The connection between a cashless society and the Great Reset
* What "environmental justice" has to do with the Great Reset
* The Great Reset from China's perspective
* Alternatives to the Great Reset

The fight for fair maps has not ended.
|

Friend,

I want to take a moment to appreciate where we are and how far we’ve come. This movement has made real progress -- 75% of the congressional maps are considered fair.

**[But our work isn’t over.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/56509095/385234585/742344613?refcode=20221228_AOTL_P_EHH_C1_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNmZjg4MGIyLWM4ODYtZWQxMS05ZDdhLTAwMGQzYTllYjkxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=MvIVW_wrSDoHUFZ-12grTRIqFa3YGK6UHZuiSRt3WOw=)**

We’re going into 2023 with a number of ongoing challenges. A quarter of our states have congressional maps that are still drawn unfairly. The Supreme Court has refused to follow Voting Rights Act precedent and as a result elections in some states were run in 2022 using racially gerrymandered maps. Some of those fair maps we achieved will be under assault as early as next year.

**[It’s not over.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/56509097/385234593/742344613?refcode=20221228_AOTL_P_EHH_C1_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNmZjg4MGIyLWM4ODYtZWQxMS05ZDdhLTAwMGQzYTllYjkxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=MvIVW_wrSDoHUFZ-12grTRIqFa3YGK6UHZuiSRt3WOw=)**

**[It’s up to us to not only protect the progress we have made but also to build on it for future generations -- and we are counting on your support to continue that work. Will you make an end-of-year donation to All On The Line?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/56509100/385234601/742344613?refcode=20221228_AOTL_P_EHH_C1_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNmZjg4MGIyLWM4ODYtZWQxMS05ZDdhLTAwMGQzYTllYjkxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=MvIVW_wrSDoHUFZ-12grTRIqFa3YGK6UHZuiSRt3WOw=)**

[DONATE $250](https://click.everyaction.com/k/56509126/385234655/742344613?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=20221228_AOTL_P_EHH_C1_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNmZjg4MGIyLWM4ODYtZWQxMS05ZDdhLTAwMGQzYTllYjkxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=MvIVW_wrSDoHUFZ-12grTRIqFa3YGK6UHZuiSRt3WOw=) | [Another Amount](https://click.everyaction.com/k/56509146/385234666/742344613?refcode=20221228_AOTL_P_EHH_C1_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNmZjg4MGIyLWM4ODYtZWQxMS05ZDdhLTAwMGQzYTllYjkxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=MvIVW_wrSDoHUFZ-12grTRIqFa3YGK6UHZuiSRt3WOw=)
The path to progress is not a straight one. We have had success. We will face challenges. We must play the long game and stay committed to the fight for a more fair democracy.

In 2023, we will be focusing on preventing new gerrymandering of recently drawn fair maps through potential redraws in states like North Carolina, we will be advocating for further redistricting reforms, we will support voters who challenge gerrymandered maps in court, and we are prepared to defend against future attacks on our democracy. Every dollar counts in ensuring we have the resources to safeguard our democracy -- because that democracy is worth fighting for.

**[Donate to give All On The Line the boost into action for 2023 and beyond.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/56509168/385234690/742344613?refcode=20221228_AOTL_P_EHH_C1_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNmZjg4MGIyLWM4ODYtZWQxMS05ZDdhLTAwMGQzYTllYjkxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=MvIVW_wrSDoHUFZ-12grTRIqFa3YGK6UHZuiSRt3WOw=)**

Remember, it’s not over. We can’t rest on our recent victories -- we must take action and stay focused on what we need to overcome the challenges ahead of us. **It’s up to _us_ to defend our own democracy.** That is why it’s essential that we recommit ourselves to this mission and continue the fight for our beloved nation.

In solidarity,
Eric H. Holder, Jr.

**_All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Support our work to end gerrymandering._**

This movement has made real progress -- 75% of the congressional maps are considered fair. = We’re going into 2023 with a number of ongoing challenges. A quarter of our states have congressional maps that are still drawn unfairly. The Supreme Court has refused to follow Voting Rights Act precedent and as a result elections in some states were run in 2022 using racially gerrymandered maps. Some of those fair maps we achieved will be under assault as early as next year. = = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = The path to progress is not a straight one. We have had success. We will face challenges. We must play the long game and stay committed to the fight for a more fair democracy. In 2023, we will be focusing on preventing new gerrymandering of recently drawn fair maps through potential redraws in states like North Carolina, we will be advocating for further redistricting reforms, we will support voters who challenge gerrymandered maps in court, and we are prepared to defend against future attacks on our democracy. Every dollar counts in ensuring we have the resources to safeguard our democracy -- because that democracy is worth fighting for. = Remember, it’s not over. We can’t rest on our recent victories -- we must take action and stay focused on what we need to overcome the challenges ahead of us. It’s up to us to defend our own democracy. That is why it’s essential that we recommit ourselves to this mission and continue the fight for our beloved nation. In solidarity, Eric H. Holder, Jr. All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Support our work to end gerrymandering. TextFAIR to 88228 to receive recurring updates from AOTL by automated text message. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. and | = | PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND. Contributions or gifts to The National Redistricting Action Fund are not tax deductible. 700 13th Street NW, Suite 600, Washington, D.C. 20005 This email was sent to:dpwillis67@gmail.com

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Greg Abbott packed poor, desperate migrant children in t-shirts onto buses, sending them on an overnight journey to be dumped in front of the Vice President's home in Washington, D.C. in dangerously frigid temperatures. Immigrants like these need mercy and support from all of us this holiday season.
body:
Unconscionable.
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T40076b3b-6f95-4053-86bc-f75fdee0144c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, Unconscionable. Inexcusable. Evil. _Texas Governor Greg Abbott likes to call himself a Christian, he's closer to a devil. _ This morally scarred misanthrope, like many of his Republican brethren, likes to make a good show of Jesus' being his Savior. Yet, he apparently never read The Parable of the Good Samaritan, where his God commands Abbott to take care of those he finds penniless, harmed, lost and/or in need of sanctuary on the road. **_Abbott, being not simply a hypocrite, but a simmering, toxic ghoul, thrust poor, unsuspecting migrant children in t-shirts onto buses, sending them on an overnight journey to be dumped in front of the Vice President's home in Washington, D.C. in dangerously frigid temperatures. _** [**_Will you join us in helping those in need by giving $5, $10, $25, or whatever you can afford to the NILC, who specifically help low-income immigrants and their families._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T24659d93-a998-4cd9-bb2a-a6eff7f5107e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _On Christmas, Ya know, as his Savior would've done._
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td5990a6a-9bfa-4b72-858d-9af94703de4e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | No matter one's religion, or whether they practice any, _**it only takes knowing right from wrong and common decency to do the opposite of Abbott. To not purposely dump kids into the streets in temperatures that cause frostbite to exposed skin in minutes. **As the National Immigration Law Center (NILC) tweeted, "seeking asylum is a human right--regardless of who you are and where you're from."_ Damn right. [**_Let's be better--Far Better--than human oil-spill Abbott this holiday season. In the emergency situation he created, will you join us in helping those in need by giving $5, $10, $25, or whatever you can afford to the NILC, who specifically help low-income immigrants and their families._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tee6851f1-0c8e-45c9-ab7f-df6b7c700b80/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for your kindness, Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Abbott, being not simply a hypocrite, but a simmering, toxic ghoul, thrust poor, unsuspecting migrant children in t-shirts onto buses, sending them on an overnight journey to be dumped in front of the Vice President's home in Washington, D.C. in dangerously frigid temperatures. name: Full Mag News
subject: Lincoln's secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. | | | This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=99cfd6cb3148497e937c81d8778dda01&_e=kX4_Rq8Y4n3S6zjuop5nhDK-f6X3VxGhkPQpf_tsTOalsT7P-b1vefMPG7lWx8VCifq_bGts2bqHV8pgeBJBn_gHN9RVbJxeDmK_OvrC78DS372pCIW9R_2NmtAr9EC9b_UQFUYDBjpYZMO-9MyePEycqjFMnBC1UZYDw4pqBuW-gbybeFfDRZy2oQTmbpGcv3T7JzPIIr7VQcATPvYUU4k8TvNIR-IrnpGyOrJrzBbEe7u69NpnwzjmO0Fy0zXG2SJOoO8MrE6UulujonySgpmmknII1ueZG5c6Ff8Xj70kZTxazq56lONZ6iFtfL29ha5zcTdVcM4o79_9HQ_eOCRnMDf_iZRpu0aDjv4D45O6-MtdBw-cmdWlQlZFUye7LUrbWJ94ugmV0bCBzut1WQ%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father's cabin, and did not return until he could "give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight." By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That's why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **" Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry." ** Through** "Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,"** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.** Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=99cfd6cb3148497e937c81d8778dda01&_e=kX4_Rq8Y4n3S6zjuop5nhDK-f6X3VxGhkPQpf_tsTOalsT7P-b1vefMPG7lWx8VCifq_bGts2bqHV8pgeBJBn_gHN9RVbJxeDmK_OvrC78DS372pCIW9R_2NmtAr9EC9b_UQFUYDBjpYZMO-9MyePEycqjFMnBC1UZYDw4pqBuW-gbybeFfDRZy2oQTmbpGcv3T7JzPIIr7VQcATPvYUU4k8TvNIR-IrnpGyOrJrzBbEe7u69NpnwzjmO0Fy0zXGotFXILmt-hJk1QLXXx4AIGjw8ZUZV_rvM2ehZuOmnet6JN01-MEKyX2G88851KWLexrwFXZjRY1rMUxs79P1ObOKGslkZZtyLcwVxq6BI3KhoN98UwZU7r1csX27ZuaQUgZRgTjmLQpCrDLdjJCf1Q%3D%3D)
---
| | That's why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I've included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below: [_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=99cfd6cb3148497e937c81d8778dda01&_e=kX4_Rq8Y4n3S6zjuop5nhDK-f6X3VxGhkPQpf_tsTOalsT7P-b1vefMPG7lWx8VCifq_bGts2bqHV8pgeBJBn_gHN9RVbJxeDmK_OvrC78DS372pCIW9R_2NmtAr9EC9b_UQFUYDBjpYZMO-9MyePEycqjFMnBC1UZYDw4pqBuW-gbybeFfDRZy2oQTmbpGcv3T7JzPIIr7VQcATPvYUU4k8TvNIR-IrnpGyOrJrzBbEe7u69NpnwzjmO0Fy0zXGg45cAuc2dDHn6qjffLpMmE-K2lvN5CvYDDYM8Q8k-ZtFR5eSSuUXfQ1Axgf02jLva34e7-ojoOc2rPQQyOEBrJGKP6jGdYMLYkEcKWGW6aVcT9FsI4hdbsE0L5PiQrI0mDaYp6iT2HpL13i86hPQnw%3D%3D) Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

---
Peter, thanks to you, Attorney General Letitia James was able to make history as the first Black woman ever to be re-elected as New York’s attorney general.

But as the AG looks toward her next term and the new year, we wanted to check in with some of her top supporters to see what you really think of her work this past year. **That’s why we’re conducting an official approval poll, and we’re counting on 1,000 supporters to respond before 11:59 p.m. tonight. So tell us now: Do you approve of Attorney General Letitia James? **
| | | [YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56512844/385249393/1398049109?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&cid=128810098&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk931-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzgyNWFjMS1kMTg2LWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mhn7geuVDcgmfI7AY4_5KVRw-XZ65IvCIKquE7Kx6AM=&emci=0f56e81b-5181-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=23825ac1-d186-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=25369504)
---
| [NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56512845/385249394/1398049109?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&cid=128810098&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk931-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzgyNWFjMS1kMTg2LWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mhn7geuVDcgmfI7AY4_5KVRw-XZ65IvCIKquE7Kx6AM=&emci=0f56e81b-5181-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=23825ac1-d186-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=25369504)
---
In case you need a little help remembering, we compiled a list of some of Letitia’s biggest accomplishments from her first term as your attorney general.
* When Roe v. Wade was overturned this summer, **Letitia James fought to ensure that New York would remain a safe haven for all those seeking abortions.** That included calling for a statewide fund for people throughout the nation who needed reproductive care, fighting in court against states that outlawed abortion with no exceptions, and convening a task force to offer patients and health care providers aid in the new legal landscape.
* A long-term fighter for LGBTQ+ rights, **Letitia James co-led several coalitions of state attorneys general to challenge anti-trans policies** that have sprouted up throughout our nation. Most recently, Letitia James co-led a coalition of 17 state attorneys general to file an amicus brief protecting an Indiana transgender student against gender-based discrimination.
* **And Letitia James successfully sued Big Pharma** for its astronomical increases in prescription drug prices AND its role in the tragic opioid epidemic – ultimately winning BILLIONS for New York.

It’s safe to say that here at Team James, we are incredibly proud of all that Letitia has accomplished in her first term, but before we finalize our strategy for next year, we need to know what you think.

So please, before our flash poll expires, let us know:
**Do you approve of Attorney General Letitia James’ work?**
| | | [YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56512846/385249395/1398049109?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&cid=128810098&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk931-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzgyNWFjMS1kMTg2LWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mhn7geuVDcgmfI7AY4_5KVRw-XZ65IvCIKquE7Kx6AM=&emci=0f56e81b-5181-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=23825ac1-d186-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=25369504)

name: American Defense News
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losi
| | | This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zpcmqpar7gedn4n4i479sqo4ra130qjqi8cr4420_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9gm6o76clh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. But today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive. As we lose more and more of these courageous soldiers, we also lose the living memories they carry. But we must preserve the lessons learned from this world war.
---
| | That’s why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled [“](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z7h4sbd68ocbbhqdq8thcm8efdb4t3rpcovsdamg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9gm6o76clh2bs)**[The Second World Wars.”](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z4pmue4l51ujninpv3o6sq4oa0shi5t4p8optcn8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9gm6o76clh2bs) **And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian **Victor Davis Hanson** of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies’ victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
---
| [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zm6er4t4jub15p7a4g55vf7ba69qjtp702qhjpqo_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9gm6o76clh2bs)
---
| | Simply use this secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD today: _[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zb556v8bab8rthbntd3dq8eel7hqsc70l1nfg2p8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9gm6o76clh2bs)_ Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

name: C7 Tac
subject: #1 way to protect your bank card
body:
Even if it’s buried in your purse or hidden deep inside your wallet...
---
| | | | | | | **WE GOT YOUR 6.**
---

| | | | | | | Hello,
Have you ever waved your credit card over a machine at the checkout stand?
---
| | | [](https://links.c7tac.com/a/1537/click/11051/6374453/24e5301f4f475ab75e2bb34e9991cbef09ecd579/32a3ae19cd2ab3071740f27eaa3ddc1977af7d80)
---
| | | Although this feature, which is in nearly every credit card, makes checking out a breeze...
**It also makes your identity more vulnerable than it’s ever been.**
Because the chip that allows this easy checkout is known as a “radio frequency identification” and identity thieves can read it from up to 37 feet away using a scanner.
Even if it’s buried in your purse or hidden deep inside your wallet.
Which is why identity theft has started growing at a rapid rate since 2020 as you can see in the graph below.
---
| | |
---
| | | But there’s one simple thing thousands of Americans are doing to protect their information from being stolen.
And they’re doing this by protecting their credit cards in an RFID-blocking case.
RFID-blocking cases make it _impossible_ for a thief to wirelessly steal your information.
And that’s because these cases have something called a “Faraday cage” that blocks electromagnetic signals from reaching your chip.
Making this a scientifically-backed way to easily and 100% effectively safeguard your card data from thieves.
---
| | | [](https://links.c7tac.com/a/1537/click/11051/6374453/24e5301f4f475ab75e2bb34e9991cbef09ecd579/32a3ae19cd2ab3071740f27eaa3ddc1977af7d80)
---
| | | Because we’ve seen so much demand for this protection from our subscribers...
**We've decide to give away our best selling RFID-blocking case away for Free today.**
We’ve dropped the price to USD0 (Just pay shipping) making this the most affordable RFID-blocking wallet on the market!
---
| | |
---
| | | Make sure to get yours and stay protected.
[**> > Click here to learn more about our RFID-blocking wallet and protect your identity, today.**](https://links.c7tac.com/a/1537/click/11051/6374453/24e5301f4f475ab75e2bb34e9991cbef09ecd579/32a3ae19cd2ab3071740f27eaa3ddc1977af7d80)
---

* * *

[_**TACTICAL | SHOP | CONTACT US**_](https://links.c7tac.com/a/1537/click/11051/6374453/6aa9ab53b7d5386dd9b370b3493857e2e20a15f6/32a3ae19cd2ab3071740f27eaa3ddc1977af7d80)

P.S. If you have ANY questions or concerns, please drop us an email, support@c7tac.com. ~ _Nicole_
---
