And they’re doing this by protecting their credit cards in an RFID-blocking case. RFID-blocking cases make it impossible for a thief to wirelessly steal your information. And that’s because these cases have something called a “Faraday cage” that blocks electromagnetic signals from reaching your chip. Making this a scientifically-backed way to easily and 100% effectively safeguard your card data from thieves. | | | | | | Because we’ve seen so much demand for this protection from our subscribers... We've decide to give away our best selling RFID-blocking case away for Free today. We’ve dropped the price to USD0 (Just pay shipping) making this the most affordable RFID-blocking wallet on the market! | | | | | | Make sure to get yours and stay protected. P.S. If you have ANY questions or concerns, please drop us an email, support@c7tac.com. ~ Nicole | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by support@c7tac.com** 514 Earth City Plz, Ste 310, Earth City, MT 63045 US | | | | ---|---|---

name: Your America
subject: Learn from Victor Davis Hanson
body:
World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7619%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=xxsTGaBWlt5YAKL2Wjqang&sysid=1)
| | This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c99708%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3Rq%2bK%2brnWroTRMMrzhdNnQ&sysid=1)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. But today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive. As we lose more and more of these courageous soldiers, we also lose the living memories they carry. But we must preserve the lessons learned from this world war.
---
| | That’s why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled [“](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c99709%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=s1bZrciniItXoc5R0kZUng&sysid=1)**[The Second World Wars.”](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c99700%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JSX%2fuVtWkkdbYNAU%2f0zvFg&sysid=1) **And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian **Victor Davis Hanson** of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies’ victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
---
| [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c99701%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PO4KUHH2J%2bauj2q40MYAVw&sysid=1)
---
| | Simply use this secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD today: _[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c99702%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Ma%2f64%2bbBk%2fYd4rIC%2fCJ6iw&sysid=1)_ Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

name: Daniel Di Martino
subject: A Socialist Christmas Season… away from family.
body:
Seven years ago, I celebrated my last Christmas with all my family in Venezuela. While I’m with my parents again this season,
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2d28tdmfh79aiafqvrrkjd13efkavj859fl95g8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9gmepr0clh2bs)
Friend,

Seven years ago, I celebrated my last Christmas with all my family in Venezuela. While I'm with my parents again this season, my grandparents, cousins, uncles, and everyone else in my family are spread thin all over the world. All because Venezuela's socialist regime forced us to flee.

**Here 's my family's story:**

My grandfather was a shoemaker. He started out working for others but then created his own business. He went from being a hand-made shoemaker to owning his own factory.

**Our family went from poverty to riches. What does this sound like? The American dream! **

_But all of that changed when the socialists took over. _

It wasn't a violent revolution like Cuba, Russia, or China. This month, 24 years ago, _**Hugo Chavez was elected to office! **_

Once the socialists took control, the economy went downhill.

Venezuela sits on top of the world's largest oil reserves. Yet, we had to get in line for hours to get gas in our cars.

**Prices rose as the government tried to print its way into prosperity.** Eventually, I couldn't fit enough cash in my wallet to go to the movies because the money was so worthless.

**Socialists blamed businessmen and greed.** The government confiscated businesses and put price controls in place. Shortages became widespread. For a few weeks, there would be no milk. Then it would come back for a few weeks, and then, gone again.

I want to tell my story to high school students around the United States. They need to know the truth about socialism. **That 's why I founded the Dissident Project. **

[_**Can you donate $10, $25, or $50 to Young Voice and help us teach the next generation about the dangers of socialism? Click here to donate to support our work >>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zm8qq6l5grgtfbt7vibnui21cnb6mie8mmp4sk5o_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9gmepr0clh2bs)

**Young Voice 's Dissident **project brings survivors of tyrannical socialist countries to high schools around the United States to tell our stories.

We are countering the mainstream narratives about how peaceful and successful socialism can be. Too many young people are taught to believe the United States is an evil, oppressive country and that capitalism is a failure.

**Young Voices ' Dissident project has speakers from Hong Kong, North Korea, Cuba, and Venezuela. We all have unique stories that high schoolers must hear. **

My goal is to raise $15,000 by the end of the month to fund our speakers. It costs roughly $1,500 to host a speaking event on a high school campus.

Your generous gift allows us to keep these talks free of charge for schools.

[_**Help me share my story with young Americans and tell them about the true horrors of socialism. Click here to send your gift >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zavjpar84dos2d3ht13975he1qqunnlarh9kcl4g_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9gmepr0clh2bs)

In the mid to late 20th century, Venezuela was a free and prosperous country.

Venezuelans had the opportunity to go from rags to riches. Venezuela was the most prosperous Latin American country. Nothing was perfect, of course, but food was on our tables and gifts under our trees every Christmas season.

**But socialism ruined our country 's economy and led 7 million of us to flee.**

If America were to fall to socialism, it would not fall by bullets but by votes.

**The socialist takeover of America can only happen gradually, just like it did in Venezuela.**

By the time you notice the decay, it will be too late to reverse. Shortages. Skyrocketing crime. Inflation. Christmas away from family because they moved abroad, and video calls every week or every day to catch up with those who left.

We can't let it happen in America.

**Please help me share my story with high school students and help them stop socialist ideas from creeping into our society.**

To do that, I need your help.

Please donate any amount you can generously spare today.

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zg1q01deait0vlidu6et7qhbab185ek5o9jinamo_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9gmepr0clh2bs)
[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1q2sdp5s486tgfrhl991mlji40rbapji91c4s70_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9gmepr0clh2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfv9s37kkl4969t5uuku3qr3scpai1fc4ioj24u0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9gmepr0clh2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zoa78if5oh7802md9f73r7outf6fp6emupc33r70_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9gmepr0clh2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ziqbh46qlpvghvno7qkp9hinot15luiuf4im6rpo_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9gmepr0clh2bs)
[_**Sponsor a School $1,500 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z808ovb6ujj5583nt722ki4t0b77cr4adf61q9ko_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9gmepr0clh2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zemr6sd0ud3p7ah7ehu7pdaajfmta1ob3ii9rpdg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9gmepr0clh2bs)

Thank you,

Daniel Di Martino

_The Dissident Project is a program of Young Voices, a 501c3 nonprofit organization. All donations are tax deductible and will be acknowledged via email receipt. Donations made to the Dissident Project will be spent exclusively on that program._
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for GOP Presidential, [please use this preferences page](http://e.goppresidential.com/prefs/9z2zk6m1l1u0f1dhf9tqp5uf8pqubikat1uvku6e18o).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4m1u8dodv22qcgmikqc34t7ptl7dbjfml02meh8_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or7c9h62pr7c1im49fg)

name: ICYMI News
subject: Reserve your DVD box set
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivatin

| | | This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zck7ttv867dhkqvvl50nvijcelqf5kk3t351vlo8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9gmepr0clh2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zll74e9q2uk554j3845tk1jlteoov4t2hctklom8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9gmepr0clh2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zaltuc7k1pphkcvh8onrgfvonn9s5rhggtvofuo8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9gmepr0clh2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z4vv8kvi0e1g3ap6i2g9hqhunf2p4vnfufs8s7h8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9gmepr0clh2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

name: Derek Kilmer
subject: The House majority was decided by only 6,670 votes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
The road ahead:
Peter,

Looking back on 2022, I'm grateful for everyone who chipped in, volunteered, put out a yard sign, voted, or even talked to their friends and family about what's at stake in the midterms. Because of your hard work, I'm honored to be fighting on behalf of our region again in the House.

We've seen the GOP's legislative agenda, and it's clear we have some big fights ahead of us. I sat down with my finance team this week to take stock of things heading into the new year.

I'm ready to hit the ground running in 2023 to defend our rights in Congress. That's why we've set a goal to raise $10,000 before the end-of-year deadline to help us prepare for the challenges ahead, no matter where the road takes us.

**[I'm counting on having a strong grassroots team by my side every step of the way next year, and the time to invest in this fight is right now. Can I count on you to chip in toward our $10,000 end-of-year goal?](https://act.myngp.com/el/z5jgbm-XhMrkS10LPnPSxx75mCqenPNBYsD95oo-EYs=/46L_EYXxBKDw8YqdTfpqLL1hukyNegjLpmT_583VYp0=?refcode=em22_221228_eoy1_fndd_gq_act___dk_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_221228_eoy1_fndd_gq_act___dk_ettx&utm_medium=email)**

clean_body: The road ahead: Peter, Looking back on 2022, I'm grateful for everyone who chipped in, volunteered, put out a yard sign, voted, or even talked to their friends and family about what's at stake in the midterms. Because of your hard work, I'm honored to be fighting on behalf of our region again in the House. We've seen the GOP's legislative agenda, and it's clear we have some big fights ahead of us. I sat down with my finance team this week to take stock of things heading into the new year. I'm ready to hit the ground running in 2023 to defend our rights in Congress. That's why we've set a goal to raise $10,000 before the end-of-year deadline to help us prepare for the challenges ahead, no matter where the road takes us. name: Daniel Di Martino
subject: Socialists are spoon-feeding indoctrination to American high school students
body:
Seven years ago, I celebrated my last Christmas with all my family in Venezuela.
[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zvgca6s6muhu9u6o3bhk0rmfpt8ki2p3k51d4lg8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9gm1or4chh2bs)
Friend,

Seven years ago, I celebrated my last Christmas with all my family in Venezuela. While I'm with my parents again this season, my grandparents, cousins, uncles, and everyone else in my family are spread thin all over the world. All because Venezuela's socialist regime forced us to flee.

**Here 's my family's story:**

My grandfather was a shoemaker. He started out working for others but then created his own business. He went from being a hand-made shoemaker to owning his own factory.

**Our family went from poverty to riches. What does this sound like? The American dream! **

_But all of that changed when the socialists took over. _

It wasn't a violent revolution like Cuba, Russia, or China. This month, 24 years ago, _**Hugo Chavez was elected to office! **_

Once the socialists took control, the economy went downhill.

Venezuela sits on top of the world's largest oil reserves. Yet, we had to get in line for hours to get gas in our cars.

**Prices rose as the government tried to print its way into prosperity.** Eventually, I couldn't fit enough cash in my wallet to go to the movies because the money was so worthless.

**Socialists blamed businessmen and greed.** The government confiscated businesses and put price controls in place. Shortages became widespread. For a few weeks, there would be no milk. Then it would come back for a few weeks, and then, gone again.

I want to tell my story to high school students around the United States. They need to know the truth about socialism. **That 's why I founded the Dissident Project. **

[_**Can you donate $10, $25, or $50 to Young Voice and help us teach the next generation about the dangers of socialism? Click here to donate to support our work >>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z6qbn76i2n0c2vc60hoa0g0qt5p14e0hmino8q5g_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9gm1or4chh2bs)

**Young Voice 's Dissident **project brings survivors of tyrannical socialist countries to high schools around the United States to tell our stories.

We are countering the mainstream narratives about how peaceful and successful socialism can be. Too many young people are taught to believe the United States is an evil, oppressive country and that capitalism is a failure.

**Young Voices ' Dissident project has speakers from Hong Kong, North Korea, Cuba, and Venezuela. We all have unique stories that high schoolers must hear. **

My goal is to raise $15,000 by the end of the month to fund our speakers. It costs roughly $1,500 to host a speaking event on a high school campus.

Your generous gift allows us to keep these talks free of charge for schools.

[_**Help me share my story with young Americans and tell them about the true horrors of socialism. Click here to send your gift >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zgfohaqmmsb7kjvfv7v00h2qtovnjpkc1u4rvpsg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9gm1or4chh2bs)

In the mid to late 20th century, Venezuela was a free and prosperous country.

Venezuelans had the opportunity to go from rags to riches. Venezuela was the most prosperous Latin American country. Nothing was perfect, of course, but food was on our tables and gifts under our trees every Christmas season.

**But socialism ruined our country 's economy and led 7 million of us to flee.**

If America were to fall to socialism, it would not fall by bullets but by votes.

**The socialist takeover of America can only happen gradually, just like it did in Venezuela.**

By the time you notice the decay, it will be too late to reverse. Shortages. Skyrocketing crime. Inflation. Christmas away from family because they moved abroad, and video calls every week or every day to catch up with those who left.

We can't let it happen in America.

**Please help me share my story with high school students and help them stop socialist ideas from creeping into our society.**

To do that, I need your help.

Please donate any amount you can generously spare today.

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zgjski8g1nrje8trjp4700o15kgrj6t0rh4v5qm0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9gm1or4chh2bs)
[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zphtq4a5dqvj11ok8jlmb0k0451mdhgvhobl7040_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9gm1or4chh2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zugo5lj6frt39pep3cqrr5ei22rd5l6dhfus2i08_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9gm1or4chh2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z0lobql1hp9rcppncrcp48m1tmhi3a4kg0eisft8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9gm1or4chh2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zkhm0vikoc7tb6pjao7e0birbj00enjrmc5quhfo_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9gm1or4chh2bs)
[_**Sponsor a School $1,500 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zmsjknaqubugpph1mnumhaao6p6en6to3d6e43uo_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9gm1or4chh2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zsqd3j6phc79q1ca3jri6nq1s93lnjjvgao6ae6g_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9gm1or4chh2bs)

Thank you,

Daniel Di Martino

_The Dissident Project is a program of Young Voices, a 501c3 nonprofit organization. All donations are tax deductible and will be acknowledged via email receipt. Donations made to the Dissident Project will be spent exclusively on that program._

If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Deroy Murdock, [please use this preferences page](http://e.deroymurdock.com/prefs/9z2z1lh8025b9p78eshjpk6kks63pi2ve29sa6v684o).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z327lhf267r0k96c8vvr5o34dtm60kgpofri7t0g_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9gm1or4chh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Daniel Di Martino
subject: Socialists are spoon-feeding indoctrination to American high school students
body:
Seven years ago, I celebrated my last Christmas with all my family in Venezuela.
[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zqkm8si12081raqpv4e5kjl7a982ovohiffolekg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9gm1or4cdh2bs)
Friend,

Seven years ago, I celebrated my last Christmas with all my family in Venezuela. While I'm with my parents again this season, my grandparents, cousins, uncles, and everyone else in my family are spread thin all over the world. All because Venezuela's socialist regime forced us to flee.

**Here 's my family's story:**

My grandfather was a shoemaker. He started out working for others but then created his own business. He went from being a hand-made shoemaker to owning his own factory.

**Our family went from poverty to riches. What does this sound like? The American dream! **

_But all of that changed when the socialists took over. _

It wasn't a violent revolution like Cuba, Russia, or China. This month, 24 years ago, _**Hugo Chavez was elected to office! **_

Once the socialists took control, the economy went downhill.

Venezuela sits on top of the world's largest oil reserves. Yet, we had to get in line for hours to get gas in our cars.

**Prices rose as the government tried to print its way into prosperity.** Eventually, I couldn't fit enough cash in my wallet to go to the movies because the money was so worthless.

**Socialists blamed businessmen and greed.** The government confiscated businesses and put price controls in place. Shortages became widespread. For a few weeks, there would be no milk. Then it would come back for a few weeks, and then, gone again.

I want to tell my story to high school students around the United States. They need to know the truth about socialism. **That 's why I founded the Dissident Project. **

[_**Can you donate $10, $25, or $50 to Young Voice and help us teach the next generation about the dangers of socialism? Click here to donate to support our work >>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zjgtsv45d98r0sqgl50kafvjfqf9eit9gjmn5n5g_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9gm1or4cdh2bs)

**Young Voice 's Dissident **project brings survivors of tyrannical socialist countries to high schools around the United States to tell our stories.

We are countering the mainstream narratives about how peaceful and successful socialism can be. Too many young people are taught to believe the United States is an evil, oppressive country and that capitalism is a failure.

**Young Voices ' Dissident project has speakers from Hong Kong, North Korea, Cuba, and Venezuela. We all have unique stories that high schoolers must hear. **

My goal is to raise $15,000 by the end of the month to fund our speakers. It costs roughly $1,500 to host a speaking event on a high school campus.

Your generous gift allows us to keep these talks free of charge for schools.

[_**Help me share my story with young Americans and tell them about the true horrors of socialism. Click here to send your gift >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zam5t5cknc8qg47a16dt5lo59buimfki3sf7h2u0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9gm1or4cdh2bs)

In the mid to late 20th century, Venezuela was a free and prosperous country.

Venezuelans had the opportunity to go from rags to riches. Venezuela was the most prosperous Latin American country. Nothing was perfect, of course, but food was on our tables and gifts under our trees every Christmas season.

**But socialism ruined our country 's economy and led 7 million of us to flee.**

If America were to fall to socialism, it would not fall by bullets but by votes.

**The socialist takeover of America can only happen gradually, just like it did in Venezuela.**

By the time you notice the decay, it will be too late to reverse. Shortages. Skyrocketing crime. Inflation. Christmas away from family because they moved abroad, and video calls every week or every day to catch up with those who left.

We can't let it happen in America.

**Please help me share my story with high school students and help them stop socialist ideas from creeping into our society.**

To do that, I need your help.

Please donate any amount you can generously spare today.

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2ztjsus4far0qv85bge6jlr9uo4uhp7ger28mooug_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9gm1or4cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zuevqg3fceg9b033o1594r8hth6dlgin8jnsop30_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9gm1or4cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z00g5c6psl4c2kjg9qknrlr7v8mm2vk44nfe5p18_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9gm1or4cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2ztldinub30i5v2t42dovqnitm9gapqcdqa1bhako_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9gm1or4cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zundbfmvr2svbo2kgl1jhv6jc2ekas7k9a81ehoo_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9gm1or4cdh2bs)
[_**Sponsor a School $1,500 >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zn03t7mg1s8eq45apjub4d7jqga6a22gd52tk6l0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9gm1or4cdh2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zi6mq37b9racrabq3idhtv717mqnds5ie1s6bat0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9gm1or4cdh2bs)

Thank you,

Daniel Di Martino

_The Dissident Project is a program of Young Voices, a 501c3 nonprofit organization. All donations are tax deductible and will be acknowledged via email receipt. Donations made to the Dissident Project will be spent exclusively on that program._

name: Daniel Di Martino
subject: A Socialist Christmas Season… away from family.
body:
While I’m with my parents again this season, my grandparents, cousins, uncles, and everyone else in my family are spread thin
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zme6787j6sg3clpapf78pokpseoipk53sn9jmbao_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9im0ob6c1h2bs)
Friend,

Seven years ago, I celebrated my last Christmas with all my family in Venezuela. While I'm with my parents again this season, my grandparents, cousins, uncles, and everyone else in my family are spread thin all over the world. All because Venezuela's socialist regime forced us to flee.

**Here 's my family's story:**

My grandfather was a shoemaker. He started out working for others but then created his own business. He went from being a hand-made shoemaker to owning his own factory.

**Our family went from poverty to riches. What does this sound like? The American dream! **

_But all of that changed when the socialists took over. _

It wasn't a violent revolution like Cuba, Russia, or China. This month, 24 years ago, _**Hugo Chavez was elected to office! **_

Once the socialists took control, the economy went downhill.

Venezuela sits on top of the world's largest oil reserves. Yet, we had to get in line for hours to get gas in our cars.

**Prices rose as the government tried to print its way into prosperity.** Eventually, I couldn't fit enough cash in my wallet to go to the movies because the money was so worthless.

**Socialists blamed businessmen and greed.** The government confiscated businesses and put price controls in place. Shortages became widespread. For a few weeks, there would be no milk. Then it would come back for a few weeks, and then, gone again.

I want to tell my story to high school students around the United States. They need to know the truth about socialism. **That 's why I founded the Dissident Project. **

[_**Can you donate $10, $25, or $50 to Young Voice and help us teach the next generation about the dangers of socialism? Click here to donate to support our work >>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdmhui6hn1mr2sog7nppj5f5v9g7auu11mj165ag_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9im0ob6c1h2bs)

**Young Voice 's Dissident **project brings survivors of tyrannical socialist countries to high schools around the United States to tell our stories.

We are countering the mainstream narratives about how peaceful and successful socialism can be. Too many young people are taught to believe the United States is an evil, oppressive country and that capitalism is a failure.

**Young Voices ' Dissident project has speakers from Hong Kong, North Korea, Cuba, and Venezuela. We all have unique stories that high schoolers must hear. **

My goal is to raise $15,000 by the end of the month to fund our speakers. It costs roughly $1,500 to host a speaking event on a high school campus.

Your generous gift allows us to keep these talks free of charge for schools.

[_**Help me share my story with young Americans and tell them about the true horrors of socialism. Click here to send your gift >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpfd3rmbpg56teja4751r83irldvie891v3l1hbg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9im0ob6c1h2bs)

In the mid to late 20th century, Venezuela was a free and prosperous country.

Venezuelans had the opportunity to go from rags to riches. Venezuela was the most prosperous Latin American country. Nothing was perfect, of course, but food was on our tables and gifts under our trees every Christmas season.

**But socialism ruined our country 's economy and led 7 million of us to flee.**

If America were to fall to socialism, it would not fall by bullets but by votes.

**The socialist takeover of America can only happen gradually, just like it did in Venezuela.**

By the time you notice the decay, it will be too late to reverse. Shortages. Skyrocketing crime. Inflation. Christmas away from family because they moved abroad, and video calls every week or every day to catch up with those who left.

We can't let it happen in America.

**Please help me share my story with high school students and help them stop socialist ideas from creeping into our society.**

To do that, I need your help.

Please donate any amount you can generously spare today.

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7nnaqltn8i0f9bosit8ku7rnrdqvr5udkg5mr10_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9im0ob6c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbp4h7oqegq96piea18ar86vu30eiuir362jn7t8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9im0ob6c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zeesbge125pj2i2b1s3li7uaavlpsupjtgjga4d8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9im0ob6c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zfu59oj0u30s3ml6nd70pfh1obghjji76avlqhvo_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9im0ob6c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zonptjaprvkb6n5jvt599ej5svgckn6rdoinqls0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9im0ob6c1h2bs)
[_**Sponsor a School $1,500 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z59ja48votranv3tdpie9aaj34524b2jbde24qu8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9im0ob6c1h2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zectih253g1ot7nqimmlcd9cua5v9jdr2sl29sog_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9im0ob6c1h2bs)

Thank you,

Daniel Di Martino

_The Dissident Project is a program of Young Voices, a 501c3 nonprofit organization. All donations are tax deductible and will be acknowledged via email receipt. Donations made to the Dissident Project will be spent exclusively on that program._

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: The 2023 Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional is here
body:
As 2022 comes to an end, I am thinking about how I can help you make 2023 a landmark year in your Christian walk.
| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zbnv2nfu38h1ne6gao38ca71tmq8j0loeqafb3dg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9gm1or4chh2bs)
---
Hello Friend, As 2022 comes to an end, I am thinking about how I can help you make 2023 a landmark year in your Christian walk. I want to help you grow closer to Jesus all year long, so that you, in turn, can impact the world around you. That's why I've written the brand-new 2023 _Pathway to Victory_ Daily Devotional. It contains 260 devotions (Monday through Friday for all 52 weeks) written to encourage, inspire, convict, comfort, and teach you biblical truth so that you can face each day with spiritual readiness. Here is an outline of what we'll be studying together if you choose to follow along:
---
* From January to February, we'll begin a spiritual fitness program using wisdom from the book of Hebrews.
* From March through May, we'll learn how to walk with God by faith in our everyday lives by studying the life of Abraham.
* In the summer, we'll gain a biblical understanding of grace, and discover the joy and freedom of living obediently.
* And in the fall and winter, we'll meditate together on the parables of Jesus!

---
[Request your 2023 Daily Devotional](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6rdeankkdf905ake79a4l4kle9kb627se5inrpo_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9gm1or4chh2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z13c75im4885ri5e90sikcspnaluhh0fd1iar4k8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9gm1or4chh2bs)
---
| The _Pathway to Victory_ Daily Devotional is one of the most popular resources we offer, and it makes a perfect Christmas gift. With a slate-blue leather cover and inlaid rich brown and gold foil, this beautiful devotional is built to be used daily, providing spiritual nourishment for your day.
---
| | We're offering this devotional as a thank-you gift to those who donate to _Pathway to Victory_ this month. **And the best part is, whatever donation you make will be doubled in its impact thanks to the matching gift challenge that is running until December 31.** To support the work God is doing through _Pathway to Victory_ , and to receive your beautiful copy of the devotional, you can use this link: [https://ptv.org/donate/light-in-the-darkness-matching-challenge/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zcs4fflul4c7n2jjk0v32k52nd1gib3vsg0bin48_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9gm1or4chh2bs) What if we all committed to spending more time with Jesus in 2023? What do you think we would accomplish? I'm excited to find out. Thanks for your partnership with this ministry. Sharing the Truth of God's Word, Dr. Robert Jeffress
---

name: Daniel Di Martino
subject: A Socialist Christmas Season… away from family.
body:
While I’m with my parents again this season, my grandparents, cousins, uncles, and everyone else in my family are spread thin
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zhaovlkel5j27r2rsa4oahr6cn7rsf9j5ebc68o8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9im8pj4c1h2bs)
Friend,

Seven years ago, I celebrated my last Christmas with all my family in Venezuela. While I'm with my parents again this season, my grandparents, cousins, uncles, and everyone else in my family are spread thin all over the world. All because Venezuela's socialist regime forced us to flee.

**Here 's my family's story:**

My grandfather was a shoemaker. He started out working for others but then created his own business. He went from being a hand-made shoemaker to owning his own factory.

**Our family went from poverty to riches. What does this sound like? The American dream! **

_But all of that changed when the socialists took over. _

It wasn't a violent revolution like Cuba, Russia, or China. This month, 24 years ago, _**Hugo Chavez was elected to office! **_

Once the socialists took control, the economy went downhill.

Venezuela sits on top of the world's largest oil reserves. Yet, we had to get in line for hours to get gas in our cars.

**Prices rose as the government tried to print its way into prosperity.** Eventually, I couldn't fit enough cash in my wallet to go to the movies because the money was so worthless.

**Socialists blamed businessmen and greed.** The government confiscated businesses and put price controls in place. Shortages became widespread. For a few weeks, there would be no milk. Then it would come back for a few weeks, and then, gone again.

I want to tell my story to high school students around the United States. They need to know the truth about socialism. **That 's why I founded the Dissident Project. **

[_**Can you donate $10, $25, or $50 to Young Voice and help us teach the next generation about the dangers of socialism? Click here to donate to support our work >>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z5be6icucevjvk0j22vqaa8vq610rbqf5ogb1jc8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9im8pj4c1h2bs)

**Young Voice 's Dissident **project brings survivors of tyrannical socialist countries to high schools around the United States to tell our stories.

We are countering the mainstream narratives about how peaceful and successful socialism can be. Too many young people are taught to believe the United States is an evil, oppressive country and that capitalism is a failure.

**Young Voices ' Dissident project has speakers from Hong Kong, North Korea, Cuba, and Venezuela. We all have unique stories that high schoolers must hear. **

My goal is to raise $15,000 by the end of the month to fund our speakers. It costs roughly $1,500 to host a speaking event on a high school campus.

Your generous gift allows us to keep these talks free of charge for schools.

[_**Help me share my story with young Americans and tell them about the true horrors of socialism. Click here to send your gift >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z4kp17630bufj6l9dn5dvmghiscfsm4bcdmegh80_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9im8pj4c1h2bs)

In the mid to late 20th century, Venezuela was a free and prosperous country.

Venezuelans had the opportunity to go from rags to riches. Venezuela was the most prosperous Latin American country. Nothing was perfect, of course, but food was on our tables and gifts under our trees every Christmas season.

**But socialism ruined our country 's economy and led 7 million of us to flee.**

If America were to fall to socialism, it would not fall by bullets but by votes.

**The socialist takeover of America can only happen gradually, just like it did in Venezuela.**

By the time you notice the decay, it will be too late to reverse. Shortages. Skyrocketing crime. Inflation. Christmas away from family because they moved abroad, and video calls every week or every day to catch up with those who left.

We can't let it happen in America.

**Please help me share my story with high school students and help them stop socialist ideas from creeping into our society.**

To do that, I need your help.

Please donate any amount you can generously spare today.

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zemgb2572orvffs7k5gs18luv6huamugf6g4rdvg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9im8pj4c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zqmpltuc9totkqlm4pl0furl4bhvu9pvap342kug_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9im8pj4c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z74lc1ichl1rid2cn9s5gr46ts58buuqsvsdibn8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9im8pj4c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2za6bqmq1ucacupsi5unj22o4ipk11ed7j3jgiimo_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9im8pj4c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zaedq063pcceupaoab8efi8kg85nqnkha6n0ojn0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9im8pj4c1h2bs)
[_**Sponsor a School $1,500 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zb2tp8lkab3p8rjtlhemq94o8gu01n63r92nictg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9im8pj4c1h2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zn19g08o6g288r7rq1mk4om0g17dnud4p45tbdko_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9im8pj4c1h2bs)

Thank you,

Daniel Di Martino

name: Pete Sepp
subject: Did President Biden’s IRS violate the Constitution?
body:
Navigating the labyrinth that is the U.S. tax code can already feel like a punishment for ordinary taxpayers. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0365%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=kFPwl27HaYzC1pFybWqxKw&sysid=1)
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c44802%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=R6GctOdnpVvlKXAY7rvrwQ&sysid=1)

Friend,

Navigating the labyrinth that is the U.S. tax code can already feel like a punishment for ordinary taxpayers.

But the real punishment comes when Americans face **oppressive penalties** from the Internal Revenue Service for innocent filing mistakes.

Fortunately, this may be about to change.

The Supreme Court is hearing oral arguments for _Bittner v. U.S._ , a case of a $2.72 million fine for a taxpayer’s non-willful, unintentional error.

This could be a landmark case, Friend, and could ease excessive punitive measures from the IRS for all Americans.

My name is Pete Sepp, President of the National Taxpayers Union Foundation (NTUF). NTUF provides crucial, impactful research that shows Americans how taxes, government spending, and regulations affect them and guides policymakers as they overhaul the tax code.

I’ve set a goal to raise $15,000 this week to keep other Americans from being taken advantage of by our Federal government.

[_**You can help NTUF protect taxpayers from the IRS by sending a generous gift today. Click here to show your support >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c44803%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fV41wd6yCj%2f%2fQiaPMnUnhQ&sysid=1)

U.S. law requires citizens to disclose foreign bank accounts, but the IRS doesn’t make the task easy to understand - and the tax agency is unforgiving to taxpayers who make a mistake.

Depending on how the court rules, Bittner could face either a $50,000 or a $2.72 MILLION penalty.

For almost any American, these fines are e devastating and life-altering.

Since 1969, NTU has proudly been a major player in signature taxpayer victories of the past five decades:

We helped overhaul the federal tax code under President Reagan in 1986.

We championed the cause for a “Taxpayer Bill of Rights” in the late 80s and 90s and with follow-on legislation, the 2019 Taxpayer First Act.

In 2017, NTU was the driving force behind the successful push for comprehensive tax reform.

In 2020, NTUF launched the Taxpayer Defense Center to fight for taxpayers in court. TDC has already helped to hand the IRS a major defeat in the Supreme Court.

**Can I count on you to donate today and help us hold the IRS accountable? **

[_**Give $10 >>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c44804%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=GINb1rB6R25cvX9Hm5CUBQ&sysid=1)
[_**Give $35 >>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c44815%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=q6IapIFUTQJeTn%2bSLkPMPA&sysid=1)
[_**Give $50 >>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c44816%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DNPgG2F3JkZCpgFGHsEpVw&sysid=1)
[_**Give $100 >>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c44817%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bsCvFZSI%2bJqcqwV38AdGmg&sysid=1)
[_**Give Any Amount >>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c44818%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=S90DVDhHa3ATsmUBXib1TQ&sysid=1)

NTUF’s distinct projects cut through the fray, empower citizens to engage in the critical fiscal policy debates of our time, and hold elected officials accountable at every level of government:

* **Taxpayers’ Budget Office** (TBO): Examines budget proposals from Congress and the White House and identifies opportunities for spending restraint.

As a watchdog for the powerful Congressional Budget Office’s processes, scoring, and transparency, TBO seeks to expose the true budgetary impact of legislation in Congress.

* **Interstate Commerce Initiative**(ICI): Confronts one of the most important and underreported issues facing taxpayers across the country -- states reaching beyond their borders to tax and regulate the interstate economy.

ICI fights taxation without representation by researching overlapping state policies and highlighting solutions.

* **Free Trade Initiative**(FTI): Leads support for free trade and opposition to schemes that protect a few at the expense of everyone else. America is stronger when it leads the world in tearing down unfair trade barriers.

* **Taxpayer Defense Center** (TDC): Pursues strategic litigation to protect taxpayers from overzealous, unfair tax administration. From millions of tax disputes each year, we identify and engage in those most likely to have a positive and lasting impact on taxpayers’ rights.

We’ve won court cases against the IRS before, and with your help, Friend, we’ll continue to win!

Can I count on you to join our fight to reform the IRS? **All you have to do is click any link below.**

[_**Give $10 >>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c44804%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=GINb1rB6R25cvX9Hm5CUBQ&sysid=1)
[_**Give $35 >>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c44815%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=q6IapIFUTQJeTn%2bSLkPMPA&sysid=1)
[_**Give $50 >>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c44816%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DNPgG2F3JkZCpgFGHsEpVw&sysid=1)

clean_body: Navigating the labyrinth that is the U.S. tax code can already feel like a punishment for ordinary taxpayers. Friend, Navigating the labyrinth that is the U.S. tax code can already feel like a punishment for ordinary taxpayers. But the real punishment comes when Americans face oppressive penalties from the Internal Revenue Service for innocent filing mistakes. Fortunately, this may be about to change. The Supreme Court is hearing oral arguments for Bittner v. U.S. , a case of a $2.72 million fine for a taxpayer’s non-willful, unintentional error. This could be a landmark case, Friend, and could ease excessive punitive measures from the IRS for all Americans. My name is Pete Sepp, President of the National Taxpayers Union Foundation (NTUF). NTUF provides crucial, impactful research that shows Americans how taxes, government spending, and regulations affect them and guides policymakers as they overhaul the tax code. I’ve set a goal to raise $15,000 this week to keep other Americans from being taken advantage of by our Federal government. U.S. law requires citizens to disclose foreign bank accounts, but the IRS doesn’t make the task easy to understand - and the tax agency is unforgiving to taxpayers who make a mistake. Depending on how the court rules, Bittner could face either a $50,000 or a $2.72 MILLION penalty. For almost any American, these fines are e devastating and life-altering. Since 1969, NTU has proudly been a major player in signature taxpayer victories of the past five decades: We helped overhaul the federal tax code under President Reagan in 1986. We championed the cause for a “Taxpayer Bill of Rights” in the late 80s and 90s and with follow-on legislation, the 2019 Taxpayer First Act. In 2017, NTU was the driving force behind the successful push for comprehensive tax reform. In 2020, NTUF launched the Taxpayer Defense Center to fight for taxpayers in court. TDC has already helped to hand the IRS a major defeat in the Supreme Court. Can I count on you to donate today and help us hold the IRS accountable? NTUF’s distinct projects cut through the fray, empower citizens to engage in the critical fiscal policy debates of our time, and hold elected officials accountable at every level of government: Taxpayers’ Budget Office (TBO): Examines budget proposals from Congress and the White House and identifies opportunities for spending restraint. As a watchdog for the powerful Congressional Budget Office’s processes, scoring, and transparency, TBO seeks to expose the true budgetary impact of legislation in Congress. Interstate Commerce Initiative(ICI): Confronts one of the most important and underreported issues facing taxpayers across the country -- states reaching beyond their borders to tax and regulate the interstate economy. ICI fights taxation without representation by researching overlapping state policies and highlighting solutions. Free Trade Initiative(FTI): Leads support for free trade and opposition to schemes that protect a few at the expense of everyone else. America is stronger when it leads the world in tearing down unfair trade barriers. Taxpayer Defense Center (TDC): Pursues strategic litigation to protect taxpayers from overzealous, unfair tax administration. From millions of tax disputes each year, we identify and engage in those most likely to have a positive and lasting impact on taxpayers’ rights. We’ve won court cases against the IRS before, and with your help, Friend, we’ll continue to win! Can I count on you to join our fight to reform the IRS? All you have to do is click any link below. I hope to hear back from you soon. Thank you, Pete Sepp President National Taxpayers Union Foundation National Taxpayers Union Foundation (NTUF) is a nonpartisan research and educational organization that shows Americans how taxes, government spending, and regulations affect them. When it recognized the need to help taxpayers be more effective partners in the policymaking process, our 501(c)(4) affiliate National Taxpayers Union founded NTUF in 1978 as the Taxpayers Foundation. We were officially re-christened under our current name in 1987. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Pete Sepp
subject: Did President Biden’s IRS violate the Constitution?
body:
Navigating the labyrinth that is the U.S. tax code can already feel like a punishment for ordinary taxpayers.
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zm144vpemchh0dffimb692kk4ep081iejbdp22k0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9im4oj2cjh2bs)

Friend,

Navigating the labyrinth that is the U.S. tax code can already feel like a punishment for ordinary taxpayers.

But the real punishment comes when Americans face **oppressive penalties** from the Internal Revenue Service for innocent filing mistakes.

Fortunately, this may be about to change.

The Supreme Court is hearing oral arguments for _Bittner v. U.S._ , a case of a $2.72 million fine for a taxpayer’s non-willful, unintentional error.

This could be a landmark case, Friend, and could ease excessive punitive measures from the IRS for all Americans.

My name is Pete Sepp, President of the National Taxpayers Union Foundation (NTUF). NTUF provides crucial, impactful research that shows Americans how taxes, government spending, and regulations affect them and guides policymakers as they overhaul the tax code.

I’ve set a goal to raise $15,000 this week to keep other Americans from being taken advantage of by our Federal government.

[_**You can help NTUF protect taxpayers from the IRS by sending a generous gift today. Click here to show your support >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvapdku06m0kb762jve5j7qrmgmg42f986i9iqpg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9im4oj2cjh2bs)

U.S. law requires citizens to disclose foreign bank accounts, but the IRS doesn’t make the task easy to understand - and the tax agency is unforgiving to taxpayers who make a mistake.

Depending on how the court rules, Bittner could face either a $50,000 or a $2.72 MILLION penalty.

For almost any American, these fines are e devastating and life-altering.

Since 1969, NTU has proudly been a major player in signature taxpayer victories of the past five decades:

We helped overhaul the federal tax code under President Reagan in 1986.

We championed the cause for a “Taxpayer Bill of Rights” in the late 80s and 90s and with follow-on legislation, the 2019 Taxpayer First Act.

In 2017, NTU was the driving force behind the successful push for comprehensive tax reform.

In 2020, NTUF launched the Taxpayer Defense Center to fight for taxpayers in court. TDC has already helped to hand the IRS a major defeat in the Supreme Court.

**Can I count on you to donate today and help us hold the IRS accountable? **

[_**Give $10 >>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zfmlp14nod14sgrgukn2db477pefjsg25i2ku2e0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9im4oj2cjh2bs)
[_**Give $35 >>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhm1fa7a4n9g34h28mti8naokc522p8giihk4q30_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9im4oj2cjh2bs)
[_**Give $50 >>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgo8hdnr45sotlvuukuj82p249r2b5gshchgviko_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9im4oj2cjh2bs)
[_**Give $100 >>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zopsj2s0muup5qb4b99afjke047jk7mkpaab9g0g_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9im4oj2cjh2bs)
[_**Give Any Amount >>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zifb3rvhu2efkb4utuf51isogp9lp4sntsbum4s0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9im4oj2cjh2bs)

NTUF’s distinct projects cut through the fray, empower citizens to engage in the critical fiscal policy debates of our time, and hold elected officials accountable at every level of government:

* **Taxpayers’ Budget Office** (TBO): Examines budget proposals from Congress and the White House and identifies opportunities for spending restraint.

As a watchdog for the powerful Congressional Budget Office’s processes, scoring, and transparency, TBO seeks to expose the true budgetary impact of legislation in Congress.

* **Interstate Commerce Initiative**(ICI): Confronts one of the most important and underreported issues facing taxpayers across the country -- states reaching beyond their borders to tax and regulate the interstate economy.

ICI fights taxation without representation by researching overlapping state policies and highlighting solutions.

* **Free Trade Initiative**(FTI): Leads support for free trade and opposition to schemes that protect a few at the expense of everyone else. America is stronger when it leads the world in tearing down unfair trade barriers.

* **Taxpayer Defense Center** (TDC): Pursues strategic litigation to protect taxpayers from overzealous, unfair tax administration. From millions of tax disputes each year, we identify and engage in those most likely to have a positive and lasting impact on taxpayers’ rights.

We’ve won court cases against the IRS before, and with your help, Friend, we’ll continue to win!

Can I count on you to join our fight to reform the IRS? **All you have to do is click any link below.**

[_**Give $10 >>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkdbpau8pdim38ckvf8ee37cuhnh5flqcp4eierg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9im4oj2cjh2bs)
[_**Give $35 >>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrg8q9n31ddjrfksnvjjcuv8u6gtu50cn23rcpso_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9im4oj2cjh2bs)
[_**Give $50 >>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8cipu9sk2as9so1gq5pklkmd77bndimio38nca0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9im4oj2cjh2bs)
[_**Give $100 >>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhdcle7e269d25eqd5nrvp998gdu5tdr0erkklbg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9im4oj2cjh2bs)
[_**Give $500 >>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zli3gja7rrcua4tkvmst1qihrgj63e6qj5dns6eg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9im4oj2cjh2bs)
[_**Give $1,000 >>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqmbp7nlft1u2h4lrdr4bsenkuu0l5jr97u5kebo_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9im4oj2cjh2bs)
[_**Give $2,500 >>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmr00mf7ae2k2n2o5fbbtqu69rhpklo28s3mki8g_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9im4oj2cjh2bs)
[_**Give $5,000 >>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zsjsb12pfgsjhbn05akr75639e4msdevemgmtijg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9im4oj2cjh2bs)
[_**Give Any Amount >>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrlff61k14n7jj9drpal0244vifbvt8d9niq52l8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9im4oj2cjh2bs)

I hope to hear back from you soon.

Thank you,

Pete Sepp
President
National Taxpayers Union Foundation

_National Taxpayers Union Foundation (NTUF) is a nonpartisan research and educational organization that shows Americans how taxes, government spending, and regulations affect them. When it recognized the need to help taxpayers be more effective partners in the policymaking process, our 501(c)(4) affiliate National Taxpayers Union founded NTUF in 1978 as the Taxpayers Foundation. We were officially re-christened under our current name in 1987._

We were officially re-christened under our current name in 1987. body:
**FIRST:** The January 6 witch hunt committee referred President Trump to the Biden regime for criminal prosecution.

**THEN:** Democrats introduced legislation banning Donald Trump from ever serving as president again.

**NEXT:** I decided to rally the MAGA movement to defend President Trump.

But I am running out of time.

**I have until the December 31 end-of-quarter deadline to raise $50,000 to defend President Trump once Republicans take back the majority on January 3.**

**[Will you please chip in a contribution right away to help me hit my goal and defend President Trump](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61320017:WwGX9uDNb:m:1:2365227053:B7E1424C97A5A1EA1E95FE12E75BD187:r)?**

name: Priya Ahmad
subject: Wish my Mom a Happy Birthday!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina for PA
body:
| | Friend, I couldn't be prouder that my mother, Dr. Nina Ahmad, is running for Philadelphia City-Council at-Large. Today, December 28th, we celebrate Mom's birthday. But with her campaign in full swing, Mom asked us to skip having a celebration this year. [I know your support means the world to her. Will you help us celebrate her birthday with a $28 contribution? ](https://act.myngp.com/el/fUFn-1Fg8pO6KEL9YALhRrTBp_-kXTNkRKToKQP8J-w=/PstJbFeF_QjGikirUQxKNq4kx8TF_P8ssln5m318kJ0=) Mom's been an inspiration to us since we were little. Everything she does, she does for our family, our community, and the people of Philadelphia. She has been spending countless hours making calls, meeting people, and building a coalition based on her agenda for Philadelphia: A healthier city for a stronger tomorrow. I genuinely believe Mom is the best candidate for the job. Can you make a donation today to help us celebrate her birthday? [$28 - CUPCAKE](https://act.myngp.com/el/fUFn-1Fg8pO6KEL9YALhRrTBp_-kXTNkRKToKQP8J-w=/PstJbFeF_QjGikirUQxKNq4kx8TF_P8ssln5m318kJ0=) [$56 - BIRTHDAY CAKE ](https://act.myngp.com/el/fUFn-1Fg8pO6KEL9YALhRrTBp_-kXTNkRKToKQP8J-w=/PstJbFeF_QjGikirUQxKNq4kx8TF_P8ssln5m318kJ0=) [$84 - PRESENT ](https://act.myngp.com/el/fUFn-1Fg8pO6KEL9YALhRrTBp_-kXTNkRKToKQP8J-w=/PstJbFeF_QjGikirUQxKNq4kx8TF_P8ssln5m318kJ0=) [$112 - SURPRISE](https://act.myngp.com/el/fUFn-1Fg8pO6KEL9YALhRrTBp_-kXTNkRKToKQP8J-w=/PstJbFeF_QjGikirUQxKNq4kx8TF_P8ssln5m318kJ0=) [Or, donate another amount](https://act.myngp.com/el/fUFn-1Fg8pO6KEL9YALhRrTBp_-kXTNkRKToKQP8J-w=/PstJbFeF_QjGikirUQxKNq4kx8TF_P8ssln5m318kJ0=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/fUFn-1Fg8pO6KEL9YALhRrTBp_-kXTNkRKToKQP8J-w=/PstJbFeF_QjGikirUQxKNq4kx8TF_P8ssln5m318kJ0=) Thanks for making Mom's birthday celebration great! What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)? The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. subject: You afforded me the privilege of leading our Democratic Majority for another two years.

body:
Every single Democratic senator that was up for reelection won -- and we even flipped Pennsylvania’s Senate seat. This was a history-making election and a monumental year for Democrats. | |
---
Derek -- I don’t want to keep you from any holiday celebrations by listing _all_ the things we’ve accomplished this year, so I’ll just share a few ahead of Saturday’s fundraising deadline. **[If you can, chip in $7 to help keep it up, and then read on to refresh yourself on some of what our party has achieved this year.](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtF81Kr_XOYfXS47DM_ccJ3oDEPNIBpOo7uCgwnD2SG7oQTsrfBePTpoPiouTmSq8sSr7v4VG8mRdPKMa29jk33iSlQmHHXfSF1Pz6pvSOoChd_6dx3fZgPkazWv9pRbU4YQqeHE3FB89q4l9mFjq80DbUZZ7E1ZPud9lKnqWx_ymaU7kH7AhRvyZqdB1mbzuesFSQteBRVUo3eh73zDIt_Qrq0DxVzpvElhcuQ5hraeN0wf_73sXKZQz-g5tyjp9y8aRD0LKaBsc8XzLQkPmBtFj1CBKi4tMuTVqv5mOGZRrVrgh2CqhAbh3nd0u9GJq5awYJYNCbSAfd1D5U60C86URfJHUdicJdVe5I1DfR6ESzdAbapy-6cBS_d6TuNCrO5nDwKa2vt2_KnCSaFleha5J0x5cc3YAICuhlyPn-SPLmX4yLYtYpIAlgeX3b7QSWRN83Xw3w0NtWH1QcWsuoCYZNIVCHsoM7XdwncsgJhDGWqYRMxATArDsv70wgTp5ET6U-937w3k43WRxstuKFo8f8mfd51mg4nnKcqf4npAatJ2AfxMKdrMs_bHRuQtBupQFsaSWkcYN-5Ot4fV-BSlCxF99WhYlShh82IKN6O_l-e4VCNWezFHEFXBuRiSaH1J_QNwBdgh2in6i_VqGP/3sd/INQPs1aNTcSq6OfTBXAdlQ/h0/Q9rG2Lbnk-EuTlAoiVnsGdf7b0jBsr4He5o6Iaqo78E)** Working together, Democrats:
* Took on special interests by passing the most significant gun safety legislation in three decades;
* Beat Big Pharma and capped prescription drug costs for seniors;
* Confirmed 97 Article III judges, including Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson;
* Passed the CHIPS and Science Act, the Bipartisan Infrastructure Law, the PACT Act, and the _Respect for Marriage Act_ ;
* And so much more.

And if that wasn’t enough, every single Democratic senator that was up for reelection won -- _and we even flipped Pennsylvania’s Senate seat._ This was a history-making election and a monumental year for Democrats. I’m reminding you of our many accomplishments this year because you directly support that work, Derek. **[Whether it was volunteering, donating, or spreading the word to families and friends, you played a major role in the success of Democrats this year. clean_body: Every single Democratic senator that was up for reelection won -- and we even flipped Pennsylvania’s Senate seat. This was a history-making election and a monumental year for Democrats. | | Derek -- I don’t want to keep you from any holiday celebrations by listing all the things we’ve accomplished this year, so I’ll just share a few ahead of Saturday’s fundraising deadline. Working together, Democrats: Took on special interests by passing the most significant gun safety legislation in three decades; Beat Big Pharma and capped prescription drug costs for seniors; Confirmed 97 Article III judges, including Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson; Passed the CHIPS and Science Act, the Bipartisan Infrastructure Law, the PACT Act, and the Respect for Marriage Act ; And so much more. And if that wasn’t enough, every single Democratic senator that was up for reelection won -- and we even flipped Pennsylvania’s Senate seat. This was a history-making election and a monumental year for Democrats. I’m reminding you of our many accomplishments this year because you directly support that work, Derek. I cannot thank you enough for your support throughout this year. It was hard work but we got it done. And we’ll do the same in 2023. Thank you and Happy New Year, Chuck Chuck Schumer Senate Majority Leader U.S. Senator, New York Manage how often you receive DNC emails, . If you no longer wish to receive emails from the DNC, . Hey friend, it’s your friendly neighborhood finance director, Conor! I know Gabe reached out to you yesterday about our important End-of-Year fundraising goal, so I just wanted to follow up. **Right now, we have just three days left to hit our $25,000 goal.** Every grassroots contribution, from $5 to $500, makes a real impact in reaching this and preparing our campaign for the year ahead. While the 2022 election may be over, our team plans to continue reaching out to New Mexicans across the district and building our movement for a NM-02 that works for all of us. Gabe isn’t going to have as much time to fundraise once he’s in Congress next month, so that’s why we’re trying to get ahead and raise as much as we can before the year ends. **Can you come through for Gabe and pitch in $10 or whatever makes sense for you today? name: Daniel Di Martino
subject: A Socialist Christmas Season… away from family.
body:
While I’m with my parents again this season, my grandparents, cousins, uncles, and everyone else in my family are spread thin
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2u5a0hi2li9k2ugi0dnbkbqkcqqbdf3n35bmoeg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9im4oj2cjh2bs)
Friend,

Seven years ago, I celebrated my last Christmas with all my family in Venezuela. While I'm with my parents again this season, my grandparents, cousins, uncles, and everyone else in my family are spread thin all over the world. All because Venezuela's socialist regime forced us to flee.

**Here 's my family's story:**

My grandfather was a shoemaker. He started out working for others but then created his own business. He went from being a hand-made shoemaker to owning his own factory.

**Our family went from poverty to riches. What does this sound like? The American dream! **

_But all of that changed when the socialists took over. _

It wasn't a violent revolution like Cuba, Russia, or China. This month, 24 years ago, _**Hugo Chavez was elected to office! **_

Once the socialists took control, the economy went downhill.

Venezuela sits on top of the world's largest oil reserves. Yet, we had to get in line for hours to get gas in our cars.

**Prices rose as the government tried to print its way into prosperity.** Eventually, I couldn't fit enough cash in my wallet to go to the movies because the money was so worthless.

**Socialists blamed businessmen and greed.** The government confiscated businesses and put price controls in place. Shortages became widespread. For a few weeks, there would be no milk. Then it would come back for a few weeks, and then, gone again.

I want to tell my story to high school students around the United States. They need to know the truth about socialism. **That 's why I founded the Dissident Project. **

[_**Can you donate $10, $25, or $50 to Young Voice and help us teach the next generation about the dangers of socialism? Click here to donate to support our work >>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zobbkmoto1555qpd01rrv1f4o6diu1b0fs9jcbto_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9im4oj2cjh2bs)

**Young Voice 's Dissident **project brings survivors of tyrannical socialist countries to high schools around the United States to tell our stories.

We are countering the mainstream narratives about how peaceful and successful socialism can be. Too many young people are taught to believe the United States is an evil, oppressive country and that capitalism is a failure.

**Young Voices ' Dissident project has speakers from Hong Kong, North Korea, Cuba, and Venezuela. We all have unique stories that high schoolers must hear. **

My goal is to raise $15,000 by the end of the month to fund our speakers. It costs roughly $1,500 to host a speaking event on a high school campus.

Your generous gift allows us to keep these talks free of charge for schools.

[_**Help me share my story with young Americans and tell them about the true horrors of socialism. Click here to send your gift >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zfptmflvkqgusci44skgsmki6t9vbln9uvqhd240_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9im4oj2cjh2bs)

In the mid to late 20th century, Venezuela was a free and prosperous country.

Venezuelans had the opportunity to go from rags to riches. Venezuela was the most prosperous Latin American country. Nothing was perfect, of course, but food was on our tables and gifts under our trees every Christmas season.

**But socialism ruined our country 's economy and led 7 million of us to flee.**

If America were to fall to socialism, it would not fall by bullets but by votes.

**The socialist takeover of America can only happen gradually, just like it did in Venezuela.**

By the time you notice the decay, it will be too late to reverse. Shortages. Skyrocketing crime. Inflation. Christmas away from family because they moved abroad, and video calls every week or every day to catch up with those who left.

We can't let it happen in America.

**Please help me share my story with high school students and help them stop socialist ideas from creeping into our society.**

To do that, I need your help.

Please donate any amount you can generously spare today.

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ziu5jvh6rhtuuajv961t8nsvr7tt276hjeibieq8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9im4oj2cjh2bs)
[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3pgrvttpurthp6cuvlr4utr74fj9icho90bb5b0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9im4oj2cjh2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zeu8c6io3020mmqo372m0624re5vrajgeg208b18_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9im4oj2cjh2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2znda138pfhif3sdh9dshd6vis1s8tahlu9k26gp8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9im4oj2cjh2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zt30pf1339p22190tebo4gljmahgu2v1ek9f3ejo_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9im4oj2cjh2bs)
[_**Sponsor a School $1,500 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zuvsaeft3l8jpo9usltvkjddadgjahj4gup06o88_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9im4oj2cjh2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z8n7e86ojn9iiocsh0ulhleupl31sh29cms9qmo8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9im4oj2cjh2bs)

Thank you,

Daniel Di Martino

_The Dissident Project is a program of Young Voices, a 501c3 nonprofit organization. All donations are tax deductible and will be acknowledged via email receipt. Donations made to the Dissident Project will be spent exclusively on that program._
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for 1600 Daily, [please use this preferences page](http://e.1600daily.com/prefs/9z2zhcur5njtarjns6rfd27s50c1tvf5ta09jtn8lpo).
625 First St #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zm3k79hktetljrdi4fd6q6cf2pajb1qoil23jdsg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9im4oj2cjh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

subject: Let me be the first to tell you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Save Arizona Fund Inc
body:
| [ ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zel8cke2o7ht14pdergf7e51cp3mhod4t07uodgo_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9imcp34cth2bs)
---
Friend,

I will be the first to tell you there were plenty of times I thought about giving up and throwing in the towel.

**At this point -- that's just not an option. **

Our case proved, without a doubt, that not everything was as it seemed during Arizona's November election.

Now, the far-left political operatives and Fake News media are hoping this recent ruling will end my fight once and for all.

**They are dead wrong. I 'm not going to stop fighting.**

I promise you -- I will appeal this case and continue our struggle to secure our election until my very last breath.

**However, I need to know -- do I have your support?**

| [**YES, YOU HAVE MY SUPPORT!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbsfmsk582eta4svdv2eru9ijjtfih2bc36mjgu8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9imcp34cth2bs)

| Fellow American,
Conservative lawmakers have huge plans for the new year once Republicans officially take a majority in the 118th Congress.
We’re launching several investigations, calling for impeachments in the Biden administration, and holding Swamp crooks accountable.
**Now I am facing not only major opposition from the establishment, but I am falling seriously short of my End of Year review and I am not on track to meet my goal.**
I need the resources to rally millions of Americans behind my mission and message urging my Republican colleagues to support conservative leadership...and I won’t make it without your support.
**[A small, generous contribution will make all the difference in my fight to reclaim strong, conservative leadership in the House. Can I count on you?](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c99716%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mtJcp%2fzjkD2j%2f6MM7WCUHQ&sysid=1)** | | | | [SAVE OUR PARTY](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c99717%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=380CZe7q2CuiLujPnAJetw&sysid=1)
---
We may have won a majority, but we have not taken America First leadership just yet.

**Kevin McCarthy, House moderates, and RINO establishment swamp creatures are foaming at the mouth doing everything they can to take back power.**

It’s up to me to stop them and I need your help to make sure we win this Speaker position...That’s why I am reaching out to only the most loyal grassroots conservatives like you.

**[So please, consider chipping into my fight to ensure the Speaker of the House is a conservative leader and stop these RINO hacks from taking over the Republican Party>>](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c99718%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=x83i5ljUf9Mz4Wm61R81kg&sysid=1)**

Thank you in advance for your help!

Yours in Liberty,

Andy Biggs
Republican Congressman, AZ-5

subject: we need your help one more time before the end of the year

body:
| | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe [click here.](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl7NBjmTZL5F5oqdT0MFW4GJFfovgZaqyhL6oVedQTvxqf62j1-674ssdeYZmJRYBzWSHitiKSzbPsrpv-_hwFxmusDClMi_fBQryOBnrEe8YSe2LSt7f9OIn_XFp9tDxNcE4RgFoXGZDxvzI9wZjFLIXQnPbINVutiC9JAWqxFHOBBrYtq613CE5w_--5QpTpVaEDa7uO_yy1c5pk0zmrwGZvWHpBfR4Vp93zg4Jo0cF77739dN9WiygA5ZP-gMyNiEW9F1HEg9Axyit0uOR9TGXZfa81Bal0JWmb1UwvcVIcg79WyX70H52e7OCvDidI1lAbKBGLmBm6jVMAxcPIS5trOrTIZ6fiWPEHOZ7CQ7N5KftIB84QA_L437K6S6hzWKfzS-qfdanZtWD5Lb_jQNwg9O6e7jJpvFvwZeU2kxnnwP9dFrcYFbRRFwUJVd9S4pLk84jn0XZ-mRKy1yjIkI1571wANmGBYZypTq0Bj5A/3sd/tBvszZAYTP2Zk_TM7ldVfQ/h0/jgsbiSbSlSgv0PNDQbYVK_thRiWj3ZOnvIibhZ8tVGw)
| | It’s been a historic year for the team here at The Collective PAC, to say the least. In 2022, we:
|
* Supported 187 candidates on the Nov. 8th ballot, 107 of whom won their races
* Powered 16 History-Makers to victory, including Maryland’s first Black governor and Los Angeles’ first Black female mayor
* Re-elected Rev. Raphael Warnock in an incredibly close runoff against a Trump-funded opponent
* Invested over one million dollars into our endorsed candidates
* Contacted 3.1 million low-propensity Black voters directly through our phone banking and text banking efforts and encouraged them to turn out to the polls

---
_... and more._
Peter, our efforts stopped the “red wave” from coming even close to fruition and allowed Democrats to hold the Senate, and we couldn’t have done it without YOU. But here’s the thing: **_The 2023-2024 election cycle could very well be the most consequential of our lifetimes — and we need to be prepared to work EVEN HARDER over the next two years._**

[That’s why we’ve set a FINAL $30,000 FUNDRAISING GOAL to hit before our deadline at MIDNIGHT on December 31st. Reaching this goal will be the difference between kicking off our 2023-2024 efforts on January 1st or falling behind while the GOP gets a head start. Are you IN or OUT, Peter?? Rush a donation of $10 NOW if you’re IN →](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953z13Gsiw4jYjb8npbjGXirZpggRAdO8gCgSpC8vk_fI5RfQVBlgA8RWXmAqUF9Z9Ic7_-S_XRau7Qr4AR1w6pLsGV_HgtdExjtUl0Stk5APyQMgkUMakoHH0n8PJP4dfYmh-whlEBg7KtE4mHcavXdXEaCwmZUVYfesq2nqW8KJhk5fOpv_Yiy2shBap3evbGWveY7CtPmCfG9PMJKEkrecxRByzQ3yvNzAMnk4kBvL19hN-kwNhnlGtYa2Dcpq_T2BUEvfEF28U-rU3ks3G6TLzu9FHE8tMLlsAUUAGKBx1b4YF3T6niAVTxOaqmnv-AtMz0hd9CiUOJrbUvwEe6_q9UxJS2fXUcoupEn7eUdRQEqJCLPMdNlHqn1UtcBqcxpw6Nb9xJzHKg1izA_3FLLS/3sd/tBvszZAYTP2Zk_TM7ldVfQ/h1/YWcRqScmPlrkPJrPhTYx6kjrHRtzOTE9tAfSJbFJK3M)

Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people.

clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | It’s been a historic year for the team here at The Collective PAC, to say the least. In 2022, we: | Supported 187 candidates on the Nov. 8th ballot, 107 of whom won their races Powered 16 History-Makers to victory, including Maryland’s first Black governor and Los Angeles’ first Black female mayor Re-elected Rev. Raphael Warnock in an incredibly close runoff against a Trump-funded opponent Invested over one million dollars into our endorsed candidates Contacted 3.1 million low-propensity Black voters directly through our phone banking and text banking efforts and encouraged them to turn out to the polls ... and more. Peter, our efforts stopped the “red wave” from coming even close to fruition and allowed Democrats to hold the Senate, and we couldn’t have done it without YOU. But here’s the thing: The 2023-2024 election cycle could very well be the most consequential of our lifetimes — and we need to be prepared to work EVEN HARDER over the next two years. If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | | Thank you for everything this past cycle, Peter. We truly could not have accomplished all that we did without your support. Onto the next! — The Collective PAC The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. subject: what’s ahead
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
Kevin McCarthy is frantically making a corrupt bargain with extremists like Majorie Taylor Greene in a desperate attempt to secure the speaker’s gavel. |
---
_Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. _
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56518274/385268559/950074808?refcode=E17393-20221201-headerfooter-header-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzU0ZGUzOS1lOTg2LWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=39sduDNe5cF-M7hdnbv5Vn35iBixgZnAeYs6QBdUrkA=)
Team, **The new year is almost here — and that means we’re days away from the start of the 118th Congress and MAGA Republican control.** I’m not going to beat around the bush, folks. We’re heading into difficult territory. The Republicans have the slimmest of majorities, but their party is in total disarray. Kevin McCarthy is frantically making a corrupt bargain with extremists like Majorie Taylor Greene in a desperate attempt to secure the speaker’s gavel. While my Democratic colleagues and I are ready to work for the American people from day one, congressional Republicans are spinning out of control. As he carries out his corrupt bargain, McCarthy refuses to identify the committee chairs until he secures Speaker votes. It will be days — if not weeks — before Congress is functioning. **However, none of the Republican infighting means we can rest up, even for a minute. Democrats need to be prepared to fight twice as hard to protect our rights and democracy itself. ** | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56518275/385268560/950074808?refcode=E19892-20221228-EOY1-SB-DeadlineOther-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzU0ZGUzOS1lOTg2LWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=39sduDNe5cF-M7hdnbv5Vn35iBixgZnAeYs6QBdUrkA=)
---
**McCarthy, Marjorie Taylor Greene, Jim Jordan, Lauren Boebert, and others on the Republican side are making it clear they intend to exact revenge on me for exposing their extremism over the past two years.**
They’re making no secret of their plans to strip away my committee assignments — and those of other Democratic colleagues — once they’re in control.
_But here’s the deal, team. With your help, we won’t let them stop us. We refuse to be bullied by a bunch of MAGA extremists who will say anything and do anything to propel themselves into power._
[**Can you pitch in immediately to help me raise $10,000 online before the ball drops on December 31 to continue fighting for our democratic values and progressive programs in the 118th Congress?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56518276/385268561/950074808?refcode=E19892-20221228-EOY1-SL-DeadlineOther-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzU0ZGUzOS1lOTg2LWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=39sduDNe5cF-M7hdnbv5Vn35iBixgZnAeYs6QBdUrkA=)
