I’m not going to beat around the bush, folks. We’re heading into difficult territory. The Republicans have the slimmest of majorities, but their party is in total disarray. Kevin McCarthy is frantically making a corrupt bargain with extremists like Majorie Taylor Greene in a desperate attempt to secure the speaker’s gavel. While my Democratic colleagues and I are ready to work for the American people from day one, congressional Republicans are spinning out of control. As he carries out his corrupt bargain, McCarthy refuses to identify the committee chairs until he secures Speaker votes. It will be days — if not weeks — before Congress is functioning. However, none of the Republican infighting means we can rest up, even for a minute. Democrats need to be prepared to fight twice as hard to protect our rights and democracy itself. | = McCarthy, Marjorie Taylor Greene, Jim Jordan, Lauren Boebert, and others on the Republican side are making it clear they intend to exact revenge on me for exposing their extremism over the past two years. They’re making no secret of their plans to strip away my committee assignments — and those of other Democratic colleagues — once they’re in control. But here’s the deal, team. body:
A quick recap with Team Beshear Peter — It’s that time of the year again!

We’re wrapping up 2022 amid the best two-year period for economic growth in our commonwealth’s history! From huge investments, record-shattering job growth, another budget surplus, and the lowest-ever unemployment rates we’ve ever seen, our commonwealth is heading in the right direction, but we can't stop now.

As we turn the page to 2023, Team Beshear is focused on building a successful re-election campaign for Andy to protect the progress we've made for Kentuckians. We set a goal to raise $25,000 before the new year, and we're counting on this grassroots team to help us get there!

[**Will you donate before our final end-of-year fundraising deadline to help us start 2023 strong? Your donation will help re-elect Andy and keep our commonwealth moving forward!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56504396/385216168/-1742588925?refcode=em22_221228_EOY1_fnd_gq_act___TB_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_221228_EOY1_fnd_gq_act___TB_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Nzk0YTQ1MS1jMDg2LWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bjiFVOv9thkB08wnwzamOSch5lqmFycgGsDkK-GshzA=) [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56504399/385216176/-1742588925?refcode=em22_221228_EOY1_fnd_gq_act___TB_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_221228_EOY1_fnd_gq_act___TB_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Nzk0YTQ1MS1jMDg2LWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bjiFVOv9thkB08wnwzamOSch5lqmFycgGsDkK-GshzA=) Andy’s been hard at work supporting Kentuckians by bringing good-paying jobs to our state, making access to affordable health care and essential medication a reality, and helping families impacted by devastating natural disasters.

**FILM SYNOPSIS** For the past century, America has been the world leader in ideas, invention, and innovation. Developing new technologies to solve complex issues as well as tools to make our lives more comfortable and efficient is the realization of the American dream for many. But our grip on ‘world leader’ status is loosening as China has emerged as a powerful political and industrial force. Today, China is threatening American innovation by exploiting weaknesses in US patent protection, and big tech is letting them get away with it. _Innovation Race_ explores these critical issues impacting all Americans, and proposes solutions for how we can restore US dominance in invention, technology and innovation.

clean_body: | | | Have you had a chance to catch our latest documentary, Innovation Race yet? Did you know you can watch it for only $3.99 right now? But don’t wait, because this deal will end January 1, 2023! Virtual Cinema is a great way to watch a movie, and $3.99 is a screaming deal, so you really won’t want to miss out! It is a truly riveting film, and it will provide you with important information that you will need as we begin 2023. And, it couldn’t be easier to watch it. to get your tickets and then watch it whenever you want! In Liberty, Jenny Beth Martin | FILM SYNOPSIS For the past century, America has been the world leader in ideas, invention, and innovation. Developing new technologies to solve complex issues as well as tools to make our lives more comfortable and efficient is the realization of the American dream for many. But our grip on ‘world leader’ status is loosening as China has emerged as a powerful political and industrial force. Today, China is threatening American innovation by exploiting weaknesses in US patent protection, and big tech is letting them get away with it. Innovation Race explores these critical issues impacting all Americans, and proposes solutions for how we can restore US dominance in invention, technology and innovation. | | | | | | Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc. operates as a social welfare organization under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Rep. Ruben Gallego is moving towards challenging party-ditching clown, Kyrsten Sinema, for Arizona's Senate seat should he have the resources. Your support this week will help guide his decision.
body:
He should run!
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T709c8f0e-8843-4d9a-a3b7-80e20447155a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, I'm really excited! But also, I'm very nervous. **_Rep. Ruben Gallego is moving towards challenging party-ditching clown, Kyrsten Sinema_** _,_**_ for Arizona's Senate seat should he have the resources_** _._ [**_Can you join us in rushing Gallego $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can afford to Gallego as he makes his decision!? We must convince him NOW that we need him in this race for the future of the Senate, democracy and our families._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tddb9454b-c70c-449e-88f7-29ec5661a23a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Two things have happened since we wrote you about Senator Sinema's cynical & selfish decision to leave the Democratic Party:_ **1. **_The Daily Beast published a piece sourced by former Sinema staffers on working for her. It's what you'd expect, from how she "expects aides to do weekly grocery runs" and other personal tasks in "clear violation of Senate ethics rules" to how she'll only meet constituents for "THREE MINUTES" each during one 30 minute block each week. Unless you're rich. Her schedule is open for fundraisers "during regular work hours."_ **2. **_Not surprisingly, with her behavior, nobody likes her. _**_A new poll came out showing she'd get only 13% of the vote in a three-way race against Gallego and Kari Lake, with Lake at 41% and Gallego at 40%, a statistical tie._** **_Yet, that Kari Lake could potentially take the seat because of Sinema, is why we must support Ruben Gallego right now. 2024 will be a tough cycle as we'll have more Senate seats vulnerable than Republicans. We cannot lose this one._**
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE: Stand with Ruben Gallego and the Democratic majority**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfa08ca0c-bdde-4d02-afc8-667683d396f4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | **_Gallego just sent out an email saying it's "one of the most important decisions of my life" making clear he'll need the resources to take on Sinema's billionaire backers, and how "our final FEC deadline before I make my decision ends this week. And I'm using it as a marker to answer" whether or not he should run._** **_We need Ruben Gallego to replace Senator Sinema as a real progressive that represents the state of Arizona, and we can't let Sinema throw the seat to Lake!_** [**_Can you join us in rushing Gallego $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can afford to Gallego as he makes his decision!? We must convince him NOW that we need him in this race for the future of the Senate, democracy and our families._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8306243b-3af7-48df-8603-e00b0bb2a774/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **Thank you folks, and again, Happy Holidays from Blue Amp Action.** **Cliff**

We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can. | | | | | | | | Peter, I'm really excited! But also, I'm very nervous. Rep. Ruben Gallego is moving towards challenging party-ditching clown, Kyrsten Sinema , for Arizona's Senate seat should he have the resources . Two things have happened since we wrote you about Senator Sinema's cynical & selfish decision to leave the Democratic Party: 1. The Daily Beast published a piece sourced by former Sinema staffers on working for her. It's what you'd expect, from how she "expects aides to do weekly grocery runs" and other personal tasks in "clear violation of Senate ethics rules" to how she'll only meet constituents for "THREE MINUTES" each during one 30 minute block each week. Unless you're rich. Her schedule is open for fundraisers "during regular work hours." 2. Not surprisingly, with her behavior, nobody likes her. A new poll came out showing she'd get only 13% of the vote in a three-way race against Gallego and Kari Lake, with Lake at 41% and Gallego at 40%, a statistical tie. Yet, that Kari Lake could potentially take the seat because of Sinema, is why we must support Ruben Gallego right now. 2024 will be a tough cycle as we'll have more Senate seats vulnerable than Republicans. We cannot lose this one. | | | | | | | | | Gallego just sent out an email saying it's "one of the most important decisions of my life" making clear he'll need the resources to take on Sinema's billionaire backers, and how "our final FEC deadline before I make my decision ends this week. And I'm using it as a marker to answer" whether or not he should run. We need Ruben Gallego to replace Senator Sinema as a real progressive that represents the state of Arizona, and we can't let Sinema throw the seat to Lake! Thank you folks, and again, Happy Holidays from Blue Amp Action. name: Gene Karpinski, LCV
subject: [Time Sensitive] We need to mobilize NOW -- EPA considering new air standards
body:
__DEADLINE: December 31. |
---

|
Peter -- After passing the most significant climate legislation in history this year, we're looking at 2023 with a chance to build on our successes.

**The truth is -- we need your help, and it can't wait. Here's the situation:**

Right now, the White House is considering EPA's proposal to limit toxic soot particle pollution. We have a real shot at reining in methane emissions from the oil and gas industry -- _AND_ setting stricter limits on climate pollution from cars and trucks.

The problem is that corporate polluters are running major pressure campaigns on the Biden administration right now that could derail these decisions. Biden can safeguard the health, well-being, and safety of our environment -- especially in Black, Indigenous, and other communities of color that are disproportionately impacted by pollution due to the toxic legacy of environmental racism -- by acting on critical environmental issues _now_ , but that will only happen if our movement speaks with one voice. To pull that off, we need your help:********

[There are only a few days left to give before we close the books for the year. Can you help our campaign for climate action and environmental justice hit the ground running in 2023? Make a gift today -- even $5 helps us reach our $25,000 goal.](https://links.messages.lcv.)
[](https://links.messages.lcv.)
This year proved what's possible when the environmental movement speaks with one voice. **Congress passed the Inflation Reduction Act,** the most consequential climate legislation in the country's history. And we convinced President Biden to **expand protections for public lands** with the historic designation of Camp Hale-Continental Divide National Monument.

******We need to keep the momentum going, Peter.** Right now, and throughout 2023, we need to:
* ****Drive tens of thousands of messages into the White House to ensure that the EPA limits toxic pollution.
* Keep the pressure on the Biden-Harris administration to continue taking executive actions across the entire federal government that will advance climate action and environmental justice.
* Ensure just, equitable, and effective implementation of the Inflation Reduction Act at the federal level, and at the state, tribal, and local levels with our 32 state affiliates.
* Double down on our partnerships with Indigenous and other communities to secure permanent protections for public lands and places that honor our diverse stories.

[We can win even more climate and environmental justice progress -- but we need your help. Please make a gift before Saturday's deadline. We need to raise $25,000 before December 31 so we can secure historic climate action in 2023. Even $5 helps.](https://links.messages.lcv.)

THANK YOU, Peter, for everything you've done this year, and for all that you will do in the next one.

Onward,

Gene Karpinski
President
League of Conservation Voters |

---

| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=9043070&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTY0MDQ3MDczOQS2&spReportId=MTY0MDQ3MDczOQS2). [Click here to unsubscribe](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=9043070&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTY0MDQ3MDczOQS2&spReportId=MTY0MDQ3MDczOQS2) from our supporter list. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](mailto:feedback@lcv.org), or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

[740 15th St NW, 7th Floor
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/_) |

I hope you’re enjoying the holiday, Peter. Today, I’m asking you to sign up for a recurring donation to my campaign. I know that’s a big ask, but I think you’ll understand just why it’s so important once I briefly explain. Many of my supporters don’t realize just how instrumental monthly, recurring donations were to our victory in November. We couldn’t always predict how the headwinds would shift or what attacks would come our way, but knowing we could count on recurring contributions was _huge_ in helping us plan accordingly. Not only that, there were days I knew I wouldn’t be able to fundraise while I prepared for debates, town halls, or interviews. **Believe me,****Peter , having the peace of mind that we could expect a modest wave of recurring contributions to hit our account was a game-changer.** I’m set to begin my first term in Congress next week, which means _even less_ time for fundraising as I focus on passing legislation. That makes your recurring donations all the more important in building momentum for the next election. So I have to ask: [**_Will you sign up to chip in a monthly contribution of_****$5**** _or more to help us get my re-election efforts off to a strong start?_**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zSJ2-Su0o8Ni7LeDh2MrPP8m9EA___VeQGIzy9cIaJbNzI5UPp9owN00_QMUL0IXsObImxVhG4YGqSWDkMRHl5At5L7Gqj88-NrCPYzE-7-OZ8xvtSUDmpIEI4MztZGm1f198QFzrVGOHx8dtdFSRikiyK9OzRQsoUvAbSwHPGQ6OjEFCLn6aPtfNqmKWayiMtWqHGIlDqNFxHC0OEnn1wfLq04lm7-EB0yjLq_p7MUbCxaSypsaF7ffsscRrod3pVzGkvzx6fjFzMXBJAXGT-3x9wM3zuYCHnvLUIT2WNbcn7dX67cz74s_xfhZuzt-juFbUJLot5wB8kGWJV4V22OYke4ekBnQhu32eWard2vTFf1pO0e876s6__Fndzery_hguJn4KsYvFEb601Qi-smK4piM1onbshJyIzOSssZh9gznw0NLwtpRNHeby1WQ6_YbzyFG1I9lzejaDh3njQyqZv6Hm-03i6RHhe8Rkhjw/3sd/RtjirdvLTJaO2jnJChKc6g/h1/QukSsWsDuFNaWx-pwhpgP2qR476N99pvdJIJDn-NfbQ)

See It Here Experts say Hunter Biden’s legal bills are $100K a month, but no one knows who’s paying The ongoing legal problems of President Joe Biden’s adult son Hunter Biden may spawn their own legal problems, with experts wondering where the supposedly bankrupt entrepreneur is getting the estimated $100,000 a month needed to pay his attorneys. Read more You Might Like Draft DeSantis For President! America is in grave danger from the Radical Left and their failed, socialist, woke policies. The America-First agenda MUST be revived. ACT NOW! BREAKING: Major Decision Made On Kari Lake’s Election Lawsuit Maricopa County Superior Judge Peter Thompson ruled that two of Kari Lake’s 10 different claims can go to trial. The claims allowed by Judge Thompson involve the breakdowns/malfunctioning of printers, along with Election Day and ballot chain of custody issues. Lake’s lawsuit alleged that between 15,603 and 29,257 Republicans were disenfranchised who would have likely voted for Lake, according to Read more You Might Like style="" Unsubscribe American Update 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: VoteVets
subject: A real person wrote this email
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
Can we be honest with you for a second?
#
Derek -
Can we be honest with you for a second?
We know as well as anyone the constant flood of emails and text messages people are getting as we approach the year-end fundraising deadline. And we know it can be a bit frustrating.
We know it because a real person wrote this email — a Marine Corps Veteran, a progressive, a human who gets these emails and texts as well.
But let us explain why this message is so important.
If everyone who got this email contributed even $10, we’d reach our fundraising goals for all of 2023. But we don’t expect everyone to give.
We do ask, however, because we know you believe in our work and when you can chip in, you will.
That’s how this works. A lot of people doing what they can when they can to make a huge difference.
[**Please use this link to contribute $5, $10 or whatever you can afford today. VoteVets is running behind on our year-end fundraising goals and the only way we’ll get there is lots and lots of donations all adding up.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-dec22.pX32s6&refcode=em221228-1-15&t=1&akid=7246%2E3013755%2E8yVaXC)
| [CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-dec22.pX32s6&refcode=em221228-1-15&t=2&akid=7246%2E3013755%2E8yVaXC)
---
This is no lie.
Most people don’t know that almost all of the donations VoteVets receives comes from people chipping in small amounts of money.
So when you see our ads on the air moving polls...
When you see us out there combating right-wing disinformation targeting Veterans...
When you see our work helping pass legislation like the PACT Act...
It’s donations in response to emails like that make it happen.
So with time running out, we’re asking:
[**If everyone reading this gave $10 we’d CRUSH our goals. But not everyone gives. So we’re counting on the people who can give and know the stakes ahead to chip in what they can. It all adds up when we all do our part.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-dec22.pX32s6&refcode=em221228-1-15&t=3&akid=7246%2E3013755%2E8yVaXC)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Rush $10 now](https://act.votevets.org/go/2934?c0=vv-pac-em-dec22.eb_Obm&refcode=em221228-1-15&t=22&akid=7246%2E3013755%2E8yVaXC)**
---
****
| **[Rush $25 now](https://act.votevets.org/go/2935?c0=vv-pac-em-dec22.HCzzxr&refcode=em221228-1-15&t=23&akid=7246%2E3013755%2E8yVaXC)**

| | **[Rush $50 now](https://act.votevets.org/go/2928?c0=vv-pac-em-dec22.1Y-X16&refcode=em221228-1-15&t=24&akid=7246%2E3013755%2E8yVaXC)**
---
****
| **[Rush $100 now](https://act.votevets.org/go/2929?c0=vv-pac-em-dec22.ypdOja&refcode=em221228-1-15&t=25&akid=7246%2E3013755%2E8yVaXC)**
---
****

****
| **[Another Amount](https://act.votevets.org/go/2933?c0=vv-pac-em-dec22.8cNmpq&refcode=em221228-1-15&t=27&akid=7246%2E3013755%2E8yVaXC)**

name: Senator Chris Van Hollen
subject: Senate Update: Finishing the Year on a High Note and Preparing for What’s Next
body:
| | | [Click here to open this e-mail in its own browser window](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet//view_newsletter_setup.aspx?link=SenVanHollen%2501163653%2501100620%2b-%2b12-28-2022%2beNewsletter%250115499.39800517.5994226.7517223%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Friend%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Silver%2bSpring%252c%2bMD%2b20906%2501Friend%2501) | [Click here to open a plain text version of this email](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet//view_newsletter_setup.aspx?plain_text=Y&link=SenVanHollen%2501163653%2501100620%2b-%2b12-28-2022%2beNewsletter%250115499.39800517.5994226.7517223%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Friend%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Silver%2bSpring%252c%2bMD%2b20906%2501Friend%2501)
---|---
| | | **December 28, 2022** |
---|---|---|---
| | |
### Delivering Big Wins for Maryland and the Nation
As the year winds down, Congress is wrapping up one of the most productive two-year periods in recent history. Despite the challenges of the COVID-19 pandemic and all its impacts, the 117th Session has made historic advances on several fronts.

This progress began nearly two years ago, when we passed the [American Rescue Plan](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15499.39800517.5994226.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2foutreach.senate.gov%2fiqextranet%2fiqClickTrk.aspx%3f%26cid%3dSenVanHollen%26crop%3d16077QQQ39647206QQQ5994229QQQ7967967%26report_id%3d%26redirect%3dhttps%253a%252f%252fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%252fnews%252fpress-releases%252fvan-hollen-american-rescue-plan-delivers-bold-urgent-relief-to-maryland%26redir_log%3d788920644526872&redir_log=777203195472121) - which got vaccine shots in arms, helped shore up small businesses, and gave our economy the boost it needed to prevent long-term damage. We followed that key measure with another piece of ground-breaking legislation: the [infrastructure modernization law](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15499.39800517.5994226.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2foutreach.senate.gov%2fiqextranet%2fiqClickTrk.aspx%3f%26cid%3dSenVanHollen%26crop%3d16077QQQ39647206QQQ5994229QQQ7967967%26report_id%3d%26redirect%3dhttps%253a%252f%252fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%252fnews%252fpress-releases%252fvan-hollen-statement-on-passage-of-the-bipartisan-infrastructure-bill-including-key-maryland-priorities%26redir_log%3d119460582231107&redir_log=670421902172359) - the single largest investment in our nation's transportation networks, ports, communications, and water systems in decades. Through this law, we're delivering over $7 billion to Maryland over the next five years for roads, bridges, broadband, transit, water systems, and more - to fix the aging infrastructure of the past and build the physical backbone of the 21st century. And, in addition to those guaranteed funds coming to our state, this initiative also includes nearly $150 billion in competitive national grant funding - and Maryland counties and cities have already begun to compete successfully for those funds.

This year, Congress kicked our efforts into even higher gear with a series of major legislative achievements - from the [PACT Act](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15499.39800517.5994226.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2foutreach.senate.gov%2fiqextranet%2fiqClickTrk.aspx%3f%26cid%3dSenVanHollen%26crop%3d16077QQQ39647206QQQ5994229QQQ7967967%26report_id%3d%26redirect%3dhttps%253a%252f%252fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%252fnews%252fpress-releases%252fhouse-passes-veterans-health-care-bill-with-funding-for-two-maryland-veterans-clinics%26redir_log%3d547893018042973&redir_log=816059812582224) to provide better health care for our veterans, to the [Bipartisan Safer Communities Act](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15499.39800517.5994226.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2foutreach.senate.gov%2fiqextranet%2fiqClickTrk.aspx%3f%26cid%3dSenVanHollen%26crop%3d16077QQQ39647206QQQ5994229QQQ7967967%26report_id%3d%26redirect%3dhttps%253a%252f%252fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%252fnews%252fpress-releases%252fvan-hollen-statement-on-the-bipartisan-safer-communities-act%26redir_log%3d815685874911798&redir_log=023815200982047) to take a meaningful step forward on gun safety, to the [CHIPS and Science Act](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15499.39800517.5994226.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2foutreach.senate.gov%2fiqextranet%2fiqClickTrk.aspx%3f%26cid%3dSenVanHollen%26crop%3d16077QQQ39647206QQQ5994229QQQ7967967%26report_id%3d%26redirect%3dhttps%253a%252f%252fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%252fnews%252fpress-releases%252fvan-hollen-provisions-pass-senate-in-bipartisan-bill-to-enhance-american-competitiveness-in-technology-innovation%26redir_log%3d345662358851178&redir_log=144921733292434) to sharpen America's competitive edge and bring manufacturing jobs back home. Finally, in the culmination of many of our efforts, we succeeded in passing the [Inflation Reduction Act](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15499.39800517.5994226.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2foutreach.senate.gov%2fiqextranet%2fiqClickTrk.aspx%3f%26cid%3dSenVanHollen%26crop%3d16077QQQ39647206QQQ5994229QQQ7967967%26report_id%3d%26redirect%3dhttps%253a%252f%252fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%252fnews%252fpress-releases%252fvan-hollen-inflation-reduction-act-marks-transformative-progress-on-climate-change-prescription-drug-costs-and-corporate-tax-reform-%26redir_log%3d213584054321305&redir_log=932792720092562), which will help us lower the price of Medicare prescription drugs, confront the climate crisis, and ensure that wealthy corporations pay more of their fair share. This transformative measure will help build a better future for our nation and our world.

We've gotten a lot done this Congress - but our work is far from over. Going forward, we need to make sure all of the federal resources we signed into law get out the door and into our communities. Now is our chance to implement the legislative victories we've secured in a targeted and equitable way - so we can strengthen Maryland's infrastructure, ensure true public safety, lower the cost of everyday items, fight the climate crisis, ensure greater access to affordable health care, open the doors to opportunity even wider for our children and Maryland families, and grow more shared prosperity for all. I know we'll meet those challenges head-on by working together.
---
### Keeping Maryland Strong
As we've worked to achieve our year-end priorities, I've partnered with colleagues from both parties to pass legislation that will directly benefit Marylanders everywhere.

This month, Congress passed [a major bill to fund the government](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15499.39800517.5994226.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2foutreach.senate.gov%2fiqextranet%2fiqClickTrk.aspx%3f%26cid%3dSenVanHollen%26crop%3d16077QQQ39647206QQQ5994229QQQ7967967%26report_id%3d%26redirect%3dhttps%253a%252f%252fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%252fnews%252fpress-releases%252fvan-hollen-votes-in-favor-of-government-funding-bill-secures-key-maryland-priorities%26redir_log%3d868805560766969&redir_log=680107486222221) through next fall, preventing a shameful shutdown and investing in the priorities of our nation over the next year. I fought for key provisions in that bill to improve Americans' access to child care, expand educational and workforce training opportunities, provide quality and affordable health care, conserve our environment and the Chesapeake Bay, and build more shared prosperity. I also worked to include major wins for our state - from historic resources for Bay clean-up efforts to a fairer process for moving forward to select the site for a new FBI headquarters in our region. The bill also bolsters the work of Marylanders at the heart of our federal workforce - backing our civilian employees, advancing ground-breaking work at our research agencies and medical institutions like NIH, and helping provide services to our constituents. These highlights are in addition to the more than $215 million in [direct federal investments](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15499.39800517.5994226.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2foutreach.senate.gov%2fiqextranet%2fiqClickTrk.aspx%3f%26cid%3dSenVanHollen%26crop%3d16077QQQ39647206QQQ5994229QQQ7967967%26report_id%3d%26redirect%3dhttps%253a%252f%252fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%252ffy23-community-funding-projects-secured%26redir_log%3d579572642228510&redir_log=97085242181723) that I helped secure alongside Senator Cardin for local projects in communities across Maryland - to boost economic opportunity, enhance public safety, and expand access to health care and many other important services. While I was deeply disappointed that Republicans refused to support a number of key priorities, it was vital that we pass a new government funding bill instead of kicking the can down the road. On balance, this package will meaningfully invest in the critical priorities of our state and nation.

On top of that, I fought successfully to secure provisions from my [HBCU RISE Act](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15499.39800517.5994226.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2foutreach.senate.gov%2fiqextranet%2fiqClickTrk.aspx%3f%26cid%3dSenVanHollen%26crop%3d16077QQQ39647206QQQ5994229QQQ7967967%26report_id%3d%26redirect%3dhttps%253a%252f%252fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%252fnews%252fpress-releases%252fvan-hollen-tillis-secure-provision-to-boost-hbcu-msi-research-capacity-in-fy23-defense-bill-legislation-heads-to-the-presidents-desk%26redir_log%3d450966187861292&redir_log=363940282549) to spur more advanced research investment in Historically Black Colleges and Universities and Minority-Serving Institutions - including Morgan State University and UMES here in Maryland - through the annual defense bill passed by Congress. I also worked to include provisions in that legislation from my [Service to the Fleet Act](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15499.39800517.5994226.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2foutreach.senate.gov%2fiqextranet%2fiqClickTrk.aspx%3f%26cid%3dSenVanHollen%26crop%3d16077QQQ39647206QQQ5994229QQQ7967967%26report_id%3d%26redirect%3dhttps%253a%252f%252fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%252fnews%252fpress-releases%252fvan-hollen-cardin-secure-authorization-for-coast-guard-yard-infrastructure-modernization-in-fy23-defense-bill-legislation-heads-to-the-presidents-desk%26redir_log%3d57194000161426&redir_log=816268874512681) to authorize $636 million for a major infrastructure overhaul of the Curtis Bay Coast Guard Yard in Maryland that will go toward upgrading the WWII-era facilities there. The Yard is the Coast Guard's sole shipbuilding and major repair facility as well as a critical economic driver for Maryland, directly and indirectly creating thousands of good-paying skilled union jobs. We know the Yard and the hard-working men and women who keep it running need the proper infrastructure and equipment to continue to provide top-notch support for our nation's homeland defense, which is why our push to deliver these essential funds is so important.

Lastly, this bill includes language I authored to address a concern I've heard about directly from constituents regarding the [loss of their documents when applying for passports](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15499.39800517.5994226.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2foutreach.senate.gov%2fiqextranet%2fiqClickTrk.aspx%3f%26cid%3dSenVanHollen%26crop%3d16077QQQ39647206QQQ5994229QQQ7967967%26report_id%3d%26redirect%3dhttps%253a%252f%252fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%252fnews%252fpress-releases%252fvan-hollen-secures-maryland-priorities-in-defense-bill-votes-to-send-legislation-to-the-presidents-desk%26redir_log%3d979754135581098&redir_log=024320180232354). My new provision will ensure that passports and the documents that accompany them can be sent back to applicants by tracked mail so folks don't encounter these problems.

Taken together, these provisions will improve the lives of everyday Marylanders and help our nation thrive for years to come.
### Fighting for Justice, Equality, and Love
No American should face discrimination - no matter whom they love or where they live. But in the wake of the Supreme Court's polarizing actions over the past few years and efforts by Republican-controlled state legislatures to strip away rights that Americans hold dear, it's clear that basic constitutional protections are under assault. That includes protections for interracial couples and same-sex couples everywhere. We knew Congress needed to act - and that's what we did.

The Respect for Marriage Act promises married couples that their union will be given equal recognition and protection across the United States, providing the peace of mind that no court, state legislature, or local government can interfere with their marriage. I was proud to [cast my vote in favor of this bill](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15499.39800517.5994226.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2foutreach.senate.gov%2fiqextranet%2fiqClickTrk.aspx%3f%26cid%3dSenVanHollen%26crop%3d16077QQQ39647206QQQ5994229QQQ7967967%26report_id%3d%26redirect%3dhttps%253a%252f%252fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%252fnews%252fpress-releases%252fvan-hollen-statement-on-senate-passage-of-respect-for-marriage-act%26redir_log%3d59660914709834&redir_log=04244785912079), and [I joined President Biden at the White House](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15499.39800517.5994226.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2foutreach.senate.gov%2fiqextranet%2fiqClickTrk.aspx%3f%26cid%3dSenVanHollen%26crop%3d16077QQQ39647206QQQ5994229QQQ7967967%26report_id%3d%26redirect%3dhttps%253a%252f%252ftwitter.com%252fChrisVanHollen%252fstatus%252f1602800630837510144%26redir_log%3d427845359472372&redir_log=557344136821606) as his signature affirmed what we already know to be true: love wins!

This is an important step forward, but we have so much farther to go in ensuring that all of our communities are afforded equal rights and equal protection under the law - and I'll keep fighting to ensure equal and just treatment for every American.
### Ringing in the New Year
The New Year marks a season of optimism, as we look ahead toward brighter days. We've accomplished so much already, but I know we can do even more in the weeks, months, and years to come. And we're entering 2023 with a group of public servants from all across our state who are determined to tackle the challenges we face. From my colleagues in the Maryland congressional delegation, to new leadership in Annapolis, to strong local leaders and dedicated community partners, Team Maryland is poised to accomplish many good things. I look forward to working with our new Governor-Elect Wes Moore, Lieutenant Governor-Elect Aruna Miller, and all Marylanders to move our state and our country forward.

It's in that spirit that I want to wish everyone a season of love, light, and hope as we ring in the New Year, and [I look forward to hearing from you soon](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15499.39800517.5994226.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2foutreach.senate.gov%2fiqextranet%2fiqClickTrk.aspx%3f%26cid%3dSenVanHollen%26crop%3d16077QQQ39647206QQQ5994229QQQ7967967%26report_id%3d%26redirect%3dhttps%253a%252f%252fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%252fcontact%26redir_log%3d475918421268285&redir_log=482328203571492) - so we can hit the ground running in 2023!

Chris Van Hollen
[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15499.39800517.5994226.7517223&report_id=Facebook&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.facebook.com%2fchrisvanhollen%2f&redir_log=328155479639284 "Facebook")[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15499.39800517.5994226.7517223&report_id=Twitter&redirect=https%3a%2f%2ftwitter.com%2fChrisVanHollen&redir_log=957640916473241 "Twitter")[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15499.39800517.5994226.7517223&report_id=Instagram&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.instagram.com%2fchrisvanhollen%2f&redir_log=389295287187292 "Instagram")[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15499.39800517.5994226.7517223&report_id=YouTube&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.youtube.com%2fuser%2fRepChrisVanHollen&redir_log=463627374976326 "YouTube")[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15499.39800517.5994226.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fmedium.com%2f%40ChrisVanHollen&redir_log=575666539451239)

We followed that key measure with another piece of ground-breaking legislation: the - the single largest investment in our nation's transportation networks, ports, communications, and water systems in decades. Through this law, we're delivering over $7 billion to Maryland over the next five years for roads, bridges, broadband, transit, water systems, and more - to fix the aging infrastructure of the past and build the physical backbone of the 21st century. Your support will show the strength of this team and how committed we are to upholding our democratic values.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56511014/385241300/-953791543?refcode=1228&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85MzczOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNWQxNzBlYS1jYzg2LWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ioa1Tm346tMXZeLKJfmRK5NDw0UyySqgxtZ2sZ9uZwU=) While it seems early to be thinking about 2024, Trump, Kevin McCarthy, Kari Lake, and the right-wing GOP are already scheming how to defeat Democrats with crazy tactics and extremist ideas. What we raise before midnight on New Year’s Eve will illustrate one of two things to them: that their Q-Anon, bird-brained agenda may work, or that the American people choose democracy, honesty, equality, and integrity above all. Let’s stand on the side of progress for all. Support Gwen’s early efforts today please.

name: DLCC.org
subject: President Obama: “It’s within your power”(he means YOU!)
body:

clean_body: The path to regaining our majority in the House runs right through PA-07. | = | Peter, We’re just days away from the final FEC fundraising deadline of 2022, so my team and I have set an ambitious must-hit goal of $10,000. = | = The path to regaining our majority in the House runs right through PA-07. Holding this seat will require significant early investments in campaign infrastructure and voter outreach, and a strong FEC report at the start of this new campaign cycle is the first step. I know I’ve asked for a lot this year, and I am so grateful to have supporters like you in my corner. But I also know that with Republicans in the majority, all of the progress we’ve made in the past two years could be undone in an instant. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Susan | | = Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress Susan Wild for Congress 1636 N Cedar Crest Blvd. #183 Allentown, PA 18104 United States If you wish to contribute by check, you can do so at the address above. Friend, This is Attorney General Jason Miyares. Early voting has begun for the State Senate special election and Kevin Adams needs your support at the polls! Kevin Adams is a tough-on-crime conservative who we can trust to back the blue and crack down on violent crime in our neighborhoods. Friend, can I count on you to go to the polls during early voting this week and support Kevin Adams for State Senate? **Here’s what you need to know:** If you live in Virginia Beach, you can vote early for Kevin Adams at the Municipal Center, Building 14 at 2449 Princess Anne Road, Virginia Beach, VA on Monday through Friday from 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM. If you live in Norfolk, you can vote early for Kevin Adams at 810 Union Street, Suite 100, Norfolk, VA on Monday through Friday from 9 AM to 5 PM. On December 31st and January 7th, there will be Saturday voting at both locations from 9 AM to 5 PM. Your support for my friend, Republican Kevin Adams, in this SPECIAL ELECTION for State Senate is critical. If you have any questions about early voting, you can visit Kevin's website at _**[www.kevinadamsforsenate.com/vote](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=59877ff83b45486f89b666104a61e968&_e=ch9v1XYN_lhtUd4eSA_SrJuvn-3uUTFQz4cp9RZDL4u_fknZRJHnm7tcFgHpu8F2S51D2GspFfKN24xz-OH4Wkr3N8R1hzGaI-96cyCnrDcvSmYFNM3P_P8E-ffJr3ecQFXTOgY0s9YfJT7OI2v2GW_2sTJ_qTmyjG461rA45PvLf39tLn0UPNatJhgtxbTsAwOj4EczfmMpzzV4q-P7PeMt0Vvds_0Y1N353fezEf4%3D)**_ or call our team with any questions at 757-786-9226. Thank you for your support,Attorney General Jason Miyares **P.S. If you've already cast your ballot for Kevin Adams, could I also ask you to make a critical donation in the final days of this special election?** _[**Your donation of $500, $250, $100, or even $50 will go a long way in helping us build this war chest and defend this seat!**](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=59877ff83b45486f89b666104a61e968&_e=-Imdb2k-PrNSxuoopbfAGq0ox-dzxqj6rQghSzu1QP4ic6V62cnRrKYjOTZOoIZjr4UcfURQrcO_oQrIUrQ84c947ts7R-wlffo1n1fuoy7ijKDMiDi3RxIdmsfCqKWq4pIZriIOBI4M1vf3W3r9gGyFPCfD7ffkSnN3vHM9cUyurlUyGlQW_LckkZDJue-YK-04lClmLfnzPY35M2OB09-T5kFL6vfneOBVEc84CU7vHptQTU4zER3P_54rxQSq)_

| | Peter,

You’re probably wondering why just weeks after a successful runoff election we’re emailing you again asking for a donation. We hope you’ll let us explain why we can’t take any time off, but if you’re already with us, [**_you can make a contribution here_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56512372/385247066/75460995?amount=10&refcode=20221228.1_DPG_12AM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MzcxOGEwZS1kMTg2LWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TLcnzCuoOyeinEjYGSRpo9qXqbZuaiQsBFqsEGS1TwQ=).

Winning elections means building massive grassroots teams who can reach voters and empower volunteers to organize within their communities. All of this takes **_a lot_** of resources – from human power to the technology needed to effectively communicate with voters. On top of that, we’re up against Republicans who have been spending record amounts of money to try and win elections.

This is why we can’t afford to take any time off. Making long term investments and continuing to keep up the momentum is going to be critical going into 2023, and you know Republicans are going to come after us with a vengeance after big losses this year. [**_Can you rush a donation to our end-of-year fund to ensure we can start next year strong? body:
Mike has accomplished so much this year, with more in the works for 2023.| | | [](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=6d4020899c0740688b9aabee282907ae&_e=EFmy4WCX8igSUzzSM8red35YLYhayopSW3M3YA5-wFsCFKEj8-n_gZCsz_mU5q42n9ysOU2M-FIz1pI9_YP65f4dct4dpowxKIPySvXb6zHZh1PPKnaXVpI3NykbstAVTmE8e-R-e3E3U6UNMflBlY7ZGX-PbciixLpdW2njst2jvZIMtFju7yTJ1h3IyrHIqOkTuJmbh9YfhangEyNotA%3D%3D)
---
| | Peter, Over the last 12 months, Mike has led the charge to advance conservative policies and make our nation stronger, all while working tirelessly to ensure Northern Wisconsin remains the best place to live, work, and raise a family. As 2022 comes to a close, we want to share some of Mike’s top accomplishments over the last year: **Gallagher Makes WI-08 History with Record-Breaking Victory**
---
[](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=6d4020899c0740688b9aabee282907ae&_e=EFmy4WCX8igSUzzSM8red35YLYhayopSW3M3YA5-wFu927fzSaQat-HYhfX7a9qFdBiB8zl_nvXEz7ToMhJqG2f8G7OHcCvelTXafYRFPGFiAw9cua_0PPT56onFIYd1HEuZ2dFPmrIkv-jAzK4u4WoXd_KwOXNXiaXtwfVvCa9shcGkuAIEIEXmW_3holSsvJ7QZDbnVbSTStfUXRReBJbqDJnQKkRQvIbughCASdl1Uha_HZWDbrehd5ThDZoF)
---
**Bottom Line:** Mike _Gallagher garnered more than 70% of the vote and won by nearly 60%, which is the_ _largest margin_ _of victory in the history of the Eighth Congressional District, and won all 11 counties in the district._ **Gallagher’s Appointed to Chair China Select Committee**
---
[](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=6d4020899c0740688b9aabee282907ae&_e=EFmy4WCX8igSUzzSM8red4SwLGdQj4eqYl0Otcivf99nEhqVz61NcY8wuvx9XfGpHUBdTMFxOSMjum5O_N06XQ6GadMKRh5D7koQBTtF4NNJtnwInTaZ-hEvA1L4Pq0lMmRYtjBSCQGATXOn9x8G8fxGmiwSGfqhGeDa_2IU8Ci6f6YWny3FmRG_Zmo2VLPgFPsFKHLhmfXdYIQPN1GOgAVBixV-1L9eG5b5a8l_DCG8CJQxa8RPW5EhDJEiY-SwtbRUhO3s9OH0vQ-ls2I1dLKyvILjZVaYAtH6DhT4JyhkVjispADG3MSmZQ9PMYl8dg1rOaSfzqsV8zWqqGwmVw%3D%3D)
---
**Bottom Line:**_"’As a Member who served in uniform as a Marine Counterintelligence officer and has dedicated his time in Congress to understanding, educating, and defending America from the threat the CCP poses, Mike Gallagher is exceptionally qualified and is the right person to lead and advance this important agenda at this vital moment,’ McCarthy said.”_ **Gallagher Scores Legislative Victories for Northeast Wisconsin**

[](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=6d4020899c0740688b9aabee282907ae&_e=EFmy4WCX8igSUzzSM8red7H7JR4H24g3BhrTuBfNQHkAjpX0_khnBWBilxOawGWaAkV6iNny3M4ck00P54TdvkKENKZEYx0E71nsoIKfObx-G85RYYtHPkKTlBYT6BIqiXc7VCIl0PpKln2qJi862f9ZUBGEk82ZY2IGnWWUc0xhi8Aj-DbQ3myFniJdg7kS4SL9U_DuCzs10IszjABV8i8VUV5MYD8ggkAdlAZfHgWNizSUpqWz6lre43dagvnQGMB20S5ec_jzgpLLCcHmdQQJKekQtqSyUB_sOiadpqpocC10r5aBuuLt2-wA9RYd)

**Bottom Line:**_"Let's build ice breakers, let’s break ice more efficiently and let’s have northeast Wisconsin thrive economically as a result.”_** ****Gallagher Introduces Legislation to Address the Nationwide Trucker Shortage**
---
[](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=6d4020899c0740688b9aabee282907ae&_e=EFmy4WCX8igSUzzSM8redy8jaHeIrJIDO7qwv8kH4yXwZxWqjn_-Sj1e-_61Nj7ME0QkZ8ekJrkOsSf8Ptm0hk2ofc-nkF4N5Y07T4WSJCJ4omHYs8jWgiadFiyf6lWtOpo9HGZP0uVNAzesvpdV-9tSeUdq0I17UKiP2PKdhzKmjfNF2tCjv311PRUj15XFv6B_xd70XmGc6q1uB8e5bgev9ULsetRc5C4KVtsPO6mMafCzGR7lYwkguO8tohD6U6XJ7xMX2NC4FW-LYnVMLg%3D%3D)
---
| | **Bottom Line:**_“We got a reminder in the pandemic early on when there were shortages on the shelves just how critical trucking is to everyday life in Northeast Wisconsin, and it’s a problem we can’t ignore."_ **Gallagher Slams Biden’s “Tepid” Sanctions on Russia**
---
[](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=6d4020899c0740688b9aabee282907ae&_e=EFmy4WCX8igSUzzSM8red5_DDhJRkzcefORZ6-PPKWivqV-ru-_y78p80LTqqafThf5jpVWtnLL8Kk6T-Fr2QM3D6K01H9SLxxCE21DRzhJfHVu6cm5VlbOt7K3SyfNGDh4IFZ3bMlc9cGX8Ax_IoAL69MlLE-vMQ8McR9XWg3SNEivdgwOfnpIj-9xNXRNb0k0ZHw4q8K9SBvxBXam_k8FI7MBRMgHYCnztPwyTbds%3D)
---
**Bottom Line:**_“Americans should not have to sacrifice and suffer for Biden’s foolish decisions.”_ **Gallagher Introduces Legislation to Ban TikTok Nationwide**
---
[](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=6d4020899c0740688b9aabee282907ae&_e=EFmy4WCX8igSUzzSM8red0TRn9V2dCB_j7pnNdfMO3RUtQ9cDEIsTfezEwnVI1kK1wgf4emXDvlBV1EOsqPjJbea-Eg64jEM0pT4uC_4uQ_tZxJVQol795CVQMAK6xfe-eBNs5t5tzSzKimD88XOuhn0J4gq4bZEal-YJZgn5RUJIzAueEk-9TXjJ0lLw0nUicE7cDFHamyIH9r5F95vIIlNcHQ-JIoDVbPNAQ7_-qarfmeKRgC_rMivkFT8t1yCPsDpl9xoeQeY6iu1ZSdsEsn0uEgLMvCqk4IA3ewbNZ8%3D)
---
**Bottom Line:**_“The fundamental problem is this: TikTok is owned by ByteDance and ByteDance is effectively controlled by the Chinese Communist Party. The editor-in-chief of ByteDance, for example, is a CCP secretary and has talked about making sure all product lines and all business lines follow appropriate political control.”_ **Gallagher Explains How Biden Failed Ukrainians**
---
[](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=6d4020899c0740688b9aabee282907ae&_e=EFmy4WCX8igSUzzSM8red5_DDhJRkzcefORZ6-PPKWheRgxb3onlVMzYQfIajCYylhDH7eCZWrzVREoMzD7AEHPkob9Hlqmvq_6UABnp2FOwD6mubYXE82UNXuYd9VERqRelCgaZSTVV3OhKm8uXtmGG89d9VVUxx1ZVfYSIuLNFz-iB8VlaVI2tMmlHLGeQveDQhH76lfjP6Wg-rd0XHocSin1Z09Xv8UsDyP_9IIk%3D)
---
**Bottom Line:**_"Shame on us for being so slow to help our friends in Ukraine who are demonstrating the will to fight. We could have armed them to the teeth. It wouldn't have required us to put our own boots on the ground and it would've made this even more difficult for Vladimir Putin. But of course, the Biden Administration was wedded to this threat of a sanctions-only strategy that ultimately failed to deter Putin.”_** _ _**_ _ **Gallagher Stresses the Importance of Deterring Chinese Aggression**
---
[](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=6d4020899c0740688b9aabee282907ae&_e=EFmy4WCX8igSUzzSM8red4hChxqqx7EYKwazTgZDJDkUm81q6ZzuujSNGZ6X8sqFKKJRyma_BvMYtwYFwVpZZkWvxsZ5SNi48C2-LBkM5NeK4K52ggN6X2lCcgtCYinqK24_Dmw3IPX6zoob_J_JqtanUZVKWbkBbjg8beZpcSr_2IZ2hCLKeDvS1nJPduHncSBa1_QaJ3PEroWRMyV1x0eZ4vDMu2HQXaGHcJFVaaTPZ5PCzq6J-7gsAkcGL-ixY-dW-sEqey0Rrs_KvauCGWkN9RzstUqg1QAg9KghuV9p6fblinwpWOMgkZmG1sR3hx1x4gNWsQKBr3wxGYXcKd3mAh5C3ljndQUiUTTcqWE%3D)
---
**Bottom Line:****_“_** _What could deter an invasion, said Gallagher, would be subs, special operators, and other forces in the ‘weapon engagement zone,’ as well as a stockpiling of munitions and fully-staffed and equipped bases in the Indo-Pacific region.”_ **Peter, Mike had many successes this year, with more in the works for 2023. Your support in the new year will help Mike continue his fight for strong American leadership – at home and abroad.** -Team Gallagher

name: Andy Biggs
subject: What would I do…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biggs for Congress
body:
Without your support?
---
| | | | | | | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrcjooarc3jkc2fggd95dcen7kdckacikdgneegg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9hm2ob7c5h2bs)
---
| Fellow American,
Conservative lawmakers have huge plans for the new year once Republicans officially take a majority in the 118th Congress.
We’re launching several investigations, calling for impeachments in the Biden administration, and holding Swamp crooks accountable.
**Now I am facing not only major opposition from the establishment, but I am falling seriously short of my End of Year review and I am not on track to meet my goal.**
I need the resources to rally millions of Americans behind my mission and message urging my Republican colleagues to support conservative leadership...and I won’t make it without your support.
**[A small, generous contribution will make all the difference in my fight to reclaim strong, conservative leadership in the House. Can I count on you?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1bnfutfvdsf1v5hnn14hms04a546akqh5gkats0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9hm2ob7c5h2bs)** | | | | [SAVE OUR PARTY](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8ofabrjf9u9lu9vjmkjs8rca134dgstorib1mgg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9hm2ob7c5h2bs)
---
We may have won a majority, but we have not taken America First leadership just yet.

**Kevin McCarthy, House moderates, and RINO establishment swamp creatures are foaming at the mouth doing everything they can to take back power.**

It’s up to me to stop them and I need your help to make sure we win this Speaker position...That’s why I am reaching out to only the most loyal grassroots conservatives like you.

**[So please, consider chipping into my fight to ensure the Speaker of the House is a conservative leader and stop these RINO hacks from taking over the Republican Party >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zl2vn5tm6biu56sulttqp3r75c7vg3f38cfq8fvg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c9hm2ob7c5h2bs)**

Thank you in advance for your help!

Yours in Liberty,

Andy Biggs
Republican Congressman, AZ-5

subject: Why 2023 is so important

body:
| |

Peter,
When we launched the Primary Sinema PAC last year, it was to expose Kyrsten Sinema for what she is: a phony Democrat who doesn’t care about what Arizona voters want.
So when she announced this month that she’d be switching parties, we weren’t exactly shocked. Because Sinema is always going to do what’s best for Sinema, and she knew there was no way she’d win a Democratic primary.
We’re in this because Arizona deserves better than Kyrsten Sinema. Sinema has made it quite clear she doesn’t govern for working people. Instead, she caters to corporations and lobbyists. She continues to double down on her support of the filibuster, tanked a $15 minimum wage, and abandoned everyone who helped get her elected in the first place.
We have an ambitious goal to reach by the end of the year. There's a lot to get done on the ground, and our success depends on meeting our fundraising goals so we can get our message out and make sure Sinema never sees office again after 2024.**[Chip in whatever you can to help us meet our end-of-year deadline >>](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zJ5XI6YHChR2bS-m44B_fc4N8o507coUj3Q0KKmNdVh44W6fy8I9-ko3unbdgVdaUzK-tVPeYfTW5uBw58pJEnVce2-EYLTR9gJM0OqhT0SYJqUbXibkSWCfF-FZSuMiFtkAL42-vRidBNrqeF7qVeyDQbylf2IWhBrWH6Q1mEIBJR1bQJ1k0AzwIeZ_3Tih7IDJT6mWsbK6wXfZcNn2_yFiwpGnh-XNXkO-pOJqN4RG7J1SKXBDXhM7xyJZctBvsy13I5xkUn9jUIKZb4iZNIFrv2CZOewpQ1QLdn03Jnvi38gV5Aoh_-jcecLPnbwPt5x4A89a3yxlMGXSP2YxNx/3sd/8-uAHieXSia1LkiF5RylKw/h2/WiYmMWAIDQ3-sWKXpgtG8GncfSqGtoauGRVbZKFSM0w)**

name: Daniel Di Martino
subject: A Socialist Christmas Season… away from family.
body:
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=68c6d7e75bac47cd99672bdfd7bbaae8&_e=TY-GZ-zV2xkfF2GQBN6Sj-bh5goXtqs1EMitTrVIxDGBZ9pB7SiVDZ4yTYfuQNC_KxMP_4ykgbICymEF6SxTFw4xB0rk2EPuAM1aSB65BlH-WK41DcvB3OGNJJDQarPBM960C5wgg39R0HmebRCjPdx3tyntNYVMd17mKt7zMiwt3gXsrz6eKfu6YN1RvOji6lCcaUfolcOScMoTEvyhstYJxup_0KJBmTcWYN0J-9HxACDoUqOdaL-EjcoSKWpfN0yI7Rz3F9UBy0gKTHtB9A%3D%3D)
Friend,

Seven years ago, I celebrated my last Christmas with all my family in Venezuela. While I'm with my parents again this season, my grandparents, cousins, uncles, and everyone else in my family are spread thin all over the world. All because Venezuela's socialist regime forced us to flee.

**Here 's my family's story:**

My grandfather was a shoemaker. He started out working for others but then created his own business. He went from being a hand-made shoemaker to owning his own factory.

**Our family went from poverty to riches. What does this sound like? The American dream! **

_But all of that changed when the socialists took over. _

It wasn't a violent revolution like Cuba, Russia, or China. This month, 24 years ago, _**Hugo Chavez was elected to office! **_

Once the socialists took control, the economy went downhill.

Venezuela sits on top of the world's largest oil reserves. Yet, we had to get in line for hours to get gas in our cars.

**Prices rose as the government tried to print its way into prosperity.** Eventually, I couldn't fit enough cash in my wallet to go to the movies because the money was so worthless.

**Socialists blamed businessmen and greed.** The government confiscated businesses and put price controls in place. Shortages became widespread. For a few weeks, there would be no milk. Then it would come back for a few weeks, and then, gone again.

I want to tell my story to high school students around the United States. They need to know the truth about socialism. **That 's why I founded the Dissident Project. **

[_**Can you donate $10, $25, or $50 to Young Voice and help us teach the next generation about the dangers of socialism? Click here to donate to support our work >>**_](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=68c6d7e75bac47cd99672bdfd7bbaae8&_e=TY-GZ-zV2xkfF2GQBN6Sj-bh5goXtqs1EMitTrVIxDGBZ9pB7SiVDZ4yTYfuQNC_KxMP_4ykgbICymEF6SxTFw4xB0rk2EPuAM1aSB65BlGpC2YEvpow9V34qVbLa3yL8_79mC8rJPrjf3FSiRmlxAbzrt57ZVuPc25o14oxtwAAbTemb1jR56TKcFyEQjqo1bf39DcVyZbFVzxRXDuPJgW34Oudp3-ryMQ6fSHE8PQq7Nnn1DP0wCYaEpDETYR1h1lJdCGTKM30_VR2l_4Rjg%3D%3D)

**Young Voice 's Dissident **project brings survivors of tyrannical socialist countries to high schools around the United States to tell our stories.

We are countering the mainstream narratives about how peaceful and successful socialism can be. Too many young people are taught to believe the United States is an evil, oppressive country and that capitalism is a failure.

**Young Voices ' Dissident project has speakers from Hong Kong, North Korea, Cuba, and Venezuela. We all have unique stories that high schoolers must hear. **

My goal is to raise $15,000 by the end of the month to fund our speakers. It costs roughly $1,500 to host a speaking event on a high school campus.

Your generous gift allows us to keep these talks free of charge for schools.

[_**Help me share my story with young Americans and tell them about the true horrors of socialism. Click here to send your gift >>>**_](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=68c6d7e75bac47cd99672bdfd7bbaae8&_e=TY-GZ-zV2xkfF2GQBN6Sj-bh5goXtqs1EMitTrVIxDGBZ9pB7SiVDZ4yTYfuQNC_KxMP_4ykgbICymEF6SxTFw4xB0rk2EPuAM1aSB65BlFYAlt9BgxKTjJ7Bw4ACfm7oLkYNw8sP689KhuXMee7GvhC5hADwzusBCAbKBF42XfgzUs2H8zvUwLJqEQymDX3D6TJxUo7uOXDoLllNCZPDXUdbTdnf1rUb_yKfyMKeLR6jqGMkfD5ELhysVeOmLYGzF-9KPYYvO4ut0IKdbs48A%3D%3D)

In the mid to late 20th century, Venezuela was a free and prosperous country.

Venezuelans had the opportunity to go from rags to riches. Venezuela was the most prosperous Latin American country. Nothing was perfect, of course, but food was on our tables and gifts under our trees every Christmas season.

**But socialism ruined our country 's economy and led 7 million of us to flee.**

If America were to fall to socialism, it would not fall by bullets but by votes.

**The socialist takeover of America can only happen gradually, just like it did in Venezuela.**

By the time you notice the decay, it will be too late to reverse. Shortages. Skyrocketing crime. Inflation. Christmas away from family because they moved abroad, and video calls every week or every day to catch up with those who left.

We can't let it happen in America.

**Please help me share my story with high school students and help them stop socialist ideas from creeping into our society.**

To do that, I need your help.

Please donate any amount you can generously spare today.

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=68c6d7e75bac47cd99672bdfd7bbaae8&_e=TY-GZ-zV2xkfF2GQBN6Sj-bh5goXtqs1EMitTrVIxDGBZ9pB7SiVDZ4yTYfuQNC_KxMP_4ykgbICymEF6SxTF4tl-zk-39IjZ5Cq_kQtPqimAoy2oQbuk4Q9vxZzMfcWqlGFth1OGhPYUO7B2jUNrabJKLt7BWz8_Sl8PURsg-IcxezHtzpbLkjcjOCTGVHIHUb4P1LBj_eliwgTw14sYF5nq0Ehmzt2cTym_B_KtdF-L9ddc1MLEjmniIJsQcvpErg1xyKDXzBfy__sGfnQxA%3D%3D)
[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=68c6d7e75bac47cd99672bdfd7bbaae8&_e=TY-GZ-zV2xkfF2GQBN6Sj-bh5goXtqs1EMitTrVIxDGBZ9pB7SiVDZ4yTYfuQNC_KxMP_4ykgbICymEF6SxTF4tl-zk-39IjZ5Cq_kQtPqgK75TpKpWHUX_8-tNTmp6w4F_egv38NsVvuB4xxUw-D7Q2qmBgkw3GcW_8iIeR3MRrjEOSRc-VIlLghAU0KrPJ-ImH5M_bdWwmYSZGB8LpvErrL15IIH8ILBC-2UnesOecHtFhBSo02GakDopAYiyxA0-0lvWYukgaC-8GdSR95g%3D%3D)

[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=68c6d7e75bac47cd99672bdfd7bbaae8&_e=TY-GZ-zV2xkfF2GQBN6Sj-bh5goXtqs1EMitTrVIxDGBZ9pB7SiVDZ4yTYfuQNC_KxMP_4ykgbICymEF6SxTF4tl-zk-39IjZ5Cq_kQtPqio038ljTZ8bC_srcqyyJSb19OGoR-I3xrTmVP0Gi4HtGCLwvnTp7ustXcBndZdB3GbIL6LVPRuj7IuBREXW9ojJIR6Rg9o2iLq8gdWfnw_-fOzLy2MboXVwGS-b0m3L4ftRTnX5IpNRDlrcI7OgehR4CVJgAdVLXK5yJcgVvQQsg%3D%3D)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=68c6d7e75bac47cd99672bdfd7bbaae8&_e=TY-GZ-zV2xkfF2GQBN6Sj-bh5goXtqs1EMitTrVIxDGBZ9pB7SiVDZ4yTYfuQNC_KxMP_4ykgbICymEF6SxTF4tl-zk-39IjZ5Cq_kQtPqiaF9uVCZD1rBmFvOQfzPX_TywbPyN4gJLspCgz02BZh2HAmilwqV0Erpc9mqS84Cayiujs8KHQ0zaMuSSr8V1T_WHCa07q_sHXKWnXdDiLx7PZ49gjLlvdFvBYX5PFYX-e5PU8FNdcaf2Ycw0OkS3nVl8v9h_m1LwmAJ5x7mFQgw%3D%3D)
[_**Sponsor a School $1,500 >>>**_](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=68c6d7e75bac47cd99672bdfd7bbaae8&_e=TY-GZ-zV2xkfF2GQBN6Sj-bh5goXtqs1EMitTrVIxDGBZ9pB7SiVDZ4yTYfuQNC_KxMP_4ykgbICymEF6SxTF4tl-zk-39IjZ5Cq_kQtPqhPMxnvf3zKT8wVgAXhfU4q3JrpaHuCO0s17J730jfqMJU0X1W0kqW4iWOx_HGJCFWs0Kzu6nQ1mG-z5s3tfj9IpV4Kh-OYhtbf5KF2qx9ignV6EG6g0CBVeYO_JidGcyQRjD7X-Q38ltH-___Idi2imTt1UAPTgJ5IpToDDcWFGg%3D%3D)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=68c6d7e75bac47cd99672bdfd7bbaae8&_e=TY-GZ-zV2xkfF2GQBN6Sj-bh5goXtqs1EMitTrVIxDGBZ9pB7SiVDZ4yTYfuQNC_KxMP_4ykgbICymEF6SxTFw4xB0rk2EPuAM1aSB65BlHDCbdTuyHTCaWvhRpCdF7pqTNWwg-ypzM9Y7joW7Vr4fl85ikUrXz4TAN14izP9OHndlVecjvAnnlB2BA_YL7oWw9suXoaBPA3CLjfEbX0A1QquVr-1JxCB_hxTMGmfK_CsVazJ-CDdPDsUSaNn6pdHJd4X-Wz9GGgyRD3u2DmfQ%3D%3D)

name: Indiana Democratic Party
subject: Three days
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
|

Peter, We have just __three days__ until our end of year deadline. Friend,

I will be the first to tell you there were plenty of times I thought about giving up and throwing in the towel.

**At this point -- that's just not an option. **

Our case proved, without a doubt, that not everything was as it seemed during Arizona's November election.

Now, the far-left political operatives and Fake News media are hoping this recent ruling will end my fight once and for all.

**They are dead wrong. I 'm not going to stop fighting.**

I promise you -- I will appeal this case and continue our struggle to secure our election until my very last breath.

**However, I need to know -- do I have your support?**

body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9fded6328fba4cdc8749b1ff332fe489&_e=XpQJb-veD5h3bCvlOyinSocKnuiINl-A8VWbvHEDvMjHqjh6amablta8GrZdnJsZirTC6xs5yG_8C3VdnGf5UTM-QKuXZNSiXtzkF0PrOXn1BXY6mWSi_0IAHflA5PtHBzyTWklEPyJ6szBTylxBCiZe5kkiIiL2p9b8idPVW1V3iqoiOFKoAoSop-A2nADSAKMKZgy7106KffrWEghNz01lRdRAbW7d6IyX1Szesv-kfadLhmzdI9IbcOMKR2AApNm4qaTCNYB9hkgCSqfS94eNstYS5ghCgLsgURQgk1kpT0l7myKbe5k6VmNeMzbOFK6z2a_eo_gfF0UioTvYuGRRiJoWGKnDxWs9KBUNL86md4imHMzEN23z45bregURChkYxgMVQ3DK-CA4znlap82SuxMjc74SGi4pzRZ990RGpEGD9CQ6Mv3fX2Rf3_JZ)

| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9fded6328fba4cdc8749b1ff332fe489&_e=XpQJb-veD5h3bCvlOyinSocKnuiINl-A8VWbvHEDvMjHqjh6amablta8GrZdnJsZirTC6xs5yG_8C3VdnGf5UTM-QKuXZNSiXtzkF0PrOXn1BXY6mWSi_0IAHflA5PtHBzyTWklEPyJ6szBTylxBCiZe5kkiIiL2p9b8idPVW1V3iqoiOFKoAoSop-A2nADSAKMKZgy7106KffrWEghNz01lRdRAbW7d6IyX1Szesv-kfadLhmzdI9IbcOMKR2AApNm4qaTCNYB9hkgCSqfS9_T3qcYN_s9LZPCbFyAdDUl9i078pCV4h4MPorpDCfxJ_ng96ChK6cuF5gFVR5BKw4vosB5VT2yJkfzQESBtC5fhNOedWJxGl1KMvryTOh9V-mFCDQrQqB8gtevpkq4mbEiYI2Dikk8YbC1LXCHter2cT35dIGc0RR4lNiY7ygYy)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9fded6328fba4cdc8749b1ff332fe489&_e=XpQJb-veD5h3bCvlOyinSocKnuiINl-A8VWbvHEDvMjHqjh6amablta8GrZdnJsZirTC6xs5yG_8C3VdnGf5UTM-QKuXZNSiXtzkF0PrOXn1BXY6mWSi_0IAHflA5PtHBzyTWklEPyJ6szBTylxBCiZe5kkiIiL2p9b8idPVW1V3iqoiOFKoAoSop-A2nADSAKMKZgy7106KffrWEghNz01lRdRAbW7d6IyX1Szesv-kfadLhmzdI9IbcOMKR2AApNm4qaTCNYB9hkgCSqfS941HnWpNUQ83lirPbs-pZIDfqP4ZBCAI4ENeAZZsnMPvXa4AnWGViWW7HUNT2nGDd0pw7UyJBxp-cd2PkzA5EK_55KzbZHp9TU7mluwn9Bg28U4_YoiT7nO6dhL7HUtLvad-prUORSvBzXhrGNWRcj3cXEwjEPj2pub3t0B2BjUW)

| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9fded6328fba4cdc8749b1ff332fe489&_e=XpQJb-veD5h3bCvlOyinSocKnuiINl-A8VWbvHEDvMjHqjh6amablta8GrZdnJsZirTC6xs5yG_8C3VdnGf5UTM-QKuXZNSiXtzkF0PrOXn1BXY6mWSi_0IAHflA5PtHBzyTWklEPyJ6szBTylxBCiZe5kkiIiL2p9b8idPVW1V3iqoiOFKoAoSop-A2nADSAKMKZgy7106KffrWEghNz01lRdRAbW7d6IyX1Szesv-kfadLhmzdI9IbcOMKR2AApNm4qaTCNYB9hkgCSqfS9wzowTnafUKNuzOsk89kb4j_AuUQTYxpphl1PNnUfKb34a71EKKS17sze1PhYFDYCnscl1FRQAg1QaW6w6EVJ-R9jWSXuOjOao3a6qaUGu0_3LQp5x47TWwLerbt7Bp_rPVurCTbNMijNub-YMLPXl2n0zOtKcw_gz5wUn034yoC).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. | | | This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=07e4ed52968f4b01a5e22d33fd3d627b&_e=VLOZCbJfbSOHIU4YdBTX8wQfxOyVOrAvVLeyz931in44TmnSUC00wMrWbq-B2AEUxtIfRQoTTp70zkOuXlOMwfRuQpyrPM5xMBwo4CIwcpoCaRIiym1vNAEBe7DSEvUfWtEhz7feYWVnIsT-gdCDXGCLYc6ht2fweLVU8uKkYHPH41VNCzGn5Mr_3H8w253eALxzr4hwFYjReFPAzggFwu4X3hqMkIHEjzMvPA-Z3Ya9U8u7SaKBsWnOCQSTOVDGQzupIhvehVVtW8o14d8Kl1ztYaa4i8IojZIyZpdQRclLcY2GBoiVlt-1K7aZr2NFJPj-cSuw5RvniUkcNYCIOuHpwgyuqPn-A3gZvcNfalBmq_ZIWCEhoGmrNiKiUjrZJ0yZgXDjD6H4ZycjR7tCcQ%3D%3D)

| | Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. But today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive. As we lose more and more of these courageous soldiers, we also lose the living memories they carry. But we must preserve the lessons learned from this world war.
---
| | That’s why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled [“](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=07e4ed52968f4b01a5e22d33fd3d627b&_e=VLOZCbJfbSOHIU4YdBTX8wQfxOyVOrAvVLeyz931in44TmnSUC00wMrWbq-B2AEUxtIfRQoTTp70zkOuXlOMwfRuQpyrPM5xMBwo4CIwcpoCaRIiym1vNAEBe7DSEvUfWtEhz7feYWVnIsT-gdCDXGCLYc6ht2fweLVU8uKkYHPH41VNCzGn5Mr_3H8w253eALxzr4hwFYjReFPAzggFwu4X3hqMkIHEjzMvPA-Z3Ya9U8u7SaKBsWnOCQSTOVDGneWBceaj54-fgYf4RGq7sFJy5Mb3lFftgCU7L_sr8VOu8hZWxEnhI66Q-YBVEFeU_F3fbz0Z9SeC09Eun2egRoxfngbIVuAQ7XlQ2CJ6-DwxIB_ukyrErm9WIFoAEtV3dADowj_BUMpSRX5fxhXD7w%3D%3D)**[The Second World Wars.”](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=07e4ed52968f4b01a5e22d33fd3d627b&_e=VLOZCbJfbSOHIU4YdBTX8wQfxOyVOrAvVLeyz931in44TmnSUC00wMrWbq-B2AEUxtIfRQoTTp70zkOuXlOMwfRuQpyrPM5xMBwo4CIwcpoCaRIiym1vNAEBe7DSEvUfWtEhz7feYWVnIsT-gdCDXGCLYc6ht2fweLVU8uKkYHPH41VNCzGn5Mr_3H8w253eALxzr4hwFYjReFPAzggFwu4X3hqMkIHEjzMvPA-Z3Ya9U8u7SaKBsWnOCQSTOVDGDfLjBtr_YsAu9tnSGrSezzq_Yk1JfQfPDeEd9ucue4nUf8Dqk59mXxBMWi_sv49FfvySgGs7zgsBX5EG_L02WeNJeFyOHH8qozrCTYESx_LE3d545LV2oXGYcjUsp6VMCHQBl0ThQYKklThGWCEpww%3D%3D) **And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian **Victor Davis Hanson** of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies’ victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.

Peaceful Protester Christopher Worrell committed no crimes on January 6th. He simply exercised his First Amendment right to free speech, along with thousands of other patriots outside the Capitol building.

But he was arrested anyway and thrown into the infamous D.C. jail that’s torturing and abusing patriots as I write you this urgent email.

**Christopher was jailed with stage 1 cancer, a non-Hodgkin’s lymphoma. Prescription medication kept it in remission. But it grew aggressively into stage 3 cancer over eight months, because the D.C. jail doctors REFUSED to let him take his medications...and REFUSED to let him see an oncologist!**

The abuse Christopher endured was so bad, that a federal judge finally ordered him to be released from jail based on an investigation by the U.S. Marshals.

Christopher is back home now, but he’s been in and out of the hospital. He’s in very bad shape, even after five rounds of chemotherapy.

Christopher’s fiancée, Trish, went public about the outrageous violation of his human rights on Tucker Carlson’s show recently.

**And when Tucker asked her if any politicians were coming to their aid, Trish said, “They’re ignoring us.”**

So, the D.C. jail is torturing and abusing peaceful protesters...blocking lifesaving medical care...and no one on Capitol Hill is helping them!

**If the Department of Justice and the D.C. jail can persecute and destroy the health of a peaceful protester for simply speaking up outside the Capitol building on January 6th, they can push you and me, our families, friends, and fellow Americans around, too.**

That’s why I beg you to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.**

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.**

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!**

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten criminal regime in court.

name: Eric H. Holder, Jr.
subject: The work must continue
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, Kelly Burton, President
body:
|
---

Friend,

I’m so proud of this movement.

**Democracy was on the line in this election – and the American people showed decisively that we’re not willing to let it go.**

Here’s some of what the NDRC achieved thanks to your support:
* We helped elect eight Democracy Defenders to gubernatorial offices.
* We helped win three secretary of state races.
* We helped flip at least three state legislative chambers, including two in Michigan – giving Michigan a Democratic trifecta for the first time in decades.
* We protected Democratic majorities in six more chambers.
* We protected the veto power of Democratic governors in two states.

It’s not perfect. But it’s a powerful statement. **Thanks to the tenacity of the people – people like you – fairness and democracy have been enhanced in our nation.**

I've believed consistently that wherever Democrats can fairly compete, they can win. The election results underscore that. It’s clear that the NDRC’s comprehensive strategy played a key role to lay the foundation for last month's outcome. Both on the federal and the state level, fair maps in states like Pennsylvania, Michigan, and North Carolina prevented an unearned Republican wave.

However, too many Americans in too many states – including Florida, Georgia, and Wisconsin – continue to be impacted by partisan and racial gerrymandering. Two redistricting cases are before the U.S. Supreme Court and nine other lawsuits against Republican gerrymandered maps are making their way through state and federal courts.

**The work must continue. And I hope you’ll stick with us as we keep pushing it forward in 2023 and beyond.

[If you can, please take a minute to make a contribution to support the NDRC.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/56514363/385255684/1887409474?amount=30&refcode=20221227.1a_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE2MDFjODc1LWQ5ODYtZWQxMS05ZDdhLTAwMGQzYTllYjkxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=mQFRPFS45cgJPgZ2W6d4AiXrO8uOzUAxG7Md4Rnrl34=)** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: | Friend, I’m so proud of this movement. Democracy was on the line in this election – and the American people showed decisively that we’re not willing to let it go. Here’s some of what the NDRC achieved thanks to your support: We helped elect eight Democracy Defenders to gubernatorial offices. We helped win three secretary of state races. We helped flip at least three state legislative chambers, including two in Michigan – giving Michigan a Democratic trifecta for the first time in decades. We protected Democratic majorities in six more chambers. We protected the veto power of Democratic governors in two states. It’s not perfect. But it’s a powerful statement. Thanks to the tenacity of the people – people like you – fairness and democracy have been enhanced in our nation. I've believed consistently that wherever Democrats can fairly compete, they can win. The election results underscore that. It’s clear that the NDRC’s comprehensive strategy played a key role to lay the foundation for last month's outcome. Both on the federal and the state level, fair maps in states like Pennsylvania, Michigan, and North Carolina prevented an unearned Republican wave. However, too many Americans in too many states – including Florida, Georgia, and Wisconsin – continue to be impacted by partisan and racial gerrymandering. Two redistricting cases are before the U.S. Supreme Court and nine other lawsuits against Republican gerrymandered maps are making their way through state and federal courts. The work must continue. And I hope you’ll stick with us as we keep pushing it forward in 2023 and beyond. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = That’s a lot of work left to do. But let’s be proud of the work we've done. We deserve it. Thank you for everything, Eric H. Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. Trump for President 2024 and Save America.

name: Speaker Melissa Hortman
subject: Because of you
disclaimer_text: paid for by the DFL House Caucus DFL House Caucus
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-dec22?refcode=122822 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-dec22?refcode=122822]
Friend,
We've gotten where we are because of grassroots supporters like you. We win by the power of the people, and in the 2022 midterms, we did just that. Minnesotans' voices were heard loud and clear, both on the ballot and through your contributions.
With DFLers in office accross the state, we want to get as much done as we can. With that in mind, since our campaign budget comes mostly from our grassroots donors, we want to stress how important your contribution is before the end of the year. Unlike Republicans, we don't rely on wealthy corporations to fund our campaigns; we rely on honest, hard-working Minnesotans like you. You still have four more days to claim your refundable $50 (or $100 per couple) donation for 2022. Will you donate before we ring in the new year?
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
Refundable $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-dec22?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=122822]
Refundable $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-dec22?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=122822]
We can't thank you enough for putting DFLers in office and continuing to support us year-round. Together, we can build a Minnesota that works better for everyone. From our family to yours, we hope you're having a wonderful holiday season!
Thank you,
Melissa Hortman
Speaker of the House
Minnesota House of Representatives
