name: Joseph Geevarghese
subject: keeping up the momentum in 2023
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

Our Revolution is the most impactful
progressive organization in America, and it’s only because of supporters
like you.

Our organizing was critical to taking on the power of big pharma in the
Inflation Reduction Act, taking down Joe Manchin and the fossil fuel
industry’s corrupt dirty deal 3 times, electing John Fetterman and Raphael
Warnock, and more!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8179?source=OR_EM_FR_25SP_20221228_1_3&t=1011&akid=3849%2E5885482%2Ew2oQHc ]Can we count on you to pitch in before our end-of-year deadline to help
us make sure we’re ready to take on Republican fascism and fight for
progressive candidates and issues in 2023?

Please read below to see what your support helped us accomplish in 2022
and our plan for 2023!

—Begin Forwarded Message—

Peter Willis,

Thank you! Together we stood against the
power of big money in politics and rising Republican fascism to deliver
concrete results for working families in 2022.

Across America, in races up and down the ballot, Our Revolution members
made over 4.5 million voter contacts to offset the flood of corporate
propaganda and beat back a red wave.

Our grassroots organizing helped John Fetterman and Raphael Warnock win
their Senate contests and keep the Senate out of GOP hands. And in the
House, we elected nine new progressive champions to reinforce the ranks of
the Congressional Progressive Caucus and stand-up to corporate-backed
Democrats.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8179?source=OR_EM_FR_25SP_20221228_1_3&t=1012&akid=3849%2E5885482%2Ew2oQHc ]All of these successes were only possible because of contributions from
folks like you. Can we count on you to pitch in before our end-of-year
deadline to help us expand our work in 2023?

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to
Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8180?refcode=OR_EM_FR_25SP_20221228_1_3&t=1013&akid=3849%2E5885482%2Ew2oQHc ]CHIP IN $10 NOW » [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8181?refcode=OR_EM_FR_25SP_20221228_1_3&t=1014&akid=3849%2E5885482%2Ew2oQHc ]CHIP IN $18 NOW »
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8182?refcode=OR_EM_FR_25SP_20221228_1_3&t=1015&akid=3849%2E5885482%2Ew2oQHc ]CHIP IN $27 NOW » [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8183?refcode=OR_EM_FR_25SP_20221228_1_3&t=1016&akid=3849%2E5885482%2Ew2oQHc ]CHIP IN $100 NOW »
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8184?refcode=OR_EM_FR_25SP_20221228_1_3&t=1017&akid=3849%2E5885482%2Ew2oQHc ]CHIP IN $250 NOW » [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8179?refcode=OR_EM_FR_25SP_20221228_1_3&t=1018&akid=3849%2E5885482%2Ew2oQHc ]CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT »

This year, we also delivered significant wins on the state and local
levels. Our work in Minnesota helped Attorney General Keith Ellison fend
off a radical right-wing challenger bankrolled by police unions. And in
St. Louis, we beat back real estate developers to elect Meagan Green as
the new leader of a progressive-controlled city council.

While delivering huge electoral wins against long odds, we also took on
corporate Democrats to win key progressive policy fights. Our Revolution
faced-off against the fossil fuel industry to block Joe Manchin's dirty
deal three different times; we won big investments in clean energy and
forced Big Pharma to negotiate drug prices through the IRA; and we
fought-back against corporate union-busters to win the biggest funding
increase for the National Labor Relations Board in decades.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8179?source=OR_EM_FR_25SP_20221228_1_3&t=1019&akid=3849%2E5885482%2Ew2oQHc ]We proved, once again, that when we organize, we win — and these
victories are only possible with your support. Invest in Our Revolution
and help us secure more progressive victories in 2023 by chipping in now
before our end-of-year deadline!

In 2023, our work will expand along all of these fronts. We've already
launched a campaign to defeat sellouts like Kyrsten Sinema; we’re leading
the fight to ban insurrectionists from the ballot; we’re scaling up our on
the ground organizing to elect progressive mayors in cities like Chicago
and Philadelphia; and we’re ramping up the pressure on President Biden to
use the power of the pen to advance progressive policies.

The bottom line is this: Our Revolution is the most impactful
member-driven progressive organization in the country because we have
stayed relentlessly focused on changing the Democratic Party, electing
progressives, and making progressive policies a legislative reality.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8179?source=OR_EM_FR_25SP_20221228_1_3&t=1020&akid=3849%2E5885482%2Ew2oQHc ]Can we count on you to help us fund this critical work before our
end-of-year deadline?

In solidarity,

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=3849%2E5885482%2Ew2oQHc ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=3849%2E5885482%2Ew2oQHc ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=3849%2E5885482%2Ew2oQHc ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=3849%2E5885482%2Ew2oQHc ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=3849%2E5885482%2Ew2oQHc ]Website |
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/signup_2109/?t=1006&akid=3849%2E5885482%2Ew2oQHc ]Sign Up

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5923?c0=OR_EM_FR_25SP_20221228_1_3.u1Yo_2&t=1007&akid=3849%2E5885482%2Ew2oQHc ]Our membership swag

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America. Last year alone, we elected 74% of our 450 endorsed
progressive candidates by mobilizing on the ground AND in the halls of
power.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5924?c0=OR_EM_FR_25SP_20221228_1_3._AP_zw&t=1008&akid=3849%2E5885482%2Ew2oQHc ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to a 2022 Movement Builder recurring
donation of just $5 or more a month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5925?c0=OR_EM_FR_25SP_20221228_1_3.DNSA9J&t=1009&akid=3849%2E5885482%2Ew2oQHc ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5926?c0=OR_EM_FR_25SP_20221228_1_3.QCr7Ui&t=1010&akid=3849%2E5885482%2Ew2oQHc ]GIVE ONCE

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ourrevolution.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2/?akid=3849%2E5885482%2Ew2oQHc

WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a

name: Arizona Democrats
subject: We’re winning, but it’s not over
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Arizona Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
| | | The fight to turn AZ blue continues | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xh0WEU2fHvMOQWA94vUP1ZK7PnoTqT4vFitkxi6JU5qBZK8xL-ntIVw_LkAzjixBCxlfi6Geig2mzgIgC3y7moCDhJ88TW_B42Hp-YpEyHGiKw6d33-TqyMUjZPqCeew7fw3GvQhoC568EF_jipiHiXxHckM-785SlAwR1zEIVzMB-EkSzOIvrdaG1ps03c9jSti3pQVrX96ea5w5e2FRyKwVV8p52TlS73bJnK3ccY5rNGcJdZl0mhE1fZvAp5r1ZnWLeV6V_SRBoj68Fw1XXhN2YOnmjzDhXM4-THmHQy6hREEscZEaO4HTqUbxbsl4DUce4fEEZmUFnE8Bg_E_TPfsIAtZHVGhMTYQwnhy9zvt9MPHSNDdUPVVTxE_aaCLRPDmLglrZXDcApe683FE19jyFZQCxqWa5UnAzjMLQyL2mfILx5PauTiN4Me6-SDI/3sd/QP-x42okRkWA1omdhMQOcA/h0/LWCEMyNxUp1iI0X7ot6XDc-ezbIiEJP4sWch5Oikdks)

---
| Team,

Make no mistake – 2022 was a great year for our party here in Arizona.

We re-elected Senator Kelly – helping to hold the U.S. Senate. We flipped the Governor and Attorney General offices with Katie Hobbs and Kris Mayes. And Adrian Fontes held the Secretary of State’s office.

**If there was doubt before, there shouldn’t be now – Arizona is the top toss-up state in America.**

**[Team, 2022 showed we’re winning, but the fight isn’t over. We need to start to rebuild our resources for the next cycle right now. We’re launching a $2,000 end-of-year goal to keep the fight going. Can you donate $5 so we hit our goal?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xh0WEU2fHvMOQWA94vUP1ZK7PnoTqT4vFitkxi6JU5qBZK8xL-ntIVw_LkAzjixBCxlfi6Geig2mzgIgC3y7mo4brzuu_wy5fR7M_XIkCBIJVqXpYAC_iDJz7CeZNZ-yWcWV--xNShYOkJw00TPH5fOV0cvaR2iuYMWGNDSFl-8aGsLRVOEmkqFk7nMpS0BKKe_I4olDsHscllYkiAk5A3V7i53sg_RRrpv_R_xarVbMEadOS_9cIQvOURq_12yRa8tOa6SCsQ-ui7XKZrlC4kJ7sIDq2RSHY6LyMTNYuGODRja-lblixNAdYUdWzpQiFEkmu0nvY-jq52ND5F8SKc6mOZJcVE-3V_fVvEhcHVS2KWO9OVaZE3KvEU70ufdOn4bLqpfmn4vocaABYRAVc70yPxsxlLMXYDieAzdq2-0G04KPiz-aQfxyVu72RGjb0/3sd/QP-x42okRkWA1omdhMQOcA/h1/9nj800BlgiOsLjMfKtENGRJCI7sjylvX4jatSqxTMJA)** [
DONATE ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xh0WEU2fHvMOQWA94vUP1ZK7PnoTqT4vFitkxi6JU5qBZK8xL-ntIVw_LkAzjixBCxlfi6Geig2mzgIgC3y7mo4jbRpp0doZbjna0DZS-HuEmIQh_6T1CPA1UF5N0XsfQU-LvR3KirA-TUOPJLMTZZaWqgrr6GLK5Es-2AP4V5Ahkb9UHg4N4K7GqmK2BMLOHMhQ0jv2BHyU0bgOkzFtN7NI47RZB_7hOzJ2X8VtMO6lLUO15ZE36eB9E7AeIYdTRxjLHLts33UL5lNR43hfpSi6RTZ2hWurIQmSYdSBbRvPKumcMIyYQa2j6POsLl6WO504vNwf1ad8yfjusKW2w1V3z9KOcR68vBYMdQ-hjf_V0su4vrbkGJfMwlfGo3ZFcY8MFPHzNeyYB89DpT1KeorMGVRK53tu8CVUfEiAXLR69o-P4fc8CT-x99vFpNfWM/3sd/QP-x42okRkWA1omdhMQOcA/h2/7pby70tlubw2TjwfQEPpayPAsUUXvX8VxqaohCpVd5w)
While we won a lot of big races, we still have serious work to do.

Redistricting completely changed our state legislature and Congressional lines. We were able to fight to a stalemate at the state level, holding Republicans to a one-seat lead in both legislative chambers. But we know in order to help Governor-elect Hobbs, Attorney General-elect Mayes, and Secretary-elect Fontes, we need to give them a Democratic-controlled legislature to work with.

And on the Congressional level, new boundaries favorable to Republicans saw us lose two seats. If we want Democrats to control Congress again, we have to win these seats back in 2024.

So while Arizona has moved from red to purple, we need your help to get to fully blue.

clean_body: | | | The fight to turn AZ blue continues | | | Team, Make no mistake – 2022 was a great year for our party here in Arizona. We re-elected Senator Kelly – helping to hold the U.S. Senate. We flipped the Governor and Attorney General offices with Katie Hobbs and Kris Mayes. And Adrian Fontes held the Secretary of State’s office. If there was doubt before, there shouldn’t be now – Arizona is the top toss-up state in America. While we won a lot of big races, we still have serious work to do. Redistricting completely changed our state legislature and Congressional lines. We were able to fight to a stalemate at the state level, holding Republicans to a one-seat lead in both legislative chambers. But we know in order to help Governor-elect Hobbs, Attorney General-elect Mayes, and Secretary-elect Fontes, we need to give them a Democratic-controlled legislature to work with. And on the Congressional level, new boundaries favorable to Republicans saw us lose two seats. If we want Democrats to control Congress again, we have to win these seats back in 2024. So while Arizona has moved from red to purple, we need your help to get to fully blue. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Thanks for a great 2022! Arizona Democrats Paid for by the Arizona Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Rick McGuire Treasurer. Arizona Democratic Party 2910 North Central Ave Phoenix AZ 85012 United States | | Sent via . name: Conservatives Give
subject: Learn from Victor Davis Hanson
body:
World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. | | | This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8abc7105d00845cd98046178c980b32b&_e=pgF8hMy1qevdWgTwk9eXCFDAGYl2dT0C0rOgV6aUTrci1JEx49lmRfMjbSo6TKqKRSOx0r2yFEKW-Qv1KU8o-RdLtT1WuuoLQ8x_w9M0PN1Ddkp2RN7p_zIQZwu2gyRRAvOd11KIyfICLXF6FYlX8eJbFKCtCiFrrcseExCPJd5a5ssGkSdluU3bZmr_AOFkiASSsxya5CRb3vsMrfQf4PlPdVQ59NZmTSmOxEUoCosE2znWW7a-d9YD9jGEDfxrfuBFOaRBCGQh039JmH0oEo1l929lYLy0SDaBwaMawuucpzxScv1pozgAl9VPTmDQad9_716QTCSaNHe1eUdCl6RTgwOFuxK_AIM-6y7Vh6xVyT7POzzBmHXfLlA6MqxXGG-3raXvDhO57Z_m0p3jAw%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. But today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive. As we lose more and more of these courageous soldiers, we also lose the living memories they carry. But we must preserve the lessons learned from this world war.
---
| | That's why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled ["](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8abc7105d00845cd98046178c980b32b&_e=pgF8hMy1qevdWgTwk9eXCFDAGYl2dT0C0rOgV6aUTrci1JEx49lmRfMjbSo6TKqKRSOx0r2yFEKW-Qv1KU8o-RdLtT1WuuoLQ8x_w9M0PN1Ddkp2RN7p_zIQZwu2gyRRAvOd11KIyfICLXF6FYlX8eJbFKCtCiFrrcseExCPJd5a5ssGkSdluU3bZmr_AOFkiASSsxya5CRb3vsMrfQf4PlPdVQ59NZmTSmOxEUoCosE2znWW7a-d9YD9jGEDfxr0ueMOcjqiVE1Z8uvrkkOXehhzeugV6idD5yCKAzEx_W1YOSQeDxaUz3TttSM_T1WLO0d5gyXl8CGWtpR9mx6GSV_9nwKxZuaWnNx_VwqFfwWugmDQ7lapNa3IpiVKWl-wi5qutOWwLM31hxkbaKpVw%3D%3D)**[The Second World Wars."](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8abc7105d00845cd98046178c980b32b&_e=pgF8hMy1qevdWgTwk9eXCFDAGYl2dT0C0rOgV6aUTrci1JEx49lmRfMjbSo6TKqKRSOx0r2yFEKW-Qv1KU8o-RdLtT1WuuoLQ8x_w9M0PN1Ddkp2RN7p_zIQZwu2gyRRAvOd11KIyfICLXF6FYlX8eJbFKCtCiFrrcseExCPJd5a5ssGkSdluU3bZmr_AOFkiASSsxya5CRb3vsMrfQf4PlPdVQ59NZmTSmOxEUoCosE2znWW7a-d9YD9jGEDfxrvrLoJ5GvrWQftj_Yoe3yuz6wc8bxfoRVCjZalvYeQ2k1qYSkN0knttAoy-m1m3Itrv_r7OAZlH7PkgIXOSw94LcG-y2Q2EMLPSwxhZ0eS52F5VRYPAAPsi_B6p6L0-4C8eRhDU05_85u30_62VYGTg%3D%3D) **And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian **Victor Davis Hanson** of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies' victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.

name: Tim Burchett
subject: A season of gratitude 💌
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Burchett for Congress** [Unsubscribe](http://links
body:
| | | |
---
| | [](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=265d71421f444355917c9a005189a0c4&_e=v8W-i64eZvdIm4IjqnVNvF1zYw-Z7eVRa7_YfsK2o6CJE1DCKjYOBrDqNFya_dgK6DyUmIj0a2rGk5yDAUXU9Tn8jjXfLUbgrhKAOKIovAWHnWPc13YYfdu8rO_iSGSfll6dUkj0TSlLEM-g7u-XF6lCv8HXVNb3VBvOK2OzuVU686TnWo17bhSNGufRQPc0JjS6-qMtDqWqWoBy8LctYnYsgzZGRLISg2K-_kzoZJc%3D)
---
| | |
---
| | Friend,
It has been a year of remarkable change for the world, our nation, and for the things that make us so unique as a country and Tennesseans. There were joys and disappointments, I’m sure I don’t have to tell you, but what endures are the deep-seated values that connect us as a community. Friend, you have helped to contribute to the progress and patriotism that mean so much to America’s prosperity. I am lucky to count you among the many good folk who not only believe in our country, but are willing to show it, whether by participating in civic life here in East Tennessee, joining my campaign, or giving what contributions you can toward advancing the Republican message. And what is that message? It’s about free markets and free people. It’s about personal liberty and keeping government limited. It’s about protecting our bottom line and ensuring a promising future for our children.
---
[**Advance Our Message**](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=265d71421f444355917c9a005189a0c4&_e=v8W-i64eZvdIm4IjqnVNvF1zYw-Z7eVRa7_YfsK2o6CJE1DCKjYOBrDqNFya_dgK6DyUmIj0a2rGk5yDAUXU9aknCT9durbnvZHE9w1aw9JKxUkvRhQfZRvCgBm6-4BSbvPf5JyKWLX46c5fXHVnOxH-aN_DllMW9svWVKpNSL7gX5JwtYZTX_0GUWcFtN8k4lYhgvV6A4cczOwju0GPD585zzGJ2wAR165lMRMaWmw%3D)
---
| | So, with a bright eye turned toward 2023, I write first to thank you. Without your help, we wouldn’t be where we are today. I also want to ask you one last time to consider making a year-end contribution to start the new year off as strong as possible. **[If you’re able, please donate anything you can today. Your contribution makes a real impact, even if it's just $5, $10, or $15.](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=265d71421f444355917c9a005189a0c4&_e=v8W-i64eZvdIm4IjqnVNvF1zYw-Z7eVRa7_YfsK2o6CJE1DCKjYOBrDqNFya_dgK6DyUmIj0a2rGk5yDAUXU9QGVVPBSAHZCZ5VHK9Hn2EF7HNwKPykUiy3xh7w7KVp2r2kXDne3q5I9jbWwNygCzJVT9basQSxQ1E6xarzyeGR9JYNBr_aVIMJWF0ts3Xx0DeOuCo0hDjIiYgGIk7MKyT4OHHle6TtzxkcpxCleS9o%3D)** Best wishes and God Bless, Tim Burchett

name: Daniel Di Martino
subject: A Socialist Christmas Season… away from family.
body:
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b1fd96dcd84940b1b4cd9be41a6defb0&_e=QkV62yLduRBtAe4mO03Wg4FJ580uIDRN3Wdhjz3GDAll3yaS0e_y8CkpQbze0KfKdB2zqbKrKVPO57joT6xnjSD4qvGtOhf7uSEwTVEC-dkAhTJqQEMCa3P39MLKK8Lyvft7pcwEvK1bDf40fkULZcmWmqeLCZhnGtpThkK9exC1vQO-pg_2pft-z_gJHc_QMGQYUduU3ypk_v0iFT8T1tNWoDHkEKgUH-Q-TOVo3gkil1GgqY_UQ-GwxZDeRGxgw8QJS3OKlI9W8HVZmthDGQ%3D%3D)
Friend,

Seven years ago, I celebrated my last Christmas with all my family in Venezuela. While I'm with my parents again this season, my grandparents, cousins, uncles, and everyone else in my family are spread thin all over the world. All because Venezuela's socialist regime forced us to flee.

**Here 's my family's story:**

My grandfather was a shoemaker. He started out working for others but then created his own business. He went from being a hand-made shoemaker to owning his own factory.

**Our family went from poverty to riches. What does this sound like? The American dream! **

_But all of that changed when the socialists took over. _

It wasn't a violent revolution like Cuba, Russia, or China. This month, 24 years ago, _**Hugo Chavez was elected to office! **_

Once the socialists took control, the economy went downhill.

Venezuela sits on top of the world's largest oil reserves. Yet, we had to get in line for hours to get gas in our cars.

**Prices rose as the government tried to print its way into prosperity.** Eventually, I couldn't fit enough cash in my wallet to go to the movies because the money was so worthless.

**Socialists blamed businessmen and greed.** The government confiscated businesses and put price controls in place. Shortages became widespread. For a few weeks, there would be no milk. Then it would come back for a few weeks, and then, gone again.

I want to tell my story to high school students around the United States. They need to know the truth about socialism. **That 's why I founded the Dissident Project. **

[_**Can you donate $10, $25, or $50 to Young Voice and help us teach the next generation about the dangers of socialism? Click here to donate to support our work >>**_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b1fd96dcd84940b1b4cd9be41a6defb0&_e=QkV62yLduRBtAe4mO03Wg4FJ580uIDRN3Wdhjz3GDAll3yaS0e_y8CkpQbze0KfKdB2zqbKrKVPO57joT6xnjSD4qvGtOhf7uSEwTVEC-dkTvIl45FTkmcWf3t2Bz-EQncowUQ-88PiSbTIh5OXYFE_TNcB5JB3ho8Sk2fknYTklvAbVGGdSujyxJQCVn-hzYEKzZtmIHvsNjFVBKUilyJiSUTsrxl4pKrLxjSBEmktOZRsgryilNDG5vILA1jcwgG2Re_tKGBlQm8fsH5Zeqw%3D%3D)

**Young Voice 's Dissident **project brings survivors of tyrannical socialist countries to high schools around the United States to tell our stories.

We are countering the mainstream narratives about how peaceful and successful socialism can be. Too many young people are taught to believe the United States is an evil, oppressive country and that capitalism is a failure.

**Young Voices ' Dissident project has speakers from Hong Kong, North Korea, Cuba, and Venezuela. We all have unique stories that high schoolers must hear. **

My goal is to raise $15,000 by the end of the month to fund our speakers. It costs roughly $1,500 to host a speaking event on a high school campus.

Your generous gift allows us to keep these talks free of charge for schools.

[_**Help me share my story with young Americans and tell them about the true horrors of socialism. Click here to send your gift >>>**_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b1fd96dcd84940b1b4cd9be41a6defb0&_e=QkV62yLduRBtAe4mO03Wg4FJ580uIDRN3Wdhjz3GDAll3yaS0e_y8CkpQbze0KfKdB2zqbKrKVPO57joT6xnjSD4qvGtOhf7uSEwTVEC-dnXLxQPbEuH9DyO5hN9U8-VE9DJJFgBEY8vu1qs9Rye3hGK-R69d8onULBOVxxSaB-NDE9s96XvNXYXGdvrIiTzV7eBRij_ZPfclPMWuvrSCttbFkrKdcPwlMqoXIJAbniM050sakz1BQrHOs_ARch6GKaqtvGUfvE-pvaUxP4b_g%3D%3D)

In the mid to late 20th century, Venezuela was a free and prosperous country.

Venezuelans had the opportunity to go from rags to riches. Venezuela was the most prosperous Latin American country. Nothing was perfect, of course, but food was on our tables and gifts under our trees every Christmas season.

**But socialism ruined our country 's economy and led 7 million of us to flee.**

If America were to fall to socialism, it would not fall by bullets but by votes.

**The socialist takeover of America can only happen gradually, just like it did in Venezuela.**

By the time you notice the decay, it will be too late to reverse. Shortages. Skyrocketing crime. Inflation. Christmas away from family because they moved abroad, and video calls every week or every day to catch up with those who left.

We can't let it happen in America.

**Please help me share my story with high school students and help them stop socialist ideas from creeping into our society.**

To do that, I need your help.

Please donate any amount you can generously spare today.

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b1fd96dcd84940b1b4cd9be41a6defb0&_e=QkV62yLduRBtAe4mO03Wg4FJ580uIDRN3Wdhjz3GDAll3yaS0e_y8CkpQbze0KfKdB2zqbKrKVPO57joT6xnjUYZGClhEOHqQO4e-6pA8IDhBBXkQK3qmvnSWGpEFXf5nQURvcRhSOlhjQCA-oFcqTwBgJo6AAAJwgi-xj1v3tnxO5d8ZuIgvh1XTAMp_cyki-tly4vxqH0m-4tIEI2fsQO7DdY3Ey-UVx_W4i-d1OvusH81oBdgEziIZZOfb8PbgozJPqsF66KtrlWXaUPBOQ%3D%3D)

clean_body: Friend, Seven years ago, I celebrated my last Christmas with all my family in Venezuela. While I'm with my parents again this season, my grandparents, cousins, uncles, and everyone else in my family are spread thin all over the world. All because Venezuela's socialist regime forced us to flee. Here 's my family's story: My grandfather was a shoemaker. He started out working for others but then created his own business. He went from being a hand-made shoemaker to owning his own factory. Our family went from poverty to riches. What does this sound like? The American dream! But all of that changed when the socialists took over. It wasn't a violent revolution like Cuba, Russia, or China. This month, 24 years ago, Hugo Chavez was elected to office! Once the socialists took control, the economy went downhill. Venezuela sits on top of the world's largest oil reserves. Yet, we had to get in line for hours to get gas in our cars. Prices rose as the government tried to print its way into prosperity. Eventually, I couldn't fit enough cash in my wallet to go to the movies because the money was so worthless. Socialists blamed businessmen and greed. The government confiscated businesses and put price controls in place. Shortages became widespread. For a few weeks, there would be no milk. Then it would come back for a few weeks, and then, gone again. I want to tell my story to high school students around the United States. They need to know the truth about socialism. That 's why I founded the Dissident Project. Young Voice 's Dissident project brings survivors of tyrannical socialist countries to high schools around the United States to tell our stories. We are countering the mainstream narratives about how peaceful and successful socialism can be. Too many young people are taught to believe the United States is an evil, oppressive country and that capitalism is a failure. Young Voices ' Dissident project has speakers from Hong Kong, North Korea, Cuba, and Venezuela. We all have unique stories that high schoolers must hear. My goal is to raise $15,000 by the end of the month to fund our speakers. It costs roughly $1,500 to host a speaking event on a high school campus. Your generous gift allows us to keep these talks free of charge for schools. In the mid to late 20th century, Venezuela was a free and prosperous country. Venezuelans had the opportunity to go from rags to riches. Venezuela was the most prosperous Latin American country. Nothing was perfect, of course, but food was on our tables and gifts under our trees every Christmas season. But socialism ruined our country 's economy and led 7 million of us to flee. If America were to fall to socialism, it would not fall by bullets but by votes. The socialist takeover of America can only happen gradually, just like it did in Venezuela. By the time you notice the decay, it will be too late to reverse. Shortages. Skyrocketing crime. Inflation. Christmas away from family because they moved abroad, and video calls every week or every day to catch up with those who left. We can't let it happen in America. Please help me share my story with high school students and help them stop socialist ideas from creeping into our society. To do that, I need your help. Please donate any amount you can generously spare today. Thank you, Daniel Di Martino The Dissident Project is a program of Young Voices, a 501c3 nonprofit organization. All donations are tax deductible and will be acknowledged via email receipt. Donations made to the Dissident Project will be spent exclusively on that program. Sent to Conservative Liberty Wire subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

body:
Houston is the city I was born and raised in, and the spirit of our great city runs strong within me. Our city’s communities are resilient and innovative. | | | Amanda is fighting to ensure that our minority and women-owned businesses have the resources they need. [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wB7DWu1u8h5QTGLUn-vuE3hu6E28TwOViBeqTZzuoBib7qyxQvMzLp35fUu-eBIipjl1H06XP01lGQySsgZug2JnibQl_RNdrPkxYF-Jp3UypC4gSHt2COfkY3wY8hn8L-3fTKj_k_NPgJKNq2yVCEZsxj6lr0c1lhPmx_nrqgK-4ygQNLRKxClZUG8rMDKImo6Pt6MNta-wLiysXFmII0qKqSVdUobK23AgqeVsimLVv4_7AnS4x1CPyiBae2Ou35eiVPAhwZFGV1L-jTBRkUGwhMRHynynqjhXzc-8Uqxiu72iPbD6ossVDOjrXkWfY1psr44EcKGsPM7a86ABhz2-ggtZtUynNyWgCF-gJn52j_XZQLMvxvW8d_ZfoIm3ys9q5Go0vMcawMHdgXrKAUfgdUI0iItC0RqRDuZo8pqg/3sd/3ZXS_J3uQDeYBjf7W_1pvA/h0/M94YvUcGKSIMcWkhHMeC3aUoXbf2O6F-Q0kWZ3yERk4) | | Dear Friend,
Houston is the city I was born and raised in, and the spirit of our great city runs strong within me. Our city’s communities are resilient and innovative, and each of us stand so much to gain with effective and proven leadership at the helm. But we can’t bring a better future to Houston alone, Friend. Houston is at a historic crossroads where we can either fall backwards or pave a brighter future for all, and I could not be more excited about the prospect of leading Houston to a place where everybody has the opportunity to thrive. So, Friend, will you join my team’s efforts to bring experience and leadership to the Houston Mayor’s office and help tackle our city’s most pressing needs together by [contributing $25 or $50 today toward our critical end-of-year fundraising goals?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wB7DWu1u8h5QTGLUn-vuE3WPPWvCC2U04B5_Qp_U_HaoQfXei0UiBwu3MrxSinaoRHwEuD3CGo4iortjZk9sWZFtyZphxNGQ2RGmhnfGvKvZAZmGZnKKKZrwFT11YXt5vZiacqM_SOjLmqOUs6TC-OiAu-RRqF6Ki4O3KfLTIIxJreT2Yt7noPlZ6kPsySW6DXVcIhgG0JoCi1WahpaGHlOSMorlSJiSM8ZPB6_Ik7xSxx5G-wdmD3LeGnRtrhwhy0icoJw0ZfonT89pOTj9B8vt4G3g4m_yLPi65UiXxvgfc8T6pzzon9atOGHVo2hHfqrTXbthkSYltY0T_Pskjk/3sd/3ZXS_J3uQDeYBjf7W_1pvA/h1/GeYObknAmakt63fYc_D8ez9Wi3E9clU4ZISrp-JvsWI)

clean_body: Houston is the city I was born and raised in, and the spirit of our great city runs strong within me. Our city’s communities are resilient and innovative. | | | Amanda is fighting to ensure that our minority and women-owned businesses have the resources they need. | | Dear Friend, Houston is the city I was born and raised in, and the spirit of our great city runs strong within me. Our city’s communities are resilient and innovative, and each of us stand so much to gain with effective and proven leadership at the helm. But we can’t bring a better future to Houston alone, Friend. Houston is at a historic crossroads where we can either fall backwards or pave a brighter future for all, and I could not be more excited about the prospect of leading Houston to a place where everybody has the opportunity to thrive. So, Friend, will you join my team’s efforts to bring experience and leadership to the Houston Mayor’s office and help tackle our city’s most pressing needs together by If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Forever grateful, Amanda K. name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: Shepherd - Father - King
body:
While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant | | | This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=15f39e6b86fb48c8a784b0eb7340fb15&_e=jN_C5JxGVGTo_8L8WzsVBgRpRrCkGoeH8X6hAx3SfjIGOhQIyxRw7t3fK8wp4KtUzXLKMc_6txNH-JIIr2R59TOxPU4Z2tPt0srTpx0Sflf_DIqdhHGnSLj8-UQa8g5HZoRmU8sXGIk6_MskxPBNEVydwhbi-m1r-fX6PakmCLiMXIkH3uLo2a5jzagJ2v3XeG7OprTySBJ-8QDKBqPR0zGa4IcZhPiIhZoSC04wIXTiAi_nTskJ5ijfMixjpv4zgnL-r86xy5OpvOeaGBfsRLRNM8lsdSSafd5X7gWNd47vQAdGoYRD81KOwMHf8gXUe5c0gAmntogAbb_U7JNrTs-F7PQQ_vXsooMQeec0CdgpEljy_Jrb4cCXIgupAfBS)
---
| | Dear Friend,
While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don't know his full story--especially the tragedies that befall his family and his beautiful turn to repentance. In fact, at its heart, the story of David is about fathers and sons.

King David's momentous story provides profound insights into many of life's most important questions, including: What are my responsibilities to God? What do I owe my fellow man? How do I lead my family? How do I turn away from sin? What is the best way to lead others?

Taught by Hillsdale College Professor of English Justin Jackson, **" The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King"** examines the Old Testament books of First and Second Samuel. This eight-lesson course explores David's character and the consequences of his choices on his family and the people of Israel.
---
| | **This is why we 've produced our online course, "The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King," which is now available on DVD. And you can reserve your copy using this secure link:**

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=15f39e6b86fb48c8a784b0eb7340fb15&_e=jN_C5JxGVGTo_8L8WzsVBgRpRrCkGoeH8X6hAx3SfjIGOhQIyxRw7t3fK8wp4KtUzXLKMc_6txNH-JIIr2R59TOxPU4Z2tPt0srTpx0Sflf_DIqdhHGnSLj8-UQa8g5HZoRmU8sXGIk6_MskxPBNEVydwhbi-m1r-fX6PakmCLiMXIkH3uLo2a5jzagJ2v3XeG7OprTySBJ-8QDKBqPR0zGa4IcZhPiIhZoSC04wIXS5ErY1yZqPm3qpTKTUSOsbC-ychytmoFZUh-C7FVHopVozk3zz7hYw_u4UktPGJGlNGsDNIwuz3VAG5kJ_BK9A4BGyaQcQxhvFEs6mbLu9g5DMsJJfWZliA3qcLi6hqd9kw8692rOWPdoVECQn34Tb)** By viewing the course, you'll learn more about the nature of God, family, leadership, sin, and repentance; in short, you'll learn more about what truly matters in life. **I hope you 'll reserve your DVD today and share its abiding lessons with your family and friends. The DVD is perfect for a Bible study or homeschool curriculum.**
---
| [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=15f39e6b86fb48c8a784b0eb7340fb15&_e=jN_C5JxGVGTo_8L8WzsVBgRpRrCkGoeH8X6hAx3SfjIGOhQIyxRw7t3fK8wp4KtUzXLKMc_6txNH-JIIr2R59TOxPU4Z2tPt0srTpx0Sflf_DIqdhHGnSLj8-UQa8g5HZoRmU8sXGIk6_MskxPBNEVydwhbi-m1r-fX6PakmCLiMXIkH3uLo2a5jzagJ2v3XeG7OprTySBJ-8QDKBqPR0zGa4IcZhPiIhZoSC04wIXSYHxFYl-i-HEDvmBwHdprnrjSZ8_Sf5qlB4ZdGFWooiIsSkskZY8MvRXWj8PYwgNaGXffD5B4W-0NdgyELM4sXrsUpVNQQFbC5nYBLZHwySZS2RY-DM9CcCws4H8VpsVIJlyot5a6DwiwyJp8bNGOo)
---
| | Let's learn what truly matters in life by studying **" The David Story."**

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

**P.S.** If you'd like to secure a DVD box set of **" The David Story"** while they're available, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more in support of reaching and teaching millions on behalf of liberty.

Reserve your DVD box set using the secure link below:

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Donald Trump is really, really, really, really mad. He's had a very rough couple weeks with even more--four!--January 6th Committee criminal referrals than expected. More about Donny's anger, inside …
body:
Also, MTG & Lauren Boebert are at each other’s throats. Get popcorn.
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc02e47ac-2329-44c6-ad0a-ae30cf800976/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, I hope you all have had the best of holidays, filled with love, joy, seeing missed friends and family and not too many drunk MAGA uncles :). Here is the latest edition of our newsletter! *** Donald Trump is really, really, really, really mad. **[He's had a very rough couple weeks with even more--four!--January 6th Committee criminal referrals than expected.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td27f141b-f46d-4004-821c-1fdcb35b5a6b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) There’s also news they’re now working closely with the Department of Justice. More about Donny's anger here: [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=JhMFENDj5CA](https://default.salsalabs.org/T897180b6-15b8-4b35-9a0e-37f8f3eb8011/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) * **[Have a canine best friend in your life? We know they need to eat, and Bezzie is awesome because you can get a custom mix of the dog food specifically tailored to the nutritional needs of your little pawed pal. Sign up to try Bezzie through BlueAmp and get 50% off your first order, and free shipping!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T34bb8b16-26a8-4962-be90-99f10e48f444/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** * President Zelensky of Ukraine made a suprise visit to speak to Congress. An incredible moment with echoes of past conflicts in Europe, most Americans were filled with admiration as this actor/comedian turned wartime leader made his case. **Yet, as most members of Congress cheered, MAGA nuts such as Matt Gaetz & Lauren Boebert spat venom. Ditto waste of oxygen Don Jr. & propagandist/spoiled toddler Tucker Carlson. **I wish it were just innocent stupidity. But there's plenty of evidence the loony Right is purposely sharing Russian propaganda. See here: [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=-egsED-zv0Q&t=7s](https://default.salsalabs.org/T08768742-2ec2-4295-8e1e-fd8a50b81a0f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) * **The story of George Santos, **GOP Congressman-elect who's lied about, well, EVERYTHING, keeps getting stranger: [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=D13LiVGWLfE](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0881afd2-31fe-4cee-ba41-cd62cf02c962/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) * **Majorie Taylor Greene and Lauren Boebert are in a knock down, drag out brawl **which portends bad things for Republicans hoping to do anything in the House: [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=LNkzxF1SzfQ&t=25s](https://default.salsalabs.org/T773feac3-5237-45c9-bc59-bb7e4dd9fff8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thanks for reading this edition of the Blue Amp Action Newsletter! In solidarity, Cliff [**PS: Appreciate our work finding timely actions and good candidates to share with you? Your $5 contribution would mean vital support for our network’s efforts to defend urgent and timely progressive causes in the coming year.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4d958ddd-5bc4-4611-8fb6-5d2785dbda36/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| | | | |
---

1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com

| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbeb46a95-231b-40bc-850d-281510d118dd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

Sorry to bother you, but I urgently need your help.

I just had my team run the numbers and we're still coming up _**$7,539**_ short of our End-of-Year Goal.

If we fail to hit this crucial goal before the new year, 2023 could be just like this past year: _**Astronomical inflation.

Pain at the pump.

Skyrocketing crime.

And, an overrun southern border.**_

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62130889:6zGMjwGNp:m:1:3331421248:984686FEB7C7093707F0AA9A611247B6:r)
---

Without the resources we need, it will be a lot tougher to champion our American values and stop the Democrats from turning this country into a socialist nightmare.

---
| | [HELP PUSH US OVER THE LINE](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62130889:6zGMjwGNp:m:1:3331421248:984686FEB7C7093707F0AA9A611247B6:r)
---

So I'm humbly asking you to _**[spare whatever you can to help push us over the line.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62130889:6zGMjwGNp:m:1:3331421248:984686FEB7C7093707F0AA9A611247B6:r "spare whatever you
can to help push us over the line.")**_ Whether it's $25 or $100, **no amount of money is too small to have a real impact.**

I hope I can count on you - you've never let me down before.

Unapologetically American,

On Wednesday, Pope Francis asked pilgrims at the Vatican to pray for former Pope Benedict XVI who is “very sick.” “I want to ask you all for a special prayer for Pope Emeritus Benedict who sustains the Church in his silence. He is very sick,” he said. Adding, “We ask the Lord to console and sustain him in this witness of love for the Church to the very end.”

[**Can you chip in just $1 (that's not a mistake or a typo) to our progressive movement right now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56532009/385299648/234291150?amount=1&amounts=1,2,3,4,5&refcode=MTFC_20221228_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MmJhNjRkOS0wZDg3LWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uWeQc5vCf4LDNquoOHSz-toEw6rWBT-Jn8RMLX_0yGo=)

Let me explain:

From the start, this movement was built by grassroots activists and everyday Americans who stepped up in small but important ways to help elect a gay, Japanese-American, teacher, and progressive (me!) to Congress.

Since then, you all have helped me accomplish so much -- we’ve fought for LGBTQ+ rights, stood up to MAGA extremism, and championed veterans’ well-being.

To this day, everything we’ve worked for has continued to rely on small-dollar donors like YOU, Peter -- not big Super PACs and billionaires like so many of my counterparts in the GOP.

**Peter -- let’s prove together that $1 can change the world.**

subject: A few days remain
body:
| | | [](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=ddb1cdd8f2&e=fdefed58de)
---
Hello Peter,The end of 2022 is officially here. At Curley’s House, we’ve had an incredible year filled with helping our community and those who live in it.Sadly, it’s been a rough year... much rougher than most. Families have struggled more than ever to put food on the table because of the disaster state that our economy is in. **It’s worse than ever, trust me.** This is a labor of love for me but financially our food bank has been hit by the record inflation too. Buying what we buy costs much more so frankly we have less to give out. I’ve done my best to make up that gap every way I can, but if it keeps up like this we may be in trouble.
[](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=425585712c&e=fdefed58de)
I’m never going to stop feeding this community and that’s why I’m writing to you today.Every donation that you make to Curley’s House is tax-deductible. I’m sure that as they year comes to a close you’re doing your charitable donations as we all are. I want you to consider donating to our food bank here in South Florida so we can continue the great work that we do.When you donate here, the money goes directly to buying food for the people. I’m a Christian conservative woman who supports our community, our police and our freedoms. There are so many scam charities out there and it breaks my heart to see. What we do here - we do for the community and we’ve done it for twenty years.So, please, if you want to help the great people out here to continue doing what we do - click below and donate your TAX-DEDUCTIBLE donation right now.
| [SEND YOUR $15 TAX-DEDUCTIBLE DONATION NOW!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=1807eaa366&e=fdefed58de)

clean_body: | | | Hello Peter,The end of 2022 is officially here. At Curley’s House, we’ve had an incredible year filled with helping our community and those who live in it.Sadly, it’s been a rough year... much rougher than most. Families have struggled more than ever to put food on the table because of the disaster state that our economy is in. It’s worse than ever, trust me. This is a labor of love for me but financially our food bank has been hit by the record inflation too. Buying what we buy costs much more so frankly we have less to give out. I’ve done my best to make up that gap every way I can, but if it keeps up like this we may be in trouble. I’m never going to stop feeding this community and that’s why I’m writing to you today.Every donation that you make to Curley’s House is tax-deductible. I’m sure that as they year comes to a close you’re doing your charitable donations as we all are. I want you to consider donating to our food bank here in South Florida so we can continue the great work that we do.When you donate here, the money goes directly to buying food for the people. I’m a Christian conservative woman who supports our community, our police and our freedoms. There are so many scam charities out there and it breaks my heart to see. What we do here - we do for the community and we’ve done it for twenty years.So, please, if you want to help the great people out here to continue doing what we do - click below and donate your TAX-DEDUCTIBLE donation right now. | | | | | | | | With love and gratitude,Lavern SpicerFounder of Curley’s House | | | | | | | | Copyright (C) 2022 American Conservatives United. All rights reserved.

clean_body: Virginia is home to 2023’s first-in-the-nation Special Elections. | Derek, Virginia will be home to the first three elections of 2023. In SD-07, HD-24, and HD-35, Virginians will be the first Americans to head to the polls next year – and in politics, momentum is everything. That’s why it’s so critical that we turn out Democrats in these essential first-in-the-nation races. With such important races on the horizon, we MUST hit our December goal to make sure VA Democrats are ready for the fight in the new year. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: ********=****** ******=****** ******=****** ******=****** Our December fundraising deadline is approaching, and we need your help to meet it and raise the money necessary to win across the Commonwealth in the January 10 Special Elections. = VA Democrats =****** =******** [content goes here] Democratic Party of Virginia PO Box 448 Richmond, VA 23218 United States Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www.vademocrats.org. body:
With the future of reproductive health care, climate change, voting rights, and much more at risk we can’t afford to not fight for every seat | | |

| | **FIRST:** Grassroots donors helped state Democrats bring home historic victories during the 2022 midterms – flipping four chambers in Minnesota, Michigan, and Pennsylvania. **THEN:** We learned that the first competitive special election of 2023 is coming up in two weeks in Virginia, our top target next year! **NOW:_A group of generous donors is matching all gifts 7X to ensure we can fight for every vote in races like this one_** – but we can’t win unless we’re all in this together. That’s why we’re asking: [Can you rush an urgent year-end donation today? Our way to victory is simple: This grassroots team is powering organizing, messaging, and get-out-the-vote programs, one donation at a time.
That’s how we build power – but we can’t do it without you. And with our 7X match active until Saturday at midnight, your gift won’t have a bigger impact than it does right now.

name: Daniel Di Martino
subject: A Socialist Christmas Season… away from family.
body:
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a4c0e150dde74293921b73f3782b47fc&_e=M9ZPsapqzFzjTysiIF9OoHElDqVPUkP2NnPVMlTiNm57FZp-gi7X7r1YGHDLaxTb-M4qQl0rg3fQ-8OQ2Z14p2fvaeKEZvdxUa0Hux9n1wkQPlhQaGiNrVBmgzX7-HDQRiXq7Qw6FTY6dwMfG5ToVs8H-AKrw-AYfoVUD04qT2WjaJinee6vQhGISE-5sMfIusBG40w3idFvtlsSZ94bX7m2gP6b2EItJN0Ys9xr4nHx7yUd3b21uaCHuEbHq0p5JCj4Nga78BkFvaVV5td86w%3D%3D)
Friend,

Seven years ago, I celebrated my last Christmas with all my family in Venezuela. While I’m with my parents again this season, my grandparents, cousins, uncles, and everyone else in my family are spread thin all over the world. All because Venezuela’s socialist regime forced us to flee.

**Here’s my family’s story:**

My grandfather was a shoemaker. He started out working for others but then created his own business. He went from being a hand-made shoemaker to owning his own factory.

**Our family went from poverty to riches. What does this sound like? The American dream! **

_But all of that changed when the socialists took over. _

It wasn’t a violent revolution like Cuba, Russia, or China. This month, 24 years ago, _**Hugo Chavez was elected to office! **_

Once the socialists took control, the economy went downhill.

Venezuela sits on top of the world’s largest oil reserves. Yet, we had to get in line for hours to get gas in our cars.

**Prices rose as the government tried to print its way into prosperity.** Eventually, I couldn't fit enough cash in my wallet to go to the movies because the money was so worthless.

**Socialists blamed businessmen and greed.** The government confiscated businesses and put price controls in place. Shortages became widespread. For a few weeks, there would be no milk. Then it would come back for a few weeks, and then, gone again.

I want to tell my story to high school students around the United States. They need to know the truth about socialism. **That’s why I founded the Dissident Project. **

[_**Can you donate $10, $25, or $50 to Young Voice and help us teach the next generation about the dangers of socialism? Click here to donate to support our work >>**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a4c0e150dde74293921b73f3782b47fc&_e=M9ZPsapqzFzjTysiIF9OoHElDqVPUkP2NnPVMlTiNm57FZp-gi7X7r1YGHDLaxTb-M4qQl0rg3fQ-8OQ2Z14p2fvaeKEZvdxUa0Hux9n1wltUKWsBf5VFlPolop_gVHcpZ6OAw7DaoFQrwr67j5syfu69dbEfIvnBYOEqdOKanFWxFpreaqRek8Xc2fHDJCj9rdL17QoJT-4SBw3syriLhQuFSCUmELxQsagmcA78p54W1dBRvVHbNrNFQ4H6ROxeKkz4X_qTQOrbP1vnNurFw%3D%3D)

**Young Voice’s Dissident** project brings survivors of tyrannical socialist countries to high schools around the United States to tell our stories.

We are countering the mainstream narratives about how peaceful and successful socialism can be. Too many young people are taught to believe the United States is an evil, oppressive country and that capitalism is a failure.

**Young Voices’ Dissident project has speakers from Hong Kong, North Korea, Cuba, and Venezuela. We all have unique stories that high schoolers must hear. **

My goal is to raise $15,000 by the end of the month to fund our speakers. It costs roughly $1,500 to host a speaking event on a high school campus.

Your generous gift allows us to keep these talks free of charge for schools.

[_**Help me share my story with young Americans and tell them about the true horrors of socialism. Click here to send your gift >>>**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a4c0e150dde74293921b73f3782b47fc&_e=M9ZPsapqzFzjTysiIF9OoHElDqVPUkP2NnPVMlTiNm57FZp-gi7X7r1YGHDLaxTb-M4qQl0rg3fQ-8OQ2Z14p2fvaeKEZvdxUa0Hux9n1wlzoMSVVtk6hzekcENp0ApfTJDwh7-DIDAj1yd4bN-JG8oNwAbHGNxOQp-NZdV37nbPY2L4Fkkz5xfWTECl0XLlYLQaq45R0VdLU3rbWoM-bll6ytuxTAAIaNnVEWjVX0RqcImT6nYgQSKrQqdQhra0-A1i4hfo57mj1z-I19uvzw%3D%3D)

In the mid to late 20th century, Venezuela was a free and prosperous country.

Venezuelans had the opportunity to go from rags to riches. Venezuela was the most prosperous Latin American country. Nothing was perfect, of course, but food was on our tables and gifts under our trees every Christmas season.

**But socialism ruined our country’s economy and led 7 million of us to flee.**

If America were to fall to socialism, it would not fall by bullets but by votes.

**The socialist takeover of America can only happen gradually, just like it did in Venezuela.**

By the time you notice the decay, it will be too late to reverse. Shortages. Skyrocketing crime. Inflation. Christmas away from family because they moved abroad, and video calls every week or every day to catch up with those who left.

We can’t let it happen in America.

**Please help me share my story with high school students and help them stop socialist ideas from creeping into our society.**

To do that, I need your help.

Please donate any amount you can generously spare today.

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a4c0e150dde74293921b73f3782b47fc&_e=M9ZPsapqzFzjTysiIF9OoHElDqVPUkP2NnPVMlTiNm57FZp-gi7X7r1YGHDLaxTb-M4qQl0rg3fQ-8OQ2Z14pxjlyqAhH06Dj8muKCuojboepI9CjeHMUWHv8QmvdSzwDjRjiVSmHJVrctEr9Z-P4QRhRutChROGTC2fspfFJKqC-pELoeYQWxu2mpdl2boJBBVxX4gHMxtQy4ob5SCaYm0g3s8iTemcFJ-qcb270TuKxo2lfEcO2Mj_XkcmiE7nxyy8Lne6YaCRwzG318DHDQ%3D%3D)
[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a4c0e150dde74293921b73f3782b47fc&_e=M9ZPsapqzFzjTysiIF9OoHElDqVPUkP2NnPVMlTiNm57FZp-gi7X7r1YGHDLaxTb-M4qQl0rg3fQ-8OQ2Z14pxjlyqAhH06Dj8muKCuojbrKLeqSDgvdblRT2Azwo3S-Qdp73Uya7FjsSyvtTj7GB88BxLAQ1gRB9Ln6d8OuO8oMFi4xG_WZ975N_J0Mx0wud-_ndoJGTWvmaJbXAWhgQ5gAHl5u2Pct9cmpKKO3votYzcsDg6sQbg6wmRbbsBiD1xctdXxcitAdbbdnzsoB1Q%3D%3D)

name: Laura Nevitt,  Keystone Progress
subject: Staying vigilant in the New Year.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www
body:
https://www.kpef.info [https://www.kpef.info]

Dear Friend,

We are hopeful as we enter 2023. After strong wins in the midterm elections, this New Year brings with it more opportunity for change.

But we need to stay vigilant and committed to our work. We have to continue to build coalitions, share knowledge, mobilize voters, and support new activists. We need to do this to ensure that we're meeting our mission of building progressive power in our communities to dismantle the root causes of oppression. We will push forward in promoting progressive values of equity and inclusion as we build a strong and active progressive activist movement in Pennsylvania.

Conservatives still control our State Senate, and the State House is split 50-50. While our state legislators are still pushing "heartbeat" bills and other dangerous laws, we have to keep pushing back and building up our presence in PA.

We need your help in 2023. Will you work with us to create a progressive Pennsylvania?

Please, give today so that we can meet our end-of-year goal.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=122822&amount=20 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=122822&amount=20]

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=122822&amount=50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=122822&amount=50]

Whatever you can afford... [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=122822]

Wishing you a joyful New Year!

Laura
Executive Director
Keystone Progress

name: Developing 1/6 Report (via VPP)
subject: re: Kevin McCarthy’s ethics violations
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Republican leader Kevin McCarthy is a disgrace
| **__BREAKING NEWS:__** | [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/investigate-mccarthy/?source=VPP_20221228_EMPET_E3_T0_AC&t=6&akid=5932%2E878179%2ESRwwN8) | [ADD YOUR NAME TO DEMAND THE HOUSE ETHICS COMMITTEE INVESTIGATE KEVIN MCCARTHY »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/investigate-mccarthy/?source=VPP_20221228_EMPET_E3_T0_AC&t=7&akid=5932%2E878179%2ESRwwN8)
---
After years of being Trump’s right-hand man, Kevin McCarthy was just reported for ethics violations for REFUSING to testify before the January 6 Committee.

But in just a few short days, the GOP will seize the House majority, DESTROY the January 6 investigation, _and let McCarthy off the hook!_

**So it’s CRITICAL that we put the pressure on for the House Ethics Committee to investigate McCarthy and hold him accountable before it’s too late!**

[**We need 7,500 signatures by MIDNIGHT to have any chance of bringing him to justice: add your name to our petition demanding that House Ethics investigates Kevin McCarthy »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/investigate-mccarthy/?source=VPP_20221228_EMPET_E3_T0_AC&t=8&akid=5932%2E878179%2ESRwwN8)
[SIGN NOW: INVESTIGATE KEVIN MCCARTHY! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/investigate-mccarthy/?source=VPP_20221228_EMPET_E3_T0_AC&t=9&akid=5932%2E878179%2ESRwwN8)
---
Thank you,

_Team VPP_

(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

name: Daniel Di Martino
subject: A Socialist Christmas Season… away from family.
body:
[](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6e40148024274f6c83a2f38ed7db8ca8&_e=iPdxKKVkPF_B_g8Fg-2J2wZh_9Yi7kvTU2FbhEJ1eifKFVJ0SixSLi7M_umJrCc0BOvXdJDEqPxoKT47aGN_Ezso3NhTNUtAE9xGOBr3uY-EpdLB61abxbFCNpGka2WApbRaI2je6J5_q5Z4sQ0pTE8fGACWe8stNjermMsV4heTEVB8pXCd5gewCekViHdmrbVUKi2N0lbS9lAvK282yYb2qt-yOTOinFVId-G5-1nfBXe3HOFKrbI0uGXTKdURw9gpx60Rv79m7NXsRqFN4w%3D%3D)
Friend,

Seven years ago, I celebrated my last Christmas with all my family in Venezuela. While I'm with my parents again this season, my grandparents, cousins, uncles, and everyone else in my family are spread thin all over the world. All because Venezuela's socialist regime forced us to flee.

**Here 's my family's story:**

My grandfather was a shoemaker. He started out working for others but then created his own business. He went from being a hand-made shoemaker to owning his own factory.

**Our family went from poverty to riches. What does this sound like? The American dream! **

_But all of that changed when the socialists took over. _

It wasn't a violent revolution like Cuba, Russia, or China. This month, 24 years ago, _**Hugo Chavez was elected to office! **_

Once the socialists took control, the economy went downhill.

Venezuela sits on top of the world's largest oil reserves. Yet, we had to get in line for hours to get gas in our cars.

**Prices rose as the government tried to print its way into prosperity.** Eventually, I couldn't fit enough cash in my wallet to go to the movies because the money was so worthless.

**Socialists blamed businessmen and greed.** The government confiscated businesses and put price controls in place. Shortages became widespread. For a few weeks, there would be no milk. Then it would come back for a few weeks, and then, gone again.

I want to tell my story to high school students around the United States. They need to know the truth about socialism. **That 's why I founded the Dissident Project. **

[_**Can you donate $10, $25, or $50 to Young Voice and help us teach the next generation about the dangers of socialism? Click here to donate to support our work >>**_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6e40148024274f6c83a2f38ed7db8ca8&_e=iPdxKKVkPF_B_g8Fg-2J2wZh_9Yi7kvTU2FbhEJ1eifKFVJ0SixSLi7M_umJrCc0BOvXdJDEqPxoKT47aGN_Ezso3NhTNUtAE9xGOBr3uY8p-2_S9UI2FamfKsX6aSUZbVUpccXjxXkdRHTuw1koan_lNHQkM0FsiLJ1Nv2iwhf2RaMUhPHLoy1qWiOnQ41Y2mAxDU9hRke9evdJOoM-apcVfkm71wXk5vIjM75NCu9lJDOIFCnbcEEjPY9PNvFMGvfBZUwIXyvGY6xf3ByDhQ%3D%3D)

**Young Voice 's Dissident **project brings survivors of tyrannical socialist countries to high schools around the United States to tell our stories.

We are countering the mainstream narratives about how peaceful and successful socialism can be. Too many young people are taught to believe the United States is an evil, oppressive country and that capitalism is a failure.

**Young Voices ' Dissident project has speakers from Hong Kong, North Korea, Cuba, and Venezuela. We all have unique stories that high schoolers must hear. **

My goal is to raise $15,000 by the end of the month to fund our speakers. It costs roughly $1,500 to host a speaking event on a high school campus.

Your generous gift allows us to keep these talks free of charge for schools.

[_**Help me share my story with young Americans and tell them about the true horrors of socialism. Click here to send your gift >>>**_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6e40148024274f6c83a2f38ed7db8ca8&_e=iPdxKKVkPF_B_g8Fg-2J2wZh_9Yi7kvTU2FbhEJ1eifKFVJ0SixSLi7M_umJrCc0BOvXdJDEqPxoKT47aGN_Ezso3NhTNUtAE9xGOBr3uY8esMT3R5SBti2qRGz5_v5yHQ_BrM9XIUznq4P0TwMW-k1EByEdCo8QTW1mur4sqNb-l3gmZa70dC_92FLFmMMl1oj9BoWh0LVzAeLcQEgYORBLPdlyWEXBKcD1lfKa4K-UxlYSbUwBJhifzeXPeQYL2ulp4Jzz4OBf4Z1rs6F_Lg%3D%3D)

In the mid to late 20th century, Venezuela was a free and prosperous country.

Venezuelans had the opportunity to go from rags to riches. Venezuela was the most prosperous Latin American country. Nothing was perfect, of course, but food was on our tables and gifts under our trees every Christmas season.

**But socialism ruined our country 's economy and led 7 million of us to flee.**

If America were to fall to socialism, it would not fall by bullets but by votes.

**The socialist takeover of America can only happen gradually, just like it did in Venezuela.**

By the time you notice the decay, it will be too late to reverse. Shortages. Skyrocketing crime. Inflation. Christmas away from family because they moved abroad, and video calls every week or every day to catch up with those who left.

We can't let it happen in America.

**Please help me share my story with high school students and help them stop socialist ideas from creeping into our society.**

To do that, I need your help.

Please donate any amount you can generously spare today.

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6e40148024274f6c83a2f38ed7db8ca8&_e=iPdxKKVkPF_B_g8Fg-2J2wZh_9Yi7kvTU2FbhEJ1eifKFVJ0SixSLi7M_umJrCc0BOvXdJDEqPxoKT47aGN_E2OsgeogC_9XxbZPA2w4HQaJR0n3Z-LITtVSK9o2kkF6wRTx5zaKEry5k33Ufh7gTjYUoHERc9JrSLm1p8ufBO8IDwtudrmDsEE-3F9a-CetVoiiiHCzWeLuYoEyHTYDiex3915LZ-nQrJCDu50f_OySfeVnF_k2IwU0yjRC5tOddgwIlMzlrwLZUV520nNVag%3D%3D)

[_**Sponsor a School $1,500 >>>**_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6e40148024274f6c83a2f38ed7db8ca8&_e=iPdxKKVkPF_B_g8Fg-2J2wZh_9Yi7kvTU2FbhEJ1eifKFVJ0SixSLi7M_umJrCc0BOvXdJDEqPxoKT47aGN_E2OsgeogC_9XxbZPA2w4HQaVtqeKWLbT8I8sTKEne1oYBXNU77uT6GBfIuNLnGCSOXCGXD3J_WPAgKLfuWwJmT98H65vLWvIaVLcxczFqo8XSGK0kzwOG_oR1QT2llPo793E-9SXbstnXcNSHNAruYyA_fzBk0jKFTS2HABtNesmliM5Lvx3W_aRySLVnyLBRA%3D%3D)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6e40148024274f6c83a2f38ed7db8ca8&_e=iPdxKKVkPF_B_g8Fg-2J2wZh_9Yi7kvTU2FbhEJ1eifKFVJ0SixSLi7M_umJrCc0BOvXdJDEqPxoKT47aGN_Ezso3NhTNUtAE9xGOBr3uY_-CITyxou8qZBYuyeZGPVaXSzvcR5DGhdckteQokDhduc1BJaqylhQvXksjNCK1rEP-NkNhVCIPhT_mdnqiZ7PguEBEhCWve6JpXeEn77LpgDZvBm1z1uJPeumQgKNI9PO7g0NwplCJrU6mRjl7mwAFE_4xC-TPaqY79AxI2J70Q%3D%3D)

name: Brent Bozell
subject: The Washington Post is falling
body:
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=eaf4150d490441c8b8edc6b156d9f9b5&_e=w5octIUuMrIaxwCt9xw4V4EBm7Q6tJdoL0lHqE68lPOtUWpt0BWQuOpkQdqrOmMQdEIP3olHD3XNOYOQGEu12w6Qkxss3qVZp2Zf0ZDsWWUHtqkVZolCHkm4Exy6VnoxcaAQcQHOzAsgTdLy0gV2Hnk5ebz4rvylNycMdTPBfNpCphxKA86o9Mw0Mr_6gforDaybkj6b1DxA8eklLOfNDmB0w0D2bMTKXTJDjSlsV6XyrnjIAPv-WfFtKEdZgvZ2b8i5y1_tv8EjhonwCYIi0g%3D%3D)
Friend,

I just read one of the best things of 2022 - _The Washington Pos_ t, which lost 500k subscribers this past year, announced upcoming layoffs.

Do you know what this means, Friend?

**We 're winning!**

My name is Brent Bozell, Founder and President of the Media Research Center (MRC).

MRC is the only conservative organization dedicated to exposing the radical left-wing activists pretending to be journalists and stopping them from using the media to push their socialist agenda.

Despite the Biden administration and the radical left’s mission to rewrite our Constitution, our mission is to reinforce and protect us from tyrants using the power of government to take away our liberties. body:
The DNC is facing its final deadline before 2023. And I hope I can count on you to support them. | |
---
Hey, Derek -- Wes Moore, Governor-elect of the great state of Maryland here. In just a minute, I’m going to ask you to **[rush a $7 donation to the DNC before their end-of-year deadline.](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtF81Kr_XOYfXS47DM_ccJ3oDEPNIBpOo7uCgwnD2SG7oQTsrfBePTpoPiouTmSq-bgjduZzxx1uyWzG_g3IY_x_j6SGStWBicvKWai4z81Jtws2eMwVaqRkCf7FMk4iq6oyu-Q-JZrEeic-LrC2e7uCL5ShSSagv0lUbM60mf-eNWwxMKojJZ0z00QH2pepfgHrd32kHPuxeldUPbQk3FOYdoPW8s4V2pLgl-7_95c0JkTY1S8em95UUJLEyf_vWsZoyYShgRnED2bhiI0jXxlJW6Czx3EY19YVUuh_R-Gr9spzmdACewTJMg88msL7GR2CclgmdWN9X-4dpD46BxJTUtGEmeSCLxvrS11SdlLzfnnz_p_Vd32Vh3UP3dpGLufu8UOOHe9ZyjupHDxGVNDPCZtGrQiXtOqNj5Myn-RcskTxo_2-AFVFcebes8yK3tW_QLWfynN_q2B8SGukW-/3sd/fBkolf_dQjWLVrwT_uRTHg/h0/EB6FnKebHjjnJLvU8OI6YUixIxd43Yvgr7lWsw24cWY)** But first, I hope you’ll give me a moment to explain why supporting our party right now is so important. This team donated your hard-earned time and money this election cycle without hesitation. Your work and dedication to electing Democrats allowed our party to make an incredible difference in races across the nation by defending and flipping key seats and Governors’ offices and protecting our Senate majority. The common denominator in the investments that made all of this happen is the early support of this grassroots team. We’ve made incredible strides this cycle and I hope I can count on this team to continue to make that happen in 2023, 2024, and beyond. **[The DNC needs your help to get across the finish line, which is why I’m personally asking: Will you rush a $7 donation to the DNC before their final deadline of 2022?](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtF81Kr_XOYfXS47DM_ccJ3oDEPNIBpOo7uCgwnD2SG7oQTsrfBePTpoPiouTmSq-bgjduZzxx1uyWzG_g3IY_x_j6SGStWBicvKWai4z81DvRQNQ2_wpahBJVWX29Y_QBfVjxtuGyeZPwSx5ECX_XZ0V5YhenWxICFA-6RQL51S6jdpY2S6va13_fiAOPmQOMwG0VtwuuDpJV612llk3sqHZU9Iwae8aQ1M1uE94UMUhnvx9nCQCSR4AfFjP97ahDkghOCbpSxo6zCoJ-mAe0Sa3GmrMVWdGgcbTZ6Yhrh18qhJWaT-dNsqUUWB0qna24UGSB-OHumibpWto0uhQRsUtfUWvaYjU1EVNc4saWQUURmOhYjcGjLSgrAUq2wpCT80o9-J49zHI_SDOgIHKCRcA58gYnL-kA6S4YU14MUtbzi7HSEpQVmJEesHbBAisAYUHX41flttwKy7eh6YIY/3sd/fBkolf_dQjWLVrwT_uRTHg/h1/4x2uxT06gk_98ZcWalwMOTp_u2Fs5EIFDA29K8G6bcY)**

clean_body: The DNC is facing its final deadline before 2023. And I hope I can count on you to support them. | | Hey, Derek -- Wes Moore, Governor-elect of the great state of Maryland here. In just a minute, I’m going to ask you to But first, I hope you’ll give me a moment to explain why supporting our party right now is so important. This team donated your hard-earned time and money this election cycle without hesitation. Your work and dedication to electing Democrats allowed our party to make an incredible difference in races across the nation by defending and flipping key seats and Governors’ offices and protecting our Senate majority. The common denominator in the investments that made all of this happen is the early support of this grassroots team. We’ve made incredible strides this cycle and I hope I can count on this team to continue to make that happen in 2023, 2024, and beyond. | | Peter, What do Oregon, Arkansas, Ohio and Virginia have in common? All four states have a political tax credit. Here's how it works, Peter: if you make under $100,000 a year, **you can donate $50 to a candidate or political action committee of your choice this year, and reduce your taxes by $50 next year**. Couples filing jointly and earning less than $200,000 qualify for a $100 deduction. **[Time is running out to make a qualifying contribution. name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=93a6866a6a3747859a2468604b360982&_e=2SmYfYVo4uxs_CtB9Rg2mkItpRIZ1cm9LPYIR8srmHtz_JJN3LkIUqaNYTY36ot0EWjkS_epi97LcCZz0FXc_EQu_nA3SzVSlqKCKYWOCr-ezud9J2g34yT6l586UNBYwBJ4I09qAxngLPTJ0XvDnSfEYXMPgHKJA1y73cJTZWT0ptT9v8u02WKhm4MnP4WvNAiS9602PEnAb4nthIRe-iZSvmh3nu64X1O-lsCAruZI2fH3hiOX37yHfXtlu37al6nLNXUkL12DA4kNbDDIf1WSLSV71twL0TG_zAkWXO5cnhw-BxzsYn3fGL9VZ-7vuXN2Gz0GRsWEyyYPm2tJSue-qI3IfY0_RdsJxbDGChnWwlxdm0jfOo4pxnSf-hQm2mQBUOT7aFZM0WikNplTF6qVwHzLtpJMhTX1Nwp64MbxRb-XvBYgoTl1kgpYm14e)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=93a6866a6a3747859a2468604b360982&_e=2SmYfYVo4uxs_CtB9Rg2mkItpRIZ1cm9LPYIR8srmHtz_JJN3LkIUqaNYTY36ot0EWjkS_epi97LcCZz0FXc_EQu_nA3SzVSlqKCKYWOCr-ezud9J2g34yT6l586UNBYwBJ4I09qAxngLPTJ0XvDnSfEYXMPgHKJA1y73cJTZWT0ptT9v8u02WKhm4MnP4WvNAiS9602PEnAb4nthIRe-iZSvmh3nu64X1O-lsCAruZI2fH3hiOX37yHfXtlu37al6nLNXUkL12DA4kNbDDIf5jiitqwaJT59uNZ56zTb69vvlqZz-b_ZV97xwc6M7i3_nwBmmaEvH2DiUgyGwxessdN5uOTJdcjEBmD6Qtt3oGX3IX0hDt_ViJxlkpyA9Pw0NTE2XlwoQmu0qCnHfeNEgPU5xOpMLahJcAEAns_Ffqts-zI-IDP-wn3nEEJNStN)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=93a6866a6a3747859a2468604b360982&_e=2SmYfYVo4uxs_CtB9Rg2mkItpRIZ1cm9LPYIR8srmHtz_JJN3LkIUqaNYTY36ot0EWjkS_epi97LcCZz0FXc_EQu_nA3SzVSlqKCKYWOCr-ezud9J2g34yT6l586UNBYwBJ4I09qAxngLPTJ0XvDnSfEYXMPgHKJA1y73cJTZWT0ptT9v8u02WKhm4MnP4WvNAiS9602PEnAb4nthIRe-iZSvmh3nu64X1O-lsCAruZI2fH3hiOX37yHfXtlu37al6nLNXUkL12DA4kNbDDIfwrEx_aYanx8EcyAIw7AS-GBQOUdcDFDmDgr6eop5pRpvnFkQEKtQWfEtqdESU9Tzk9lUjJ32ApgUIVu1UV3e214RvMP9sAnWa6BujdFFqi1mcqh-S6ZbCueEzOE3M7WG9vBRl9slvuvGq_iMIDyMmyVAGp0x-Ta6-uNKJ0k7SY5)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=93a6866a6a3747859a2468604b360982&_e=2SmYfYVo4uxs_CtB9Rg2mkItpRIZ1cm9LPYIR8srmHtz_JJN3LkIUqaNYTY36ot0EWjkS_epi97LcCZz0FXc_EQu_nA3SzVSlqKCKYWOCr-ezud9J2g34yT6l586UNBYwBJ4I09qAxngLPTJ0XvDnSfEYXMPgHKJA1y73cJTZWT0ptT9v8u02WKhm4MnP4WvNAiS9602PEnAb4nthIRe-iZSvmh3nu64X1O-lsCAruZI2fH3hiOX37yHfXtlu37al6nLNXUkL12DA4kNbDDIf_mJ7wRuyPPgne-9ZQTzW8H2wcWmfKwOSteca7picEUA_AmdEnR6waqE1jyoeJVWdfwVb-F8twkK9I-kGKglOJCA7QBdzEB-sf4eselg_C7m26k7WcNr9aw3gUKnG6N0XNfQmm-NTQ-ETyhGWMSDADVlzDdyVn4bbIAMxb0dGEov).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Sent to Freedom Nation Today subscribers.
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: We’re suing hospitals that butcher children for profit
body:
| |
---
| | My fellow concerned American, Imagine a world where a doctor decides to amputate your child’s leg to cure appendicitis. _Ridiculous, dangerous, and irresponsible_ ... right? Now... imagine a world where that doctor is praised for his or her “bravery” and for giving your child the body he or she was “always meant to have.” I paint a disturbing picture. But this is happening under our noses. **Except it’s not amputations for appendicitis -- it's double mastectomies, chemical castration drugs, and genitalia mutilation surgeries for children with gender dysphoria.** The Center for American Liberty is now actively engaged in legal action against Kaiser Permanente Hospital for physically mutilating and destroying the health of an innocent girl – Chloe Cole – after convincing her that she needed to be a boy to survive. **I need your help to fund this legal battle.** [**Will you donate an urgent $35 or more tax-deductible gift today to the Center for American Liberty to help cover our lawyer fees, months of research, and expert witness costs?**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=1b01fafbbdd74592b66039ad2d2a2e6c&_e=AL1MilMKl_knvlY_8H5DHEl5BHieWOV2dBO1nTinU_0ZdL2eNCRd0JgYzyOs066nfBpP40Z0Nm2FeuZHF8QM8M3X27nd_P_j2Vp6xOAFJJmSoEgtPjTKbAsgyx6v6qj-dOK25T-wdo5eS0YDgUzYornk5qp-YH9CUeFPPuCoOOVgxAaLKaeHkYkGp8LGZm-5wdyi4GGaUS2A3T0MLz1axNUBIo4Yh9SoKOFkzEh_Fiq4-7tsCyaMREbVGeqE3RmswDRxEeNxW92bsbqLyAg8iWWpXHcJzGSSmILivWnqyRezBhYKeh9m1gFX7Kh1myS7ftudiZEeYVNrZ2GhLlteG5ci0_iakbS0Y0yJeaYET9FhPAAuaURaxwHq7dDlsHwF) Before you decide to donate today, let me briefly share with you the details on this case. When Chloe Cole was 13 years old, doctors began experimenting on Chloe to “transition” her from being a girl to a boy. She should have been able to trust her doctors when she told them about her anxiety and gender dysphoria. Instead, these medical “professionals” coerced Chloe and her parents into irreversible life-altering “treatment.” **Doctors told her parents they could either have a “dead daughter or a living son.”** Then, doctors lied to Chloe. They lied when they told her that absent puberty blockers and surgeries her gender dysphoria would never resolve itself.

We know that the scientific data shows that often gender dysphoria does resolve itself by the time children reach adulthood. Doctors also lied, by omission, when they failed to inform Chloe of the many less invasive treatment options that should have been an option for her. Instead, for the next several years, these medical “professionals” pumped Chloe full of chemicals used on high-risk sex offenders to castrate them. Specifically, they gave her**Lupon Depot** to stop her natural progression into puberty, which is an off-label use of the drug. **Then, when Chloe was just 16 years old, doctors performed a double mastectomy on her.** And it’s time to hold them accountable. My name is Harmeet K. Dhillon, the founder of the Center for American Liberty (CAL). And I’m helping Chloe finally receive justice. So, with your support, we’re suing the hospital and doctors that did this to Chloe. Chloe deserves justice. She finds herself just 18 years old wondering if she will ever be able to have children and knowing that if she is able to have children, she will never be able to breast feed them. Doctors robbed Chloe of her experience as a woman—and they did it through deceptive and coercive tactics. This legal battle won’t be easily won – we’re facing Kaiser Permanente Hospital, who has billions of dollars at their disposal. In fact, just last year Kaiser Permanente reported **$8 billion** profit in 2021 alone. [**So, if you’re in the position to make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to the Center of American Liberty today to help us win a historic victory against predatory doctors and hospitals butchering children for profit, I hope you will.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=1b01fafbbdd74592b66039ad2d2a2e6c&_e=AL1MilMKl_knvlY_8H5DHEl5BHieWOV2dBO1nTinU_0ZdL2eNCRd0JgYzyOs066nfBpP40Z0Nm2FeuZHF8QM8M3X27nd_P_j2Vp6xOAFJJmSoEgtPjTKbAsgyx6v6qj-dOK25T-wdo5eS0YDgUzYornk5qp-YH9CUeFPPuCoOOVgxAaLKaeHkYkGp8LGZm-5wdyi4GGaUS2A3T0MLz1axNUBIo4Yh9SoKOFkzEh_FipDRcG-kydUFQkwVkjD2M3m6HWdcO2sKeF7VR-ZYkYrPhzLwBIgAc7B9YqgNuzyXO83SFuO4FvibSzhkD9GI1uTTU6ijSAcy-fiMq-1hx-rSzdxjDviGWJeNIqBnWnvxEBFq1tZ9p2PRRg1y90XMYL9) These hospitals, transgender activists, and medical “professionals” have a lot to lose in this case so we know they will put up a huge fight—likely hiring some of the most expensive lawyers in the country to protect their interests. But Americans like you and I simply can't stand for this. You and I must make sure that no child ever goes through what Chloe Cole did. Chloe is courageously standing up for herself and for vulnerable kids everywhere. Will you stand with her? Thank you for supporting our mission today.
---
Sincerely,
---
