clean_body: | | | | My fellow concerned American, Imagine a world where a doctor decides to amputate your child’s leg to cure appendicitis. Ridiculous, dangerous, and irresponsible ... right? Now... imagine a world where that doctor is praised for his or her “bravery” and for giving your child the body he or she was “always meant to have.” I paint a disturbing picture. But this is happening under our noses. Except it’s not amputations for appendicitis -- it's double mastectomies, chemical castration drugs, and genitalia mutilation surgeries for children with gender dysphoria. The Center for American Liberty is now actively engaged in legal action against Kaiser Permanente Hospital for physically mutilating and destroying the health of an innocent girl – Chloe Cole – after convincing her that she needed to be a boy to survive. I need your help to fund this legal battle. Before you decide to donate today, let me briefly share with you the details on this case. When Chloe Cole was 13 years old, doctors began experimenting on Chloe to “transition” her from being a girl to a boy. She should have been able to trust her doctors when she told them about her anxiety and gender dysphoria. Instead, these medical “professionals” coerced Chloe and her parents into irreversible life-altering “treatment.” Doctors told her parents they could either have a “dead daughter or a living son.” Then, doctors lied to Chloe. They lied when they told her that absent puberty blockers and surgeries her gender dysphoria would never resolve itself. We know that the scientific data shows that often gender dysphoria does resolve itself by the time children reach adulthood. Doctors also lied, by omission, when they failed to inform Chloe of the many less invasive treatment options that should have been an option for her. Instead, for the next several years, these medical “professionals” pumped Chloe full of chemicals used on high-risk sex offenders to castrate them. Specifically, they gave herLupon Depot to stop her natural progression into puberty, which is an off-label use of the drug. Then, when Chloe was just 16 years old, doctors performed a double mastectomy on her. And it’s time to hold them accountable. My name is Harmeet K. Dhillon, the founder of the Center for American Liberty (CAL). And I’m helping Chloe finally receive justice. So, with your support, we’re suing the hospital and doctors that did this to Chloe. Chloe deserves justice. She finds herself just 18 years old wondering if she will ever be able to have children and knowing that if she is able to have children, she will never be able to breast feed them. Doctors robbed Chloe of her experience as a woman—and they did it through deceptive and coercive tactics. This legal battle won’t be easily won – we’re facing Kaiser Permanente Hospital, who has billions of dollars at their disposal. In fact, just last year Kaiser Permanente reported $8 billion profit in 2021 alone. These hospitals, transgender activists, and medical “professionals” have a lot to lose in this case so we know they will put up a huge fight—likely hiring some of the most expensive lawyers in the country to protect their interests. But Americans like you and I simply can't stand for this. You and I must make sure that no child ever goes through what Chloe Cole did. Chloe is courageously standing up for herself and for vulnerable kids everywhere. Will you stand with her? Thank you for supporting our mission today. Sincerely, | | | | | P.S. If we don’t fight back now and hold these medical “professionals” accountable, untold thousands of young children could suffer the same horrible fate as Chloe. We can’t allow that. | | | | The Center for American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. © The Center for American Liberty | PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177 Sent to Reclaiming American Freedom subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: Urgent message
body:
#
Peter, it’s Ilhan Omar, writing to you today with an urgent message.
I know firsthand the difficulties that come when you dare to challenge the establishment. Fighting off the corporate PACs, the political machine, and the smear attacks is an uphill battle — but _when we win, we win big._
**Thanks to Justice Democrats, our Squad is growing in Congress every cycle.**
JD’s work is invaluable to our movement and they are worth your support. The resources they raise now toward their $75,000 end-of-year goal will pay off in the future with every new Justice Democrat they help elect to Congress.
[**Will you join me today and invest in Justice Democrats during these final days of 2022, so they can hit the ground running in the new year in just a few days? $3 — or any amount — will support their critical work.**](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123906?refcode=em20221228-26784&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=26784%2E1203867%2E-8p4SC)
**[Contribute $3](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123906?refcode=em20221228-26784&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=26784%2E1203867%2E-8p4SC)**
In less than a month, Justice Democrat Summer Lee will be joining us to legislate for nothing less than the transformative change we need. We need every progressive we can get in order to win change on this scale. It will take all of us fighting together to win Medicare for All, the Green New Deal, a federal living wage, criminal justice reform, and more.
Justice Democrats is uniquely positioned to transform the Democratic Party, and they are succeeding. Investing in their work early will have long-term benefits for our movement, which is why I urge you to support them with a donation today.
[**Can you chip in $3 today to help Justice Democrats raise $75,000 by the end of the year? There isn’t much time left and what you give now will determine the future of JD’s work through the 2024 cycle — and they are worth the investment.**](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123906?refcode=em20221228-26784&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=26784%2E1203867%2E-8p4SC)
In solidarity,
Ilhan Omar

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [here.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=22&akid=26784%2E1203867%2E-8p4SC) We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [Centers for Disease Control](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=23&akid=26784%2E1203867%2E-8p4SC) and your state public health department.
---

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20221228-26784-footer&t=24&refcode2=26784_1203867_-8p4SC&akid=26784%2E1203867%2E-8p4SC)**

name: Andy Biggs
subject: What would I do…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biggs for Congress
body:
Without your support?
---
| | | | | | | | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fadd8d920e0e42e9b8c035476373fd73&_e=_35K1UtIsgqxPSpPB9-bzrV3tg16AWW_ysngxk7H2l1lJFFErsW8t9IqxQyXNvYntHk6jB1KEkjktPb0hOxwvQixpq9XMQ9NnudFAcO9fvN02yhNkd9PaVdNQXhkPfiTW_kZuDLIKYePglUGa9ShpvAzzcRP0igmdPiC8lBWohqnYGRWV2tC8xcO4uPz_654nvmI_PLCKwnQnqsqsoz6k0MG_Fss5_6Fxs3rBVrv-v2MLpmBzEAHY-jbFkAaoylTFCLuTf7JUwKA5OpGFupkSP6k0ua6dGYV_JJiN_LdK8CNETCveqBHBzFYmta-8Zez)
---
| Fellow American,
Conservative lawmakers have huge plans for the new year once Republicans officially take a majority in the 118th Congress.
We're launching several investigations, calling for impeachments in the Biden administration, and holding Swamp crooks accountable.
**Now I am facing not only major opposition from the establishment, but I am falling seriously short of my End of Year review and I am not on track to meet my goal.**
I need the resources to rally millions of Americans behind my mission and message urging my Republican colleagues to support conservative leadership...and I won't make it without your support.
**[A small, generous contribution will make all the difference in my fight to reclaim strong, conservative leadership in the House. Can I count on you?](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fadd8d920e0e42e9b8c035476373fd73&_e=_35K1UtIsgqxPSpPB9-bzrV3tg16AWW_ysngxk7H2l1lJFFErsW8t9IqxQyXNvYntHk6jB1KEkjktPb0hOxwvQixpq9XMQ9NnudFAcO9fvN02yhNkd9PaVdNQXhkPfiTW_kZuDLIKYePglUGa9ShpvAzzcRP0igmdPiC8lBWohqWVwUt11XAqwQsH0jOuZF1zZzvbszCn8R6y0_CLkD_8G5_5ylbUkH49c3ULEvqYjcboKL_zvcXIQSN4ZLWuU_8qmiaC8KNeoUggL69-IKyxCwic6mCFmtjxLT1jXUrPsUz6XIMEq1b8WJkzJwxckTX)** | | | | [SAVE OUR PARTY](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fadd8d920e0e42e9b8c035476373fd73&_e=_35K1UtIsgqxPSpPB9-bzrV3tg16AWW_ysngxk7H2l1lJFFErsW8t9IqxQyXNvYntHk6jB1KEkjktPb0hOxwvQixpq9XMQ9NnudFAcO9fvN02yhNkd9PaVdNQXhkPfiTW_kZuDLIKYePglUGa9ShpvAzzcRP0igmdPiC8lBWohol-asSDmEZRqMIJPwGcCUX74YqWDozveiN82cSZUJk0cI0qbQR1qEJfcEfyAnjk-LmQr3JyWUv0ZzfpFcyoZvefty8p1qTSNVXmh_u5lGnXPftq3InivZAjGYS9W0TJAFO-ldE-4lmTZsLtK3q5V7u)
---
We may have won a majority, but we have not taken America First leadership just yet.

**Kevin McCarthy, House moderates, and RINO establishment swamp creatures are foaming at the mouth doing everything they can to take back power.**

It's up to me to stop them and I need your help to make sure we win this Speaker position...That's why I am reaching out to only the most loyal grassroots conservatives like you.

**[So please, consider chipping into my fight to ensure the Speaker of the House is a conservative leader and stop these RINO hacks from taking over the Republican Party>>](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fadd8d920e0e42e9b8c035476373fd73&_e=_35K1UtIsgqxPSpPB9-bzrV3tg16AWW_ysngxk7H2l1lJFFErsW8t9IqxQyXNvYntHk6jB1KEkjktPb0hOxwvQixpq9XMQ9NnudFAcO9fvN02yhNkd9PaVdNQXhkPfiTW_kZuDLIKYePglUGa9ShpvAzzcRP0igmdPiC8lBWohpsQaBzA1m8N2gtv5aR3aORabyI7xIIZWQ4NRQ46CPpsmX8nlrV3t88V_M12VmIBb0YWTYMkrQMkWqJ7ftw7ahq4WIzwGsLqhem6WCF-dPiz7rvW7Zx57nzyCdN2u_JYb6iqKOUh0RNTlySQUDROYUg)**

Thank you in advance for your help!

Yours in Liberty,

Andy Biggs
Republican Congressman, AZ-5

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Santos claimed he was Jewish. He's not. He said his mom was from Belgium. She's from Brazil. In Brazil, he was charged with forging checks and we're not even 100% sure at this point that he's a U.S. citizen. How many more serial liars are hiding in the Republican caucus? CREW is on the case …
body:
Watching out for us
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc2b4853c-7479-4c6a-bd50-e9effbe44c63/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, _**You've probably seen a lot about George Santos recently** , **a Republican elected to Congress **who claimed he worked at Goldman Sachs & Citigroup, attended NYU & Baruch College. None of this was true and we know that because of the pioneering work of Citizens for Responsibility & Ethics in Washington (CREW)._ [**_Can you join us in donating $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can afford to CREW Today?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T964506e5-7646-4909-8cc3-e59c9eed6f9c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _**Santos claimed he was Jewish. He's not. He said his mom was from Belgium. She's from Brazil. In Brazil, he was charged with forging checks and we're not even 100% sure at this point that he's a U.S. citizen. **_ Sadly, from Majorie Taylor Greene to Lauren Boebert, Ted Cruz to Donald Trump, serial lying, conspiracy-mongering and even criminality are not shocking anymore. **_It will take more than winning races to secure our democracy, we must protect_**** _ its integrity from scammers, criminals, extremists and other malcontents who mostly assemble in today's GOP._**
---

name: Moms Against Abbott
subject: Greg Abbott, Scrooge of Texas
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MOMS IN OFFICE
body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]
Peter,
On Christmas Eve in Washington, D.C. the temperature dropped to 15 degrees Fahrenheit, the coldest on record.
Despite the fact, the governor of Texas decided to dump 130 men, women, and children without proper winter clothes in front of Vice President Kamala Harris’s residence.
Governor Abbott abandoned children in freezing temperatures on Christmas Eve without coordinating with any Federal or local authorities.
Moving people from Texas to another freezing jurisdiction and dumping them on the sidewalk is not a solution— it’s cruel, shameful and dangerous.
Will you stand with us in support to expose Gov. Abbott’s hypocrisy and demand change in Texas? Help us stand up to power and recruit, train and fund Democratic women and moms running for office in Texas. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsagainstabbott]
There are no off years in politics. The time to act is now. We can elect pro-choice Democratic women to local and state offices in Texas in 2024 who will hold Gov. Abbott accountable and demand change.
But we need your help today to lay the groundwork and put our plan into action. Can we count on you to chip in today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsagainstabbott]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/88265/images/IMG-4945.jpg]
CHIP IN [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsagainstabbott]
Thank you for everything!
Simona Grace

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: retiring our campaign debt by 12/31
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
Can I tell you the backstory?
| | |
---
Hi there –

It is the honor of my lifetime to serve you in the Senate. Working to make life better for Granite Staters is something that deserves my full attention.

That’s why I’m sending you this email. Our (victorious!) campaign has some debt to pay off, and the amount we owe will be publicly reported at the end of the year. [If you could give $3 right now to help us pay it down so that I can continue focusing my energy on serving in the Senate, I’d be very grateful.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56522329/385284468/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk-2172-nhnd&recurring=0&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjUxODJiMC1mYjg2LWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XVZJtxsIAUwnBefRU4tYsWcKuX5I8WNpAYU4TcwpB0I=)

The backstory is this: GOP spending against us SKYROCKETED in the last few weeks of the campaign. Polls tightened to within a point or two, and pundits doubted whether we could win.

My team was laser-focused on making strategic decisions that would allow us to win. We made last-minute investments with the information we had, hoping that the funding we needed would come through.

Unfortunately, all of our funding didn’t come through and now my campaign has a bit of a hole to fill to get our last bills paid.

[Will you please give $3 or as much as you can to help us retire our debt? Every dollar you give helps me spend less time fundraising and more time fighting for hardworking families, and I’m grateful for anything you can give.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56522330/385284469/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk-2172-nhnd&recurring=0&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjUxODJiMC1mYjg2LWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XVZJtxsIAUwnBefRU4tYsWcKuX5I8WNpAYU4TcwpB0I=)

Thank you so much.

With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

clean_body: Can I tell you the backstory? | | | Hi there – It is the honor of my lifetime to serve you in the Senate. Working to make life better for Granite Staters is something that deserves my full attention. That’s why I’m sending you this email. Our (victorious!) campaign has some debt to pay off, and the amount we owe will be publicly reported at the end of the year. = The backstory is this: GOP spending against us SKYROCKETED in the last few weeks of the campaign. Polls tightened to within a point or two, and pundits doubted whether we could win. My team was laser-focused on making strategic decisions that would allow us to win. We made last-minute investments with the information we had, hoping that the funding we needed would come through. Unfortunately, all of our funding didn’t come through and now my campaign has a bit of a hole to fill to get our last bills paid. = Thank you so much. With every good wish, Maggie Hassan | If you'd like to support Maggie Hassan for Senate, =. = If you’re reading this from your phone, to automatically sign up for our SMS list. clean_body: Can you pleeeeease give us a second? | THE ONLY OFFICIAL EMAILS FROM TED BUDD Dear Peter, We are in the final days of this most important year in our fight for freedom. In the coming days, we need to raise $3,480 to reach our last deadline of the year. | Your support and financial contribution have been essential in reaching our goals this past year, but our work is just getting started. To thank you for your support and to keep up our strong work, we are offering an end-of-year special: Did you accomplish all your resolutions this year? This may be your last chance to cross something off your list: By chipping in ANY AMOUNT, you are helping us hit our FINAL goal. You are ensuring that there is no gap in our work and that we can keep fighting for freedom in January. Together, we can make a difference and secure our conservative values in 2023. Sincerely, Team Budd | Ted Budd is a father, small business owner, and conservative leader in North Carolina. | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Ted Budd for Senate Copyright (C) 2021 Ted Budd for Senate, All rights reserved.

name: Patrick
subject: Joe Biden wants a second term.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM MORRISEY
body:
And people in hell want ice water. | | |
---
Fellow Conservative,
---
Get a load of this... In the inner circles of establishment Swamp Donkeys in Washington, DC there is a ton of discussion about President Joe Biden running for a second term.

And the punch line? _Sleepy Joe thinks he’s earned it._

**GIVE ME A BREAK.**

This President has not earned one damn thing and is certainly owed NOTHING from the American people.
---
[**STOP JOE BIDEN**](http://links.teammorrisey.com/u/click?_t=b0356ef447a34444a1b227ba5b6fa8b2&_m=c127cc2b2dfc405ea7e22bbface8352d&_e=84-5q1d_hi6ZfAc035_WuMyJcTCQkGa68kE9hXy7MznmCF-yKL6v9UZZWXfxRwRA21LshJvVKx3fxTIMcuFYuCAbbeNzbmm2lNMKYrcYo2LhnvCP0M7swo24E3kQoc7I0G-UM-A9qWC7EeUb0mcShbf_vDfC1qDByEAGjRvS1G3bPsn5nRqEIvmEyGvlDyclDXeAPbO9kPxbWqTT7-uAAiu2TByPTZ_Vd1NXqYEGmOx4UCYmyL5J-YUJlQIMsHKHNn4VqIaGG8t7UnsFYTU1r9v7x1_lNxjY67QuwDBCXKEcYltUWVnmUktA8YQinQknr3unvgDzks54ZGd1_KpF6k4jvpXxCX3nczE7mL-pocigqUsrYCtWN99KmmkkvaPYVSnmivdGtrZWJxGagq7WRw%3D%3D)
---
As this year comes to a close, we need to get serious about getting rid of Joe Biden and his spineless enablers in Congress.
I know we all have a lot going on this time of year, but if we don’t act and remain consistent in our fight to take our country back, we very well could deal with another term of PRESIDENT Joe Biden. _And nobody wants that._

[**My one wish this holiday season is that 47 new patriots will step up and join me in my fight to retire Joe Biden, flip the Senate and TAKE OUR COUNTRY BACK. Will you be one of them?**](http://links.teammorrisey.com/u/click?_t=b0356ef447a34444a1b227ba5b6fa8b2&_m=c127cc2b2dfc405ea7e22bbface8352d&_e=84-5q1d_hi6ZfAc035_WuMyJcTCQkGa68kE9hXy7MznmCF-yKL6v9UZZWXfxRwRA21LshJvVKx3fxTIMcuFYuCAbbeNzbmm2lNMKYrcYo2LhnvCP0M7swo24E3kQoc7I0G-UM-A9qWC7EeUb0mcShbf_vDfC1qDByEAGjRvS1G3bPsn5nRqEIvmEyGvlDyclDXeAPbO9kPxbWqTT7-uAAiu2TByPTZ_Vd1NXqYEGmOx4UCYmyL5J-YUJlQIMsHKH3690olfnoLVUBChYjHULXWJDi0S_CXnkpGiLJD-QXr-JjIfvFG_Gwmk6bUKePbwUqrmqHhUqbGmpaeFDppsDfP9Nqanf6twl67o3ox7v5Ua1Se9ppdeN7ksilpwEnfRzOpvnhuFpljmKppZl6hzqdg%3D%3D)
---
[**JOIN THE FIGHT**](http://links.teammorrisey.com/u/click?_t=b0356ef447a34444a1b227ba5b6fa8b2&_m=c127cc2b2dfc405ea7e22bbface8352d&_e=84-5q1d_hi6ZfAc035_WuMyJcTCQkGa68kE9hXy7MznmCF-yKL6v9UZZWXfxRwRA21LshJvVKx3fxTIMcuFYuCAbbeNzbmm2lNMKYrcYo2LhnvCP0M7swo24E3kQoc7I0G-UM-A9qWC7EeUb0mcShbf_vDfC1qDByEAGjRvS1G3bPsn5nRqEIvmEyGvlDyclDXeAPbO9kPxbWqTT7-uAAiu2TByPTZ_Vd1NXqYEGmOx4UCYmyL5J-YUJlQIMsHKHeYT1-u_DQtmlS1KiHIbt9g-PA_xKLFxWeG9dNlYH5Jo9Uj8wQ1K6xXDScJ49_4V5Vu4F2LttjAI534J7k2RSllvexHSbB-vOX0ks_FiZsC4pOtQCEVKaQfPduVgxJN57mj231b3fcmkol1Vxmn23_g%3D%3D)
